summary.zh: 2023年1月，人工智能时代正式拉开序幕。OpenAI于2022年11月底发布的ChatGPT在短短两个月内席卷全球，成为史上增长最快的消费级应用，引发各国科技界、产业界和政策制定者的高度关注。微软宣布向OpenAI追加数十亿美元投资，Google、Meta等巨头紧急调整AI战略。与此同时，全球地缘格局依然复杂——俄乌战争进入新阶段，中美科技博弈加剧，半导体供应链安全成为各国战略优先事项。一场由大语言模型驱动的技术革命正在重塑全球秩序。
summary.en: January 2023 marks the dawn of the Age of AI. ChatGPT, released by OpenAI in late November 2022, has swept the globe in just two months, becoming the fastest-growing consumer application in history and drawing intense attention from tech industries, businesses, and policymakers worldwide. Microsoft announces a multi-billion-dollar investment in OpenAI, while Google, Meta, and other tech giants urgently realign their AI strategies. Meanwhile, the global geopolitical landscape remains complex — the Russia-Ukraine war enters a new phase, US-China tech rivalry intensifies, and semiconductor supply chain security becomes a strategic priority for nations. A technological revolution driven by large language models is reshaping the global order.

governmentForm.zh: 联邦总统制共和国，三权分立，五十州联邦体制。
governmentForm.en: Federal presidential republic with separation of powers across executive, legislative, and judicial branches, comprising fifty states.

socialStructure.zh: 以庞大中产阶级与科技精英阶层为核心的多元社会，贫富差距持续扩大，科技从业者收入远超传统产业。
socialStructure.en: A pluralistic society centered on a large middle class and tech elite, with widening wealth inequality and technology workers earning far more than those in traditional industries.

rulingClass.zh: 民选官员、联邦官僚体系、科技企业领袖与华尔街金融精英共同构成权力核心。
rulingClass.en: Elected officials, the federal bureaucracy, tech corporate leaders, and Wall Street financial elites together form the power center.

succession.zh: 总统由全国选举人团选举产生，任期四年，可连任一次。
succession.en: The president is elected via the Electoral College for a four-year term, renewable once.

structure.zh: 联邦政府设行政、立法、司法三权分立体制。总统领导行政部门，国会分参众两院，最高法院行使违宪审查权。
structure.en: The federal government operates on a tripartite separation of powers. The president leads the executive, Congress is divided into Senate and House, and the Supreme Court exercises judicial review.

function.zh: 为总统提供政策协调、国家安全与经济顾问支持。
function.en: Provides policy coordination, national security, and economic advisory support to the president.

function.zh: 指挥全球军事力量部署、国防战略与军事技术研发。
function.en: Commands global military force deployment, defense strategy, and military technology R&D.

function.zh: 管理联邦财政收支、货币政策协调、制裁执行与金融监管。
function.en: Manages federal revenue and expenditure, monetary policy coordination, sanctions enforcement, and financial regulation.

function.zh: 负责贸易政策、出口管制、半导体产业支持与经济数据统计。
function.en: Handles trade policy, export controls, semiconductor industry support, and economic statistics.

localAdmin.zh: 五十州各设州长与州议会，县、市、镇构成基层治理网络，联邦制下地方自治权较大。
localAdmin.en: Each of fifty states has a governor and legislature, with counties, cities, and towns forming the grassroots governance network under a federal system with substantial local autonomy.

legalSystem.zh: 以普通法为基础，联邦法与州法并行，宪法至上，最高法院拥有终审与违宪审查权。
legalSystem.en: Based on common law, with federal and state law operating in parallel, constitutional supremacy, and the Supreme Court holding final appellate and judicial review authority.

taxationSystem.zh: 联邦税以个人所得税与公司税为主，社会保障税与消费税为辅；各州另征销售税与所得税。
taxationSystem.en: Federal taxation centers on individual income tax and corporate tax, supplemented by payroll taxes and excise taxes; states additionally levy sales and income taxes.

religion.zh: 基督教（新教/天主教）为主，世俗化趋势明显，多元宗教并存
religion.en: Christianity (Protestant/Catholic) predominant, with a strong secularization trend and multifaith coexistence

philosophy.zh: 自由主义、实用主义与个人主义传统深厚，科技乐观主义与有效加速主义兴起。
philosophy.en: Deep traditions of liberalism, pragmatism, and individualism, with rising techno-optimism and effective accelerationism.

culturalAchievements.zh: 好莱坞、硅谷创新文化、流行音乐、互联网平台与AI技术引领全球文化输出。ChatGPT等AI产品深刻改变信息获取与创作方式。
culturalAchievements.en: Hollywood, Silicon Valley innovation culture, popular music, internet platforms, and AI technology lead global cultural exports. AI products like ChatGPT are profoundly reshaping information access and creative processes.

languageFamily.zh: 印欧语系日耳曼语族（英语为国家通用语言）
languageFamily.en: Indo-European, Germanic branch (English as the national lingua franca)

gdpDescription.zh: 全球最大经济体，科技与金融服务业高度发达，AI产业正成为新的增长引擎。通胀从2022年高点回落但仍高于目标水平。
gdpDescription.en: The world's largest economy with highly developed tech and financial services. The AI industry is becoming a new growth engine. Inflation has retreated from 2022 highs but remains above target.

mainIndustries.zh: 人工智能、半导体设计、云计算、软件、金融、医药、航空航天、军工、能源、农业
mainIndustries.en: Artificial intelligence, semiconductor design, cloud computing, software, finance, pharmaceuticals, aerospace, defense, energy, agriculture

tradeGoods.zh: AI芯片（GPU）、软件服务、石油天然气、飞机、药品、农产品、军事装备
tradeGoods.en: AI chips (GPUs), software services, oil and gas, aircraft, pharmaceuticals, agricultural products, military equipment

householdWealth.zh: 家庭财富中位数约19万美元，但分配极不均等。科技行业从业者财富快速增长，低收入群体面临住房与医疗成本压力。
householdWealth.en: Median household wealth approximately $190,000, but distribution is highly unequal. Tech workers see rapid wealth growth while lower-income groups face housing and healthcare cost pressures.

tradeRoutes.zh: 跨太平洋、跨大西洋贸易路线为主，美加墨三国自由贸易体系，对华贸易受关税与出口管制影响。
tradeRoutes.en: Primarily trans-Pacific and trans-Atlantic routes, the US-Canada-Mexico free trade system, with China trade affected by tariffs and export controls.

economicSystem.zh: 以自由市场经济为主，联邦政府通过财政政策、货币政策及产业补贴（如CHIPS法案）进行宏观调控。
economicSystem.en: Primarily a free market economy, with the federal government exercising macroeconomic regulation through fiscal policy, monetary policy, and industrial subsidies such as the CHIPS Act.

treasuryDescription.zh: 联邦债务已超33万亿美元，债务上限政治博弈反复上演，但美元全球储备货币地位支撑持续融资能力。
treasuryDescription.en: Federal debt exceeds $33 trillion with recurring debt-ceiling political brinkmanship, but the dollar's global reserve currency status underpins continued financing capacity.

debtLevel.zh: 联邦债务约占GDP的123%，处于历史高位。
debtLevel.en: Federal debt at approximately 123% of GDP, a historic high.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 扩张性财政支出持续，CHIPS法案与通胀削减法案为半导体与清洁能源提供大规模补贴。
fiscalPolicy.en: Expansionary fiscal spending continues, with the CHIPS Act and Inflation Reduction Act providing massive subsidies for semiconductors and clean energy.

description.zh: 全球最强陆上作战力量，正加速AI集成与无人系统部署。
description.en: The world's most powerful land warfare force, accelerating AI integration and unmanned systems deployment.

description.zh: 拥有11艘核动力航母的全球性海上力量。
description.en: A global naval force with 11 nuclear-powered aircraft carriers.

description.zh: 全球最大空中力量，F-35部署加速，AI辅助空战系统测试中。
description.en: The world's largest air force, accelerating F-35 deployment, with AI-assisted air combat systems under testing.

description.zh: 负责太空作战、卫星防御与太空态势感知。
description.en: Responsible for space operations, satellite defense, and space domain awareness.

technology.zh: 全球最先进军事技术，涵盖隐身战机、核三位一体、网络战、AI自主武器原型、高超音速武器及太空作战能力。
technology.en: The world's most advanced military technology, covering stealth aircraft, nuclear triad, cyber warfare, AI autonomous weapon prototypes, hypersonic weapons, and space warfare capabilities.

threats.zh: 中国军事崛起、俄罗斯核威慑、朝鲜核导弹、伊朗核问题与网络战威胁。
threats.en: China's military rise, Russian nuclear deterrence, North Korean nuclear missiles, Iranian nuclear issue, and cyber warfare threats.

recentBattles.zh: 无直接大规模作战，但持续向乌克兰提供军援，在中东维持军事存在。
recentBattles.en: No direct large-scale combat, but continuing military aid to Ukraine and maintaining military presence in the Middle East.

populationDescription.zh: 全球第三人口大国，移民持续推动人口增长，老龄化趋势加剧但慢于多数发达国家。
populationDescription.en: The world's third most populous country, with immigration driving continued population growth and aging slower than most developed nations.

ethnicGroups.en: White (57.8%), Hispanic/Latino (18.7%), Black (12.4%), Asian (6.0%), and other groups

socialClasses.zh: 科技精英、金融资本家、专业中产、蓝领工人阶层与服务业底层构成金字塔结构。
socialClasses.en: Tech elites, financial capitalists, professional middle class, blue-collar workers, and service-sector lower class form a pyramidal structure.

allies.zh: 北约盟国、日本、韩国、澳大利亚、以色列、台湾（非正式）等。
allies.en: NATO allies, Japan, South Korea, Australia, Israel, Taiwan (informal), and others.

enemies.zh: 与中国处于战略竞争状态，与俄罗斯因乌克兰战争对立，与伊朗和朝鲜长期敌对。
enemies.en: In strategic competition with China, in confrontation with Russia over the Ukraine war, and in long-standing hostility with Iran and North Korea.

vassals.zh: 无正式附庸，但通过军事基地与安全承诺对多国具有实质影响力。
vassals.en: No formal vassals, but exercises substantial influence over many nations through military bases and security commitments.

treaties.zh: 北约公约、美日安保条约、AUKUS、美韩共同防御条约、USMCA等。
treaties.en: NATO Treaty, US-Japan Security Treaty, AUKUS, US-ROK Mutual Defense Treaty, USMCA, etc.

foreignPolicy.zh: 推进对华科技脱钩与芯片出口管制，支持乌克兰抗俄，强化印太战略。
foreignPolicy.en: Advancing tech decoupling and chip export controls against China, supporting Ukraine against Russia, and strengthening the Indo-Pacific strategy.

recentDiplomaticEvents.zh: 2023年10月对以色列提供支持；11月旧金山中美元首峰会恢复高层对话。
recentDiplomaticEvents.en: Provided support for Israel in October 2023; the November San Francisco Biden-Xi summit restored high-level dialogue.

era.en: Frontier of the AI and information technology revolution

keyInnovations.zh: 大语言模型（GPT-4、Claude、Gemini）、生成式AI、AI芯片（NVIDIA H100/A100）、量子计算研究、自动驾驶、mRNA疫苗与基因编辑、具身智能与人形机器人、核聚变实验突破、太空商业化。
keyInnovations.en: Large language models (GPT-4, Claude, Gemini), generative AI, AI chips (NVIDIA H100/A100), quantum computing research, autonomous driving, mRNA vaccines and gene editing, embodied intelligence and humanoid robots, nuclear fusion experimental breakthroughs, space commercialization.

infrastructure.zh: 全球最大云计算基础设施、领先的5G网络、遍布全国的数据中心集群、世界级研究型大学体系。
infrastructure.en: The world's largest cloud computing infrastructure, leading 5G networks, nationwide data center clusters, and a world-class research university system.

semiconductors.zh: 全球半导体设计与IP生态的绝对中心。NVIDIA、AMD、Qualcomm、Broadcom、Intel等垄断芯片设计高端，EDA工具（Synopsys、Cadence）全球无替代。CHIPS法案推动制造回流，台积电、三星在美建厂。但先进制造仍高度依赖台湾代工，本土晶圆厂产能不足。
semiconductors.en: The absolute center of global semiconductor design and IP ecosystem. NVIDIA, AMD, Qualcomm, Broadcom, Intel dominate high-end chip design; EDA tools (Synopsys, Cadence) have no global substitutes. The CHIPS Act drives manufacturing reshoring with TSMC and Samsung building US fabs, but advanced manufacturing still heavily depends on Taiwan foundries with insufficient domestic wafer capacity.

cloudAndInternet.zh: AWS、Azure、GCP三大云平台占据全球超60%市场份额，构成AI时代的基础设施底座。硅谷仍是全球互联网创新中心，但TikTok等中国应用的崛起对社交媒体格局形成挑战。
cloudAndInternet.en: AWS, Azure, GCP hold over 60% of the global cloud market, forming the infrastructure backbone of the AI era. Silicon Valley remains the global internet innovation hub, though the rise of Chinese apps like TikTok challenges the social media landscape.

biotechAndPharma.zh: 全球生物医药研发中心，辉瑞、Moderna的mRNA技术引领疫苗革命，CRISPR基因编辑技术进入临床应用，FDA批准首款基因编辑疗法。NIH年度预算超470亿美元，波士顿-旧金山生物科技走廊汇聚全球顶尖人才。GLP-1类减重药物（Ozempic/Wegovy）成为制药行业现象级产品。
biotechAndPharma.en: The global biotech and pharmaceutical R&D center. Pfizer and Moderna's mRNA technology leads the vaccine revolution, CRISPR gene editing enters clinical application, and the FDA approves the first gene-editing therapy. NIH's annual budget exceeds $47 billion; the Boston-San Francisco biotech corridor attracts top global talent. GLP-1 weight-loss drugs (Ozempic/Wegovy) become a pharmaceutical phenomenon.

spaceAndAerospace.zh: SpaceX以星舰（Starship）和星链（Starlink）重新定义太空产业，2023年完成近百次火箭发射。NASA推进阿尔忒弥斯重返月球计划。Blue Origin、Rocket Lab等商业航天蓬勃发展。波音与洛马在国防航空领域仍具主导地位，F-35成为北约标准五代机。
spaceAndAerospace.en: SpaceX redefines the space industry with Starship and Starlink, completing nearly 100 launches in 2023. NASA advances the Artemis return-to-Moon program. Blue Origin, Rocket Lab, and other commercial space ventures thrive. Boeing and Lockheed Martin maintain dominance in defense aerospace; the F-35 becomes NATO's standard fifth-generation fighter.

newEnergy.zh: 特斯拉仍是全球电动车领导者但市场份额下滑，IRA法案（通胀削减法案）拨款3690亿美元补贴清洁能源。太阳能与风电装机加速，但电网基础设施老化成为瓶颈。核聚变领域，NIF实验室2022年底实现净能量增益，多家私营核聚变公司获得巨额融资。
newEnergy.en: Tesla remains the global EV leader but loses market share; the IRA allocates $369 billion for clean energy subsidies. Solar and wind installations accelerate, but aging grid infrastructure becomes a bottleneck. In nuclear fusion, NIF achieved net energy gain in late 2022, and multiple private fusion companies secured massive funding.

quantumComputing.zh: IBM、Google、微软与多家初创公司推进量子计算，IBM推出1121量子比特Condor处理器。量子纠错取得进展但通用量子计算机仍遥远。量子通信与后量子密码学成为国家安全优先事项。
quantumComputing.en: IBM, Google, Microsoft, and numerous startups advance quantum computing; IBM unveils the 1,121-qubit Condor processor. Quantum error correction progresses but general-purpose quantum computers remain distant. Quantum communications and post-quantum cryptography become national security priorities.

autonomousDriving.zh: Waymo在旧金山、凤凰城等城市运营商业化无人出租车服务，Cruise经历安全事故后暂停运营。特斯拉FSD持续迭代但尚未实现完全自动驾驶。美国在L4级自动驾驶商业化方面全球领先。
autonomousDriving.en: Waymo operates commercial robotaxi services in San Francisco, Phoenix, and other cities; Cruise suspends operations after a safety incident. Tesla FSD continues iterating but has not yet achieved full autonomy. The US leads globally in L4 autonomous driving commercialization.

embodiedIntelligence.zh: 具身智能成为AI下一前沿：特斯拉Optimus人形机器人加速迭代，Figure AI获OpenAI与微软投资推出Figure 01/02，波士顿动力Atlas转向商用电动版本，Agility Robotics的Digit进入亚马逊仓库测试。学术界，斯坦福Mobile ALOHA低成本双臂机器人开源引发热潮。美国在'AI大脑+机器人躯体'融合路线上具备全球最强的软硬件整合优势。
embodiedIntelligence.en: Embodied intelligence emerges as AI's next frontier: Tesla's Optimus humanoid robot iterates rapidly; Figure AI, backed by OpenAI and Microsoft, launches Figure 01/02; Boston Dynamics pivots Atlas to a commercial electric version; Agility Robotics' Digit enters Amazon warehouse trials. In academia, Stanford's Mobile ALOHA low-cost bimanual robot goes open-source to wide acclaim. The US holds the world's strongest software-hardware integration advantage in the 'AI brain + robot body' convergence approach.

overallAssessment.zh: 美国在2023年的科技实力仍居全球无可争议的第一位。其核心优势在于：1）AI基础研究与商业化遥遥领先，OpenAI、Google、Anthropic等定义技术前沿；2）半导体设计与EDA工具形成不可替代的生态垄断；3）风险投资体系与资本市场提供全球最强的科技融资能力；4）世界级大学持续吸引全球人才；5）SpaceX等企业重新定义航天工业。主要挑战包括：先进芯片制造依赖台湾、中国在应用层AI的快速追赶、国内政治极化对科技政策连续性的影响、以及AI安全监管框架尚未成熟。
overallAssessment.en: US tech strength in 2023 remains the undisputed global #1. Core advantages include: 1) AI foundational research and commercialization far ahead, with OpenAI, Google, Anthropic defining the frontier; 2) semiconductor design and EDA tools forming an irreplaceable ecosystem monopoly; 3) the VC system and capital markets providing the world's strongest tech financing; 4) world-class universities continuously attracting global talent; 5) SpaceX and others redefining the aerospace industry. Key challenges include: advanced chip manufacturing dependence on Taiwan, China's rapid catch-up in applied AI, domestic political polarization affecting tech policy continuity, and an immature AI safety regulatory framework.

policy.zh: 2023年10月发布AI安全行政令，要求大模型开发者向政府报告安全测试结果；CHIPS法案拨款527亿美元支持半导体制造回流。
policy.en: The October 2023 Executive Order on Safe AI requires large model developers to report safety test results; the CHIPS Act allocates $52.7 billion for semiconductor manufacturing reshoring.

regulatoryStance.zh: 以行政令与行业自律为主，尚无联邦级综合AI立法，各州零散推进地方性法规。
regulatoryStance.en: Primarily through executive orders and industry self-regulation, with no comprehensive federal AI legislation yet.

investmentScale.zh: 2023年美国AI领域私人投资超670亿美元，占全球AI投资近三分之二。
investmentScale.en: US private AI investment exceeded $67 billion in 2023, nearly two-thirds of global AI investment.

capabilities.zh: 多模态大语言模型，支持文本与图像输入，在各类基准测试中达到人类专家水平。
capabilities.en: Multimodal LLM supporting text and image input, achieving human expert-level performance on various benchmarks.

capabilities.zh: 强调安全性的大语言模型，支持长上下文窗口，擅长编程与分析。
capabilities.en: Safety-focused LLM with long context windows, excelling at coding and analytical tasks.

capabilities.zh: Google多模态AI模型，原生支持文本、图像、音频与视频理解。
capabilities.en: Google's multimodal AI model with native text, image, audio, and video understanding.

capabilities.zh: Meta开源大语言模型系列，推动开源AI生态发展。
capabilities.en: Meta's open-source LLM family, driving open-source AI ecosystem development.

keyProducts.zh: ChatGPT、GPT-4、DALL-E 3
keyProducts.en: ChatGPT, GPT-4, DALL-E 3

keyProducts.zh: Claude系列模型
keyProducts.en: Claude model family

valuation.zh: Alphabet子公司，母公司市值超1.7万亿美元
valuation.en: Alphabet subsidiary, parent market cap over $1.7 trillion

keyProducts.zh: Gemini、AlphaFold
keyProducts.en: Gemini, AlphaFold

keyProducts.zh: H100/A100 GPU、CUDA平台
keyProducts.en: H100/A100 GPUs, CUDA platform

keyProducts.zh: Llama 2、Segment Anything
keyProducts.en: Llama 2, Segment Anything

keyProducts.zh: Azure OpenAI服务、Copilot
keyProducts.en: Azure OpenAI Service, Copilot

keyProducts.zh: Optimus人形机器人、Tesla Bot具身智能平台
keyProducts.en: Optimus humanoid robot, Tesla Bot embodied intelligence platform

keyProducts.zh: Figure 01/02通用人形机器人
keyProducts.en: Figure 01/02 general-purpose humanoid robots

valuation.zh: 现代汽车旗下，估值约11亿美元
valuation.en: Owned by Hyundai, valued at approximately $1.1 billion

keyProducts.zh: Atlas人形机器人、Spot四足机器人
keyProducts.en: Atlas humanoid robot, Spot quadruped robot

keyProducts.zh: NEO人形机器人、EVE双足机器人
keyProducts.en: NEO humanoid robot, EVE bipedal robot

valuation.zh: 亚马逊投资，估值约10亿美元

keyProducts.zh: Digit人形机器人、仓储物流自动化
keyProducts.en: Digit humanoid robot, warehouse logistics automation

contribution.zh: 领导ChatGPT与GPT-4开发，2023年11月经历被解雇与回归事件。
contribution.en: Led ChatGPT and GPT-4 development; experienced a dramatic firing and return in November 2023.

contribution.zh: 创立Anthropic并推动负责任AI扩展路线，开发Claude模型系列。
contribution.en: Founded Anthropic, championed responsible scaling, and developed the Claude model family.

contribution.zh: 将NVIDIA转型为AI算力基础设施霸主，H100 GPU成为AI训练标准硬件。
contribution.en: Transformed NVIDIA into the dominant AI compute infrastructure provider; H100 GPU became the standard for AI training.

contribution.zh: 领导AlphaGo、AlphaFold等突破性AI研究，合并Google Brain后领导Gemini开发。
contribution.en: Led breakthrough AI research including AlphaGo and AlphaFold; led Gemini development after merging with Google Brain.

contribution.zh: 通过130亿美元投资OpenAI，将微软定位为AI时代平台霸主。
contribution.en: Positioned Microsoft as the AI-era platform leader through $13 billion investment in OpenAI.

contribution.zh: 深度学习先驱与图灵奖得主，倡导开源AI路线。
contribution.en: Deep learning pioneer and Turing Award winner, championed the open-source AI approach.

researchFocus.zh: 大语言模型扩展、多模态AI、AI安全与对齐、AI Agent系统、具身智能。
researchFocus.en: LLM scaling, multimodal AI, AI safety and alignment, AI agent systems, embodied intelligence.

computeInfrastructure.zh: 全球最大AI算力集群，以NVIDIA GPU为核心；AWS、Azure、GCP大规模部署AI专用芯片。
computeInfrastructure.en: The world's largest AI compute clusters centered on NVIDIA GPUs; AWS, Azure, GCP deploying AI chips at scale.

talentPool.zh: 集聚全球顶尖AI人才，斯坦福、MIT、伯克利等大学与OpenAI等企业构成全球AI研究中心。
talentPool.en: Concentrates the world's top AI talent; Stanford, MIT, Berkeley, and corporate labs like OpenAI form the global AI research hub.

globalRanking.zh: 全球AI综合实力第一，在基础研究、商业化、算力、人才与资本五个维度均领先。
globalRanking.en: Ranked #1 globally in overall AI strength, leading in foundational research, commercialization, compute, talent, and capital.

outlook.zh: AI产业有望贡献数万亿美元经济价值，但面临监管不确定性、AI安全风险与中国追赶的挑战。
outlook.en: The AI industry is expected to contribute trillions in value, but faces regulatory uncertainty, AI safety risks, and China's catch-up challenge.

strengths.zh: AI基础研究与商业化全球遥遥领先、半导体设计与EDA生态不可替代、风险投资与资本市场为科技创新提供强大资金支撑、世界级大学持续吸引全球顶尖人才、SpaceX重新定义航天工业、生物医药研发能力无与伦比、军事技术代差优势明显。
strengths.en: Far ahead globally in AI foundational research and commercialization, irreplaceable semiconductor design and EDA ecosystem, VC and capital markets providing strong tech funding, world-class universities continuously attracting global talent, SpaceX redefining aerospace, unrivaled biotech R&D capabilities, clear military technology generational advantage.

weaknesses.zh: 政治极化加剧影响科技政策连续性、联邦债务高企、先进芯片制造依赖台湾代工、贫富差距扩大与科技鸿沟、基础设施老化、AI安全监管框架尚未成熟、STEM人才高度依赖移民。
weaknesses.en: Intensifying political polarization affecting tech policy continuity, high federal debt, advanced chip manufacturing dependence on Taiwan foundries, widening wealth inequality and tech divide, aging infrastructure, immature AI safety regulatory framework, heavy reliance on immigration for STEM talent.

outlook.zh: 若能有效管控AI风险、维持对全球人才的吸引力并推进半导体制造回流，美国将继续在AI时代引领全球科技秩序。但需警惕中国在新能源、应用AI与具身智能领域的快速追赶。
outlook.en: If it can manage AI risks, maintain its global talent attraction, and advance semiconductor manufacturing reshoring, the US will continue leading the global tech order in the AI era. But it must be wary of China's rapid catch-up in new energy, applied AI, and embodied intelligence.

description.zh: 2023年的美国是无可争议的AI超级大国，OpenAI、Anthropic、Google DeepMind、Meta AI与NVIDIA主导全球AI技术前沿。
description.en: The US in 2023 is the undisputed AI superpower, with OpenAI, Anthropic, Google DeepMind, Meta AI, and NVIDIA dominating the global AI frontier.

ideology.zh: 自由主义、中间偏左

relationship.zh: 执政党，控制白宫与参议院。
relationship.en: Ruling party, controls the White House and the Senate.

description.zh: 2020年拜登击败特朗普入主白宫。执政期间推动《芯片与科学法案》和《通胀削减法案》，加大对华科技竞争力度，同时在国内推进基础设施投资与新能源转型，但面临高通胀和移民危机等挑战。
description.en: Biden defeated Trump in 2020 and pushed the CHIPS Act and Inflation Reduction Act while intensifying tech competition with China. His administration invested in infrastructure and clean energy but faced persistent inflation and a border crisis.

ideology.zh: 右翼民粹主义、国家保守主义

relationship.zh: 最大反对党，控制众议院。
relationship.en: Main opposition party, controls the House of Representatives.

description.zh: 在特朗普MAGA运动主导下，共和党已转型为右翼民粹政党。2023年特朗普面临多项刑事起诉但仍稳居党内初选领跑地位。该党控制众议院，在债务上限和政府拨款问题上与拜登政府激烈对抗。
description.en: Reshaped by Trump's MAGA movement. Despite multiple criminal indictments in 2023, Trump dominated the GOP primary field. The party controlled the House and clashed sharply with the Biden administration over the debt ceiling and government funding.

leaderTitle.zh: 特斯拉与SpaceX CEO、X平台所有者
leaderTitle.en: CEO of Tesla & SpaceX, Owner of X

ideology.zh: 技术自由意志主义、加速主义

relationship.zh: 非政党势力，对两党均施加影响。
relationship.en: Non-party force exerting influence over both parties.

description.zh: 以马斯克为代表的科技亿万富翁群体在2023年成为独立政治力量。马斯克收购Twitter改名为X后推动言论自由议程。AI军备竞赛引爆全球关注，硅谷巨头在AI监管、社会治理等议题上影响力已超越传统政治精英。
description.en: Tech billionaires led by Musk emerged as an independent political force. After rebranding Twitter as X, Musk pushed a free-speech agenda. The AI arms race gave Silicon Valley titans outsized influence over regulation and governance, rivaling traditional political elites.

rulerTitle.zh: 中共中央总书记、国家主席、中央军委主席
rulerTitle.en: General Secretary of CPC, President, Chairman of CMC

governmentForm.zh: 中国共产党领导的社会主义共和国，实行人民代表大会制度，党在国家治理中居核心领导地位。
governmentForm.en: CPC-led socialist republic with a People's Congress system, where the Party holds the core leadership role in governance.

socialStructure.zh: 城市中产阶级持续扩大，科技从业者与新兴产业工人崛起，农民工群体仍面临城乡二元结构挑战。
socialStructure.en: An expanding urban middle class with rising tech workers and new-industry employees, while migrant workers still face urban-rural dual structure challenges.

rulingClass.zh: 中共高层领导、国有企业高管、军方将领与科技企业家构成权力核心。
rulingClass.en: CPC senior leadership, SOE executives, military generals, and tech entrepreneurs form the power core.

succession.zh: 党内协商机制确定最高领导人，2018年修宪取消国家主席任期限制。
succession.en: Top leaders are determined through intra-party deliberation; the 2018 constitutional amendment removed presidential term limits.

structure.zh: 党国一体体制，中央政治局常委会为最高决策机构，国务院负责行政执行，全国人大为最高立法机关。
structure.en: Party-state system with the Politburo Standing Committee as the supreme decision-making body, the State Council handling administrative execution, and the National People's Congress as the highest legislative organ.

function.zh: 中央人民政府，负责全国行政管理、经济调控与社会治理。
function.en: The central people's government, responsible for national administration, economic regulation, and social governance.

name.en: Ministry of Industry and Information Technology (MIIT)

function.zh: 主管工业、通信业和信息化发展，推动制造强国与数字中国建设。
function.en: Oversees industrial, telecommunications, and informatization development, advancing the manufacturing powerhouse and Digital China initiatives.

function.zh: 制定国家科技发展战略与政策，组织重大科技专项与基础研究。
function.en: Formulates national S&T development strategies and policies, organizes major science programs and fundamental research.

function.zh: 统一领导全国武装力量，决定军事战略与国防政策。
function.en: Exercises unified command over all armed forces, determining military strategy and defense policy.

localAdmin.zh: 省、市、县、乡四级行政体系，各级党委书记掌握实际权力，行政首长负责具体执行。
localAdmin.en: Four-level administrative system (province, city, county, township), with the Party Secretary at each level holding real power and government heads responsible for execution.

legalSystem.zh: 以大陆法为基础的社会主义法律体系，坚持党的领导，全国人大拥有最高立法权。
legalSystem.en: A socialist legal system based on civil law under Party leadership, with the National People's Congress holding supreme legislative authority.

taxationSystem.zh: 以增值税和企业所得税为核心，实行中央与地方税收分享体制，土地出让金为地方重要财源。
taxationSystem.en: Centered on VAT and corporate income tax with a central-local tax sharing system; land sale revenues are a key local fiscal source.

religion.zh: 官方无神论，佛教、道教、基督教与伊斯兰教并存，民间信仰广泛。
religion.en: Officially atheist, with Buddhism, Taoism, Christianity, and Islam coexisting alongside widespread folk beliefs.

philosophy.zh: 中国化马克思主义（习近平新时代中国特色社会主义思想）为官方指导思想，儒家传统持续影响社会价值观。
philosophy.en: Sinicized Marxism (Xi Jinping Thought on Socialism with Chinese Characteristics for a New Era) as the official guiding ideology, with Confucian traditions continuing to influence social values.

culturalAchievements.zh: 抖音/TikTok重塑全球短视频文化，刘慈欣科幻作品享誉世界，AI内容应用与网络文学出海蓬勃发展。
culturalAchievements.en: Douyin/TikTok reshaping global short-video culture, Liu Cixin's sci-fi works acclaimed worldwide, AI content apps and web literature expanding internationally.

languageFamily.zh: 汉藏语系汉语族（以普通话为通用语言）
languageFamily.en: Sino-Tibetan, Sinitic branch (Mandarin as the common language)

gdpDescription.zh: 全球第二大经济体，正经历增长模式转型，面临房地产下行与青年失业率高企的双重挑战。
gdpDescription.en: The world's second-largest economy in growth transition, facing dual challenges of real estate downturn and high youth unemployment.

mainIndustries.zh: 制造业、电子商务、5G通信、新能源汽车、人工智能、半导体
mainIndustries.en: Manufacturing, e-commerce, 5G, new energy vehicles (NEV), artificial intelligence, semiconductors

tradeGoods.zh: 电子产品、机械设备、新能源汽车、纺织品、稀土、太阳能电池板
tradeGoods.en: Electronics, machinery, NEV, textiles, rare earths, solar panels

householdWealth.zh: 家庭财富约70%集中于房地产，房地产市场下行导致居民财富缩水与消费信心受挫。
householdWealth.en: Approximately 70% of household wealth is in real estate; the property downturn is eroding household wealth and dampening consumer confidence.

tradeRoutes.zh: 一带一路倡议覆盖亚欧非大陆，东盟、欧盟与美国为三大贸易伙伴。
tradeRoutes.en: The Belt and Road Initiative spans Asia, Europe, and Africa, with ASEAN, the EU, and the US as the top three trade partners.

economicSystem.zh: 社会主义市场经济体制，国有企业掌控金融、能源、通信等关键行业，民营经济贡献主要就业与创新。
economicSystem.en: Socialist market economy with SOEs controlling key sectors like finance, energy, and telecoms, while the private sector drives most employment and innovation.

treasuryDescription.zh: 拥有全球最大外汇储备，但地方政府隐性债务风险不容忽视，城投债规模庞大。
treasuryDescription.en: Holds the world's largest forex reserves, but local government hidden debt risks — especially from LGFV bonds — cannot be ignored.

debtLevel.zh: 中央政府债务约占GDP的21%，但含地方隐性债务后总体政府债务率约80%。
debtLevel.en: Central government debt is about 21% of GDP, but total government debt including local hidden liabilities is approximately 80%.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 积极财政政策，通过专项债券与基础设施投资稳定经济增长，加大科技创新领域财政支持。
fiscalPolicy.en: Proactive fiscal policy, stabilizing growth through special bonds and infrastructure investment, with increased fiscal support for S&T innovation.

description.zh: 全球最大规模常备陆军，持续推进机械化与信息化融合。
description.en: The world's largest standing army, advancing mechanization and informatization integration.

description.zh: 拥有三艘航母（包括福建舰），是全球最大规模海军之一，加速远洋作战能力建设。
description.en: Possesses three aircraft carriers including the Fujian, one of the world's largest navies, accelerating blue-water capability development.

description.zh: 装备歼-20隐身战斗机，正加速第五代战机批量列装与无人机技术发展。
description.en: Equipped with J-20 stealth fighters, accelerating fifth-generation fighter mass deployment and drone technology development.

description.zh: 掌管核与常规导弹力量，包括洲际弹道导弹、中程弹道导弹与高超音速武器。
description.en: Commands nuclear and conventional missile forces, including ICBMs, MRBMs, and hypersonic weapons.

technology.zh: 军事技术快速追赶，在高超音速武器、反舰弹道导弹、量子通信与军用无人机领域取得突破。
technology.en: Rapid military-tech catch-up with breakthroughs in hypersonic weapons, anti-ship ballistic missiles, quantum communications, and military drones.

threats.zh: 台海局势、南海领土争端、中印边境冲突风险与美国对华军事围堵。
threats.en: Taiwan Strait tensions, South China Sea territorial disputes, India border conflict risks, and US military containment.

recentBattles.zh: 无近期大规模作战，但在台海与南海频繁进行军事演习，中印边境时有对峙。
recentBattles.en: No recent large-scale combat, but frequent military exercises around Taiwan and in the South China Sea, with periodic standoffs on the India border.

populationDescription.zh: 2023年被印度超越成为世界第二人口大国，出生率持续走低，老龄化加速。
populationDescription.en: Surpassed by India in 2023 as the world's most populous country, with a persistently low birth rate and accelerating aging.

ethnicGroups.zh: 汉族（91.1%）与55个少数民族
ethnicGroups.en: Han Chinese (91.1%) with 55 recognized ethnic minorities

socialClasses.zh: 党政精英、科技新贵、城市中产、工厂工人、农民工、农村居民构成社会阶层结构。
socialClasses.en: Party elites, tech nouveau riche, urban middle class, factory workers, migrant workers, and rural residents form the social class structure.

allies.zh: 俄罗斯（'无上限'伙伴关系）、巴基斯坦、朝鲜、伊朗、中亚国家与广大全球南方国家。
allies.en: Russia ('no-limits' partnership), Pakistan, DPRK, Iran, Central Asian states, and the broader Global South.

enemies.zh: 与美国处于战略竞争状态，与印度、日本、菲律宾存在领土争端。
enemies.en: In strategic competition with the US, with territorial disputes involving India, Japan, and the Philippines.

vassals.zh: 无正式附庸，但对朝鲜、缅甸、柬埔寨等周边国家具有显著影响力。
vassals.en: No formal vassals, but wields significant influence over neighboring states including North Korea, Myanmar, and Cambodia.

treaties.zh: 上海合作组织、RCEP、中俄睦邻友好合作条约、金砖国家机制。
treaties.en: Shanghai Cooperation Organisation (SCO), RCEP, Sino-Russian Treaty of Good-Neighborliness, BRICS.

foreignPolicy.zh: 推动构建人类命运共同体与多极化国际秩序，反对'脱钩断链'，深化一带一路合作。
foreignPolicy.en: Promoting a community with a shared future for mankind and a multipolar world order, opposing decoupling, and deepening Belt and Road cooperation.

recentDiplomaticEvents.zh: 2023年11月习拜旧金山会晤恢复高层对话；主办第三届一带一路峰会；推动金砖扩员。
recentDiplomaticEvents.en: November 2023 Xi-Biden San Francisco summit restored high-level dialogue; hosted the 3rd Belt and Road Forum; promoted BRICS expansion.

keyInnovations.zh: 大语言模型（文心一言、通义千问、豆包、DeepSeek、GLM、Kimi）、5G/6G通信、新能源电池与电动车、量子通信（墨子号）、北斗卫星导航、人形机器人与具身智能、光伏产业链、高铁技术输出。
keyInnovations.en: LLMs (ERNIE Bot, Tongyi Qianwen, Doubao, DeepSeek, GLM, Kimi), 5G/6G communications, NEV batteries and EVs, quantum communications (Micius satellite), BeiDou navigation, humanoid robots and embodied intelligence, solar PV supply chain, high-speed rail technology export.

infrastructure.zh: 全球最大5G网络（基站超330万座）、最长高铁网络（超4.2万公里）、AI算力中心快速扩建、全球最大可再生能源装机容量。
infrastructure.en: The world's largest 5G network (over 3.3 million base stations), longest high-speed rail network (over 42,000 km), rapidly expanding AI compute centers, and the world's largest renewable energy installed capacity.

semiconductors.zh: 半导体是中国科技最大短板与战略焦虑所在。华为海思被断供后，中芯国际（SMIC）以DUV光刻机实现7nm工艺突破（麒麟9000S），但良率和产能受限。长江存储在NAND Flash领域取得进展但遭美国制裁。国产EDA工具（华大九天等）尚处早期，无法替代Synopsys/Cadence。ASML EUV光刻机禁运构成长期瓶颈。中国在成熟制程（28nm及以上）产能全球第一，但先进制程（7nm以下）严重依赖突破。
semiconductors.en: Semiconductors remain China's greatest tech vulnerability and strategic anxiety. After Huawei HiSilicon was cut off, SMIC achieved a 7nm breakthrough (Kirin 9000S) using DUV lithography, but yield and capacity are constrained. Yangtze Memory made progress in NAND Flash but faces US sanctions. Domestic EDA tools (Empyrean etc.) are still early-stage, unable to replace Synopsys/Cadence. The ASML EUV lithography ban poses a long-term bottleneck. China leads globally in mature-node capacity (28nm+) but remains critically dependent on breakthroughs for advanced nodes (sub-7nm).

newEnergyVehicles.zh: 中国新能源汽车产业2023年全球领先：比亚迪超越特斯拉成为全球纯电销量冠军，全年新能源车销量近950万辆。宁德时代全球动力电池市场份额超36%。完整的锂电池-正负极材料-电驱系统供应链形成'中国优势'。蔚来、小鹏、理想、华为与赛力斯等构成多层竞争格局。自动驾驶方面，百度Apollo、小马智行获得商业化运营牌照。
newEnergyVehicles.en: China's NEV industry leads globally in 2023: BYD surpasses Tesla as the world's top pure-EV seller with nearly 9.5 million NEVs sold. CATL holds over 36% of the global power battery market. A complete lithium battery-materials-electric drive supply chain forms 'China's advantage.' NIO, XPeng, Li Auto, and Huawei-Seres create a multi-tier competitive landscape. In autonomous driving, Baidu Apollo and Pony.ai obtain commercial operation licenses.

solarAndCleanEnergy.zh: 中国主导全球光伏产业链：多晶硅产量占全球80%以上，隆基绿能、通威股份、晶科能源等企业掌控从硅料到组件的全产业链。2023年新增光伏装机超216GW，风电装机全球第一。核电方面，华龙一号出口巴基斯坦，第四代高温气冷堆示范工程投运。但煤炭仍占一次能源消费55%以上，能源转型任重道远。
solarAndCleanEnergy.en: China dominates the global solar PV supply chain: polysilicon production exceeds 80% of the world total; LONGi, Tongwei, JinkoSolar control the full chain from silicon to modules. Over 216 GW of new solar capacity was added in 2023, with wind installations also ranking first globally. In nuclear, the Hualong One reactor was exported to Pakistan and the fourth-gen HTR-PM demonstration plant entered operation. However, coal still accounts for over 55% of primary energy consumption, making the energy transition a long road ahead.

spaceAndAerospace.zh: 航天领域稳步推进：天宫空间站全面运营并开展常态化载人任务，嫦娥六号准备月球背面采样，北斗三号全球组网完成。商业航天起步迅速，蓝箭航天、星际荣耀等民营火箭公司开始入轨尝试。军事航空方面，歼-20隐身战机批量装备，但航空发动机（涡扇-15）仍是瓶颈。大飞机C919正式投入商业运营，但发动机和航电系统仍依赖西方供应商。
spaceAndAerospace.en: Steady progress in aerospace: Tiangong space station fully operational with routine crewed missions; Chang'e-6 prepares for far-side lunar sample return; BeiDou-3 global constellation complete. Commercial space develops rapidly with private rocket firms (LandSpace, iSpace) attempting orbital launches. In military aviation, the J-20 stealth fighter is deployed in quantity, but aero-engines (WS-15) remain a bottleneck. The C919 airliner enters commercial service, though its engines and avionics still rely on Western suppliers.

quantumTechnology.zh: 量子科技处于世界前列：量子通信领域，'墨子号'卫星实现全球首次千公里级量子密钥分发，京沪量子保密通信干线投入使用。量子计算方面，'九章'光量子计算机与'祖冲之'超导量子计算机在特定任务上展示量子优越性。中国科学技术大学潘建伟团队处于国际领先地位。
quantumTechnology.en: Quantum technology at the global forefront: in quantum communications, the Micius satellite achieved the world's first 1,000-km quantum key distribution, and the Beijing-Shanghai quantum secure communication backbone is operational. In quantum computing, Jiuzhang (photonic) and Zuchongzhi (superconducting) demonstrate quantum advantage on specific tasks. The team led by Pan Jianwei at USTC occupies a leading international position.

biotechAndPharma.zh: 生物医药快速追赶但原创药仍弱：恒瑞医药、百济神州等在创新药研发上投入加大，百济神州的泽布替尼成为首个在美获批的中国自主研发抗癌药。mRNA疫苗技术起步较晚。CRO/CDMO行业（药明康德、药明生物）深度融入全球医药供应链，但面临美国'生物安全法案'脱钩风险。基因编辑与合成生物学研究活跃。
biotechAndPharma.en: Rapid catch-up in biopharma but still weak in original drug innovation: Hengrui and BeiGene increase R&D investment; BeiGene's zanubrutinib becomes the first Chinese-developed cancer drug approved in the US. mRNA vaccine technology started late. CRO/CDMO firms (WuXi AppTec, WuXi Biologics) are deeply integrated into the global pharma supply chain but face decoupling risks from the US BIOSECURE Act. Gene editing and synthetic biology research are active.

embodiedIntelligence.zh: 具身智能是中国科技新兴最热赛道之一：优必选Walker S人形机器人进入汽车工厂实训，宇树科技的H1/G1在运动能力上媲美国际前沿，智元机器人获上汽等产业资本支持，傅利叶GR-1面向医疗康复与通用场景，银河通用获资本热捧。政策层面，工信部将人形机器人列为未来产业培育重点，北京、上海、深圳出台专项扶持政策。中国的优势在于完整的制造业供应链与巨大应用市场，劣势在于核心算法与高端传感器仍需突破。
embodiedIntelligence.en: Embodied intelligence is one of China's hottest emerging tech tracks: UBTECH's Walker S enters automotive factory training; Unitree's H1/G1 rivals international frontrunners in locomotion; Agibot receives backing from SAIC and other industrial investors; Fourier's GR-1 targets medical rehabilitation and general scenarios; Galbot attracts major venture capital. At the policy level, MIIT designates humanoid robots as a key future industry, with Beijing, Shanghai, and Shenzhen issuing dedicated support policies. China's advantages lie in its complete manufacturing supply chain and massive application market; weaknesses include core algorithms and high-end sensors still needing breakthroughs.

telecomAnd5G.zh: 5G/6G通信全球领先：华为、中兴通讯在5G专利与设备市场份额全球第一，尽管面临多国禁令。中国5G基站超330万座，覆盖所有地级市。6G研发已进入标准预研阶段。但受美国芯片制裁影响，华为5G手机芯片供应链面临持续压力。
telecomAnd5G.en: Global leader in 5G/6G communications: Huawei and ZTE rank first globally in 5G patents and equipment market share despite bans in multiple countries. China has over 3.3 million 5G base stations covering all prefecture-level cities. 6G R&D has entered the pre-standardization phase. However, Huawei's 5G handset chip supply chain faces sustained pressure from US chip sanctions.

overallAssessment.zh: 2023年的中国科技综合实力稳居全球第二，但呈现'应用强、基础弱、供应链有卡点'的特征。优势领域：1）5G通信与数字基础设施全球领先；2）新能源产业链（光伏、锂电、电动车）形成碾压性优势；3）AI应用层百花齐放，DeepSeek以低成本路线证明中国AI可走差异化道路；4）量子通信国际领先；5）具身智能产业快速崛起，具备制造业协同优势。短板领域：1）先进半导体制造受EUV光刻机禁运严重制约；2）航空发动机、高端医疗器械、科学仪器等'卡脖子'问题依然突出；3）基础科学原创性不足，诺贝尔科学奖零的突破尚未实现；4）AI内容监管可能抑制开放创新生态。总体而言，中国正从'跟跑'向'并跑'甚至部分'领跑'转变，但在基础科学与关键核心技术上的自主可控仍需时日。
overallAssessment.en: China's overall tech strength in 2023 firmly ranks second globally, but exhibits a pattern of 'strong in application, weak in fundamentals, with supply chain chokepoints.' Strengths: 1) 5G communications and digital infrastructure lead globally; 2) the new energy supply chain (solar, batteries, EVs) forms an overwhelming advantage; 3) AI application layer flourishes with DeepSeek's low-cost approach proving China can take a differentiated AI path; 4) quantum communications lead internationally; 5) the embodied intelligence industry rises rapidly with manufacturing synergy advantages. Weaknesses: 1) advanced semiconductor manufacturing is severely constrained by the EUV lithography ban; 2) 'chokepoint' issues persist in aero-engines, high-end medical devices, and scientific instruments; 3) insufficient basic science originality — no breakthrough in Nobel science prizes yet; 4) AI content regulation may suppress an open innovation ecosystem. Overall, China is transitioning from 'follower' to 'running alongside' and even 'leading' in some areas, but self-sufficiency in foundational science and critical core technologies still requires time.

policy.zh: 2017年发布《新一代人工智能发展规划》，目标2030年AI全球领先；实施严格内容监管，将AI发展列为国家战略优先。
policy.en: 2017 New Generation AI Development Plan targeting global AI leadership by 2030; strict content regulation enforced; AI designated as a national strategic priority.

regulatoryStance.zh: 全球最严格的AI内容监管体系之一，要求AI生成内容符合社会主义核心价值观，已出台深度伪造与算法推荐管理规定。
regulatoryStance.en: Among the world's strictest AI content regulatory regimes, requiring AI-generated content to align with socialist core values, with deepfake and algorithm recommendation rules already in force.

investmentScale.zh: 2023年AI投资约78亿美元，政府与国有企业投资占比高于美国。
investmentScale.en: Approximately $7.8 billion in AI investment in 2023, with a higher share from government and SOEs compared to the US.

capabilities.zh: 中文对话大语言模型，率先与ChatGPT竞争，深度整合百度搜索生态。
capabilities.en: Chinese conversational LLM, first to compete with ChatGPT, deeply integrated with Baidu's search ecosystem.

capabilities.zh: 与电商和云计算深度整合的大语言模型，服务阿里云客户生态。
capabilities.en: LLM deeply integrated with e-commerce and cloud computing, serving Alibaba Cloud's customer ecosystem.

capabilities.zh: 与短视频生态深度融合的大语言模型，嵌入抖音内容推荐系统。
capabilities.en: LLM deeply integrated with the short-video ecosystem, embedded in the Douyin content recommendation system.

capabilities.zh: 面向社交与企业场景优化的大语言模型，服务微信与腾讯云生态。
capabilities.en: LLM optimized for social and enterprise scenarios, serving the WeChat and Tencent Cloud ecosystem.

capabilities.zh: 以极低训练成本实现媲美GPT-4的性能，开源MoE架构引发全球关注，证明中国AI可走低成本高效率路线。
capabilities.en: Achieved GPT-4-level performance at extremely low training cost; its open-source MoE architecture drew global attention, proving China can pursue a low-cost high-efficiency AI path.

capabilities.zh: 基于清华大学技术的通用大语言模型系列，拥有ChatGLM对话模型与多模态能力，学术界影响力突出。
capabilities.en: General-purpose LLM family based on Tsinghua University technology, featuring ChatGLM conversational model and multimodal capabilities with strong academic influence.

capabilities.zh: 以超长上下文窗口为核心卖点的大语言模型，率先支持20万字输入，在长文本理解领域技术领先。
capabilities.en: LLM featuring ultra-long context windows as its core differentiator, pioneering 200K-character input support and leading in long-text comprehension.

capabilities.zh: 多模态大模型，在语音合成与虚拟角色对话方面具有独特优势，海螺AI为其代表产品。
capabilities.en: Multimodal large model with unique strengths in voice synthesis and virtual character interaction; Hailuo AI is its flagship product.

capabilities.zh: 以语音交互和教育场景见长的大语言模型，中文语音识别技术全球领先。
capabilities.en: LLM excelling in voice interaction and educational scenarios, with globally leading Chinese speech recognition technology.

capabilities.zh: 开源中文大语言模型，在中文基准测试中表现优异，创始团队来自前搜狗搜索。
capabilities.en: Open-source Chinese LLM with strong performance on Chinese benchmarks, founded by the former Sogou Search team.

capabilities.zh: 由李开复创办，开源双语大模型在全球多个榜单上表现突出，主打开源路线。
capabilities.en: Founded by Kai-Fu Lee, this open-source bilingual LLM achieved top rankings globally, championing the open-source approach.

keyProducts.zh: 文心一言、Apollo自动驾驶
keyProducts.en: ERNIE Bot, Apollo autonomous driving

keyProducts.zh: 通义千问、阿里云
keyProducts.en: Tongyi Qianwen, AliCloud

keyProducts.zh: 豆包、TikTok/抖音
keyProducts.en: Doubao, TikTok/Douyin

keyProducts.zh: 混元大模型、微信
keyProducts.en: Hunyuan LLM, WeChat

valuation.zh: 非上市公司，年营收约920亿美元

keyProducts.zh: 昇腾AI芯片、盘古大模型
keyProducts.en: Ascend AI chips, PanGu LLM

keyProducts.zh: 日日新大模型、计算机视觉平台
keyProducts.en: SenseNova LLM, computer vision platform

valuation.zh: 非上市，幻方量化旗下AI实验室
valuation.en: Unlisted, AI lab under High-Flyer quant fund

keyProducts.zh: DeepSeek-V2/V3、DeepSeek-R1推理模型
keyProducts.en: DeepSeek-V2/V3, DeepSeek-R1 reasoning model

keyProducts.zh: ChatGLM系列、GLM-4多模态模型
keyProducts.en: ChatGLM series, GLM-4 multimodal model

keyProducts.zh: Kimi智能助手、超长上下文模型
keyProducts.en: Kimi AI assistant, ultra-long context model

keyProducts.zh: 海螺AI、ABAB大模型、语音合成
keyProducts.en: Hailuo AI, ABAB large model, voice synthesis

keyProducts.zh: 星火大模型、智能语音交互系统
keyProducts.en: Spark LLM, intelligent voice interaction system

keyProducts.zh: 百川大模型系列（开源）
keyProducts.en: Baichuan LLM series (open-source)

keyProducts.zh: Yi系列开源大模型
keyProducts.en: Yi series open-source LLMs

keyProducts.zh: Step系列多模态大模型
keyProducts.en: Step series multimodal large models

valuation.en: Listed on HKEX in 2023, market cap ~HK$40 billion

keyProducts.zh: Walker系列人形机器人、Yanshee教育机器人
keyProducts.en: Walker humanoid robots, Yanshee education robots

keyProducts.zh: Go2四足机器人、H1/G1人形机器人
keyProducts.en: Go2 quadruped robot, H1/G1 humanoid robots

keyProducts.zh: 远征A系列通用人形机器人
keyProducts.en: Expedition-A series general-purpose humanoid robots

keyProducts.zh: GR系列通用人形机器人、康复机器人
keyProducts.en: GR series general-purpose humanoid robots, rehabilitation robots

keyProducts.zh: Galbot通用人形机器人、具身智能解决方案
keyProducts.en: Galbot general-purpose humanoid robots, embodied intelligence solutions

contribution.zh: 率先推出文心一言与ChatGPT竞争，推动百度全面转型AI公司。
contribution.en: First to launch ERNIE Bot to compete with ChatGPT, driving Baidu's comprehensive AI transformation.

contribution.zh: 创建TikTok/抖音AI推荐平台，构建全球最大短视频AI生态系统。
contribution.en: Created the TikTok/Douyin AI recommendation platform, building the world's largest short-video AI ecosystem.

contribution.zh: 在美国制裁下坚持自主研发AI芯片（昇腾系列），推动中国AI算力自主可控。
contribution.en: Persisted in independent AI chip R&D (Ascend series) under US sanctions, advancing China's AI compute self-sufficiency.

title.zh: 北京通用人工智能研究院院长
title.en: Director of BIGAI (Beijing Institute for General Artificial Intelligence)

affiliation.zh: 北京通用人工智能研究院

contribution.zh: 从事AGI基础研究，推动中国通用人工智能理论体系建设。
contribution.en: Conducts foundational AGI research, advancing China's theoretical framework for artificial general intelligence.

title.zh: 深度求索创始人、幻方量化创始人
title.en: Founder of DeepSeek and High-Flyer Capital Management

contribution.zh: 以量化基金资源投入AI研发，DeepSeek以极低成本训练出比肩GPT-4的模型，震动全球AI格局。
contribution.en: Channeled quant fund resources into AI R&D; DeepSeek trained a GPT-4-class model at drastically lower cost, shaking the global AI landscape.

title.zh: 智谱AI首席执行官、清华大学教授
title.en: CEO of Zhipu AI, Professor at Tsinghua University

contribution.zh: 将清华大学GLM技术产业化，创建ChatGLM系列模型，推动中国学术界与产业界深度合作。
contribution.en: Commercialized Tsinghua's GLM technology, created the ChatGLM model series, driving deep collaboration between Chinese academia and industry.

title.en: Founder and CEO of Moonshot AI

contribution.zh: 清华大学与卡内基梅隆校友，创建Kimi超长上下文模型，推动长文本理解技术突破。
contribution.en: Tsinghua and CMU alumnus, created the Kimi ultra-long context model, driving breakthroughs in long-text comprehension.

contribution.zh: 前商汤科技副总裁，创建MiniMax多模态AI平台，在语音合成与虚拟角色交互领域领先。
contribution.en: Former VP of SenseTime, founded MiniMax multimodal AI platform, leading in voice synthesis and virtual character interaction.

title.zh: 科大讯飞创始人兼董事长

contribution.zh: 二十余年深耕智能语音技术，推出星火大模型切入大模型竞赛，在教育与语音AI应用方面领先。
contribution.en: Over two decades of intelligent speech technology R&D, launched Spark LLM to enter the large model race, leading in education and voice AI applications.

title.en: Founder and CEO of Baichuan Inc.

contribution.zh: 前搜狗CEO，创立百川智能走开源大模型路线，在中文自然语言处理方面表现突出。
contribution.en: Former CEO of Sogou, founded Baichuan pursuing the open-source LLM path, excelling in Chinese NLP.

title.zh: 零一万物创始人、创新工场CEO
title.en: Founder of 01.AI, CEO of Sinovation Ventures

contribution.zh: 前Google中国总裁，创立零一万物推出Yi系列开源模型，推动AI全球化与创业投资生态。
contribution.en: Former President of Google China, founded 01.AI launching the Yi open-source model series, promoting AI globalization and venture investment ecosystem.

contribution.zh: 前微软亚洲研究院副院长，创建阶跃星辰专注多模态大模型研发。
contribution.en: Former VP of Microsoft Research Asia, founded StepFun focusing on multimodal large model R&D.

researchFocus.zh: 大语言模型优化、AI芯片自主研发、多模态AI、智慧城市、自动驾驶、人形机器人与具身智能。
researchFocus.en: LLM optimization, AI chip self-sufficiency, multimodal AI, smart cities, autonomous driving, humanoid robots and embodied intelligence.

computeInfrastructure.zh: 国产算力中心建设加速，华为昇腾910B部分替代NVIDIA GPU，但受美国出口管制限制高端芯片获取。
computeInfrastructure.en: Domestic compute center construction accelerating, with Huawei Ascend 910B partially substituting NVIDIA GPUs, but US export controls restrict access to high-end chips.

talentPool.zh: AI论文发表数量全球领先，海外科学家加速回流，但顶尖原创人才相对稀缺。
talentPool.en: Leads globally in AI paper publications with returning overseas scientists, but relatively scarce in top original research talent.

globalRanking.zh: 全球AI综合实力第二，在应用规模、数据量与政府支持方面领先，在基础模型与高端芯片方面落后。
globalRanking.en: Ranked #2 globally in overall AI strength, leading in application scale, data volume, and government support, but trailing in foundational models and high-end chips.

outlook.zh: 在国家战略支持下AI快速发展，但芯片制裁、人口下降与经济放缓构成制约，若突破芯片瓶颈可能在特定应用领域实现领先。
outlook.en: Rapid AI development under state support, but constrained by chip sanctions, population decline, and economic slowdown; may lead in specific application domains if the chip bottleneck is broken.

strengths.zh: 海量数据与14亿人口应用市场、强有力的国家AI与科技战略、新能源全产业链碾压性优势（光伏/锂电/电动车）、5G基础设施全球领先、完整的制造业体系与供应链协同、AI大模型百花齐放呈现差异化竞争力、量子通信国际领先、具身智能产业快速崛起。
strengths.en: Vast data and 1.4-billion application market, strong national AI and tech strategy, overwhelming new energy supply chain advantage (solar/batteries/EVs), globally leading 5G infrastructure, complete manufacturing system with supply chain synergy, diverse LLM ecosystem showing differentiated competitiveness, internationally leading quantum communications, rapidly rising embodied intelligence industry.

weaknesses.zh: 先进半导体受EUV光刻机禁运严重制约、航空发动机与高端科学仪器等'卡脖子'问题突出、基础科学原创性不足（诺贝尔科学奖零突破）、房地产危机与地方债务风险、人口负增长与老龄化加速、严格AI内容监管可能抑制开放创新生态、顶尖原创人才相对稀缺。
weaknesses.en: Advanced semiconductors severely constrained by EUV lithography ban, prominent 'chokepoint' issues in aero-engines and high-end scientific instruments, insufficient basic science originality (no Nobel science prize breakthrough), property crisis and local government debt risks, negative population growth and accelerating aging, strict AI content regulation may suppress open innovation ecosystem, relatively scarce top original research talent.

outlook.zh: 作为全球科技第二极，中国正从'跟跑'向'并跑'甚至部分'领跑'转变。若突破芯片瓶颈并保持新能源与AI应用优势，可能在多个细分领域实现领先。但基础科学原创力与核心技术自主可控仍是长期挑战。
outlook.en: As the global tech second pole, China is transitioning from 'follower' to 'running alongside' and even 'leading' in some areas. If it breaks through the chip bottleneck and maintains advantages in new energy and applied AI, it may lead in multiple sub-sectors. But foundational science originality and core technology self-sufficiency remain long-term challenges.

description.zh: 2023年的中国是全球AI领域的第二大力量，百度、阿里、字节跳动、华为等巨头与DeepSeek、智谱AI、月之暗面等新锐大模型公司共同推动大模型竞赛，优必选、宇树科技等引领具身智能赛道，但面临美国芯片制裁与经济放缓的双重压力。
description.en: China in 2023 is the second-largest force in global AI, with giants like Baidu, Alibaba, ByteDance, and Huawei joined by emerging LLM startups DeepSeek, Zhipu AI, and Moonshot AI in driving the LLM race, while UBTECH and Unitree lead the embodied intelligence track, all under dual pressures from US chip sanctions and economic slowdown.

leaderTitle.zh: 中共中央总书记、国家主席、中央军委主席
leaderTitle.en: General Secretary of the CPC, President, CMC Chairman

ideology.zh: 中国特色社会主义、习近平新时代中国特色社会主义思想
ideology.en: Socialism with Chinese Characteristics, Xi Jinping Thought

relationship.zh: 执政党，领导国家一切工作。
relationship.en: Ruling party, leads all national affairs.

description.zh: 2022年二十大后习近平开启第三任期，党的领导全面加强。2023年推进中国式现代化建设，在人工智能、新能源等领域加大投入，应对房地产风险与经济下行压力，深化对外「一带一路」合作，同时面临中美关系紧张和地缘政治博弈加剧等挑战。
description.en: After the 20th Party Congress in 2022, Xi began his third term with consolidated authority. In 2023, the CPC advanced Chinese-style modernization, investing heavily in AI and new energy while managing real-estate risks and economic headwinds amid escalating US-China tensions.

leaderTitle.en: Chairman of the CDL Central Committee

ideology.zh: 社会主义、民主协商

relationship.zh: 参政党，接受中共领导，参与政治协商。
relationship.en: Participating party under CPC leadership, engaged in political consultation.

description.zh: 中国八个民主党派中成员最多的参政党，主要由文化教育和科技界知识分子组成。在中国共产党领导的多党合作和政治协商制度下参政议政，2023年重点围绕教育改革、科技创新和生态文明建设建言献策，发挥民主监督职能。
description.en: The largest of China's eight participating parties, composed mainly of intellectuals from education, culture, and science. Under the CPC-led multiparty cooperation system, the CDL contributes policy proposals on education reform, technological innovation, and ecological development.

leaderTitle.en: Chairman of the CDNCA Central Committee

ideology.zh: 社会主义、经济建设

relationship.zh: 参政党，接受中共领导，参与政治协商。
relationship.en: Participating party under CPC leadership, engaged in political consultation.

description.zh: 主要由经济界人士组成的参政党，与工商联关系密切。在多党合作制度框架下围绕民营经济发展、营商环境优化和金融监管改革等议题参政议政，2023年重点关注促进民营企业信心恢复和高质量发展等经济议题。
description.en: A participating party mainly composed of business and economic professionals, closely linked to the All-China Federation of Industry and Commerce. It advises on private sector development and financial reform, focusing in 2023 on restoring private enterprise confidence and promoting high-quality growth.

name.zh: 中国国民党革命委员会
name.en: Revolutionary Committee of the Chinese Kuomintang

leaderTitle.en: Chairman of the RCCK Central Committee

ideology.zh: 爱国统一战线、促进祖国统一
ideology.en: Patriotic united front, promoting national reunification

relationship.zh: 参政党，接受中共领导，参与政治协商。
relationship.en: Participating party under CPC leadership, engaged in political consultation.

description.zh: 民革以同原中国国民党有关系的人士、同台湾各界有联系的人士和社会法制界人士为主体。2023年在郑建邦主席领导下，重点围绕祖国统一、社会治理与法治建设、乡村振兴等议题参政议政，积极促进两岸融合发展。
description.en: The RCCK draws members from those historically connected to the KMT, people with ties to Taiwan, and legal professionals. Under Chairman Zheng Jianbang in 2023, it focuses on national reunification, social governance and rule of law, and rural revitalization, actively promoting cross-strait integrated development.

leaderTitle.en: Chairman of the CAPD Central Committee

ideology.zh: 教育文化出版事业发展

relationship.zh: 参政党，接受中共领导，参与政治协商。
relationship.en: Participating party under CPC leadership, engaged in political consultation.

description.zh: 民进以从事教育文化出版和科技工作的高中级知识分子为主体。2023年在蔡达峰主席领导下，重点围绕基础教育均衡发展、文化传承创新、出版业数字化转型等议题参政议政，积极推动教育公平与文化强国建设。
description.en: The CAPD draws members mainly from senior and mid-level intellectuals in education, culture, publishing, and science. Under Chairman Cai Dafeng in 2023, it focuses on balanced basic education development, cultural heritage innovation, digital transformation of publishing, and promotes educational equity and cultural strength.

name.en: Chinese Peasants' and Workers' Democratic Party

leaderTitle.en: Chairman of the CPWDP Central Committee

ideology.zh: 医疗卫生、人口与生态环境

relationship.zh: 参政党，接受中共领导，参与政治协商。
relationship.en: Participating party under CPC leadership, engaged in political consultation.

description.zh: 农工党以医药卫生、人口资源和生态环境领域的高中级知识分子为主体。2023年在何维主席领导下，重点围绕健康中国建设、公共卫生体系完善、生态文明与「双碳」目标落实等议题参政议政，在后疫情时代的公共卫生政策制定中发挥重要咨询作用。
description.en: The CPWDP draws members mainly from senior intellectuals in healthcare, population resources, and ecology. Under Chairman He Wei in 2023, it focuses on Healthy China initiatives, public health system improvement, and ecological civilization and carbon neutrality goals, playing an important consultative role in post-pandemic public health policymaking.

leaderTitle.en: Chairman of the CZGP Central Committee

ideology.zh: 侨务工作、海外联络、科技创新
ideology.en: Overseas Chinese affairs, international liaison, scientific innovation

relationship.zh: 参政党，接受中共领导，参与政治协商。
relationship.en: Participating party under CPC leadership, engaged in political consultation.

description.zh: 致公党以归侨侨眷中的中上层人士和其他有海外关系的代表性人士为主体。2023年在蒋作君主席领导下，重点围绕引进海外高层次人才、推动科技国际合作、促进粤港澳大湾区建设等议题参政议政，在国际人才竞争与科技自立自强中发挥独特桥梁作用。
description.en: The CZGP draws members from upper and middle-level returned overseas Chinese and people with overseas connections. Under Chairman Jiang Zuojun in 2023, it focuses on attracting high-level overseas talent, promoting international scientific cooperation, and advancing the Greater Bay Area, serving as a unique bridge in global talent competition and technological self-reliance.

leaderTitle.en: Chairman of the Jiusan Society Central Committee

ideology.zh: 民主与科学、科技创新

relationship.zh: 参政党，接受中共领导，参与政治协商。
relationship.en: Participating party under CPC leadership, engaged in political consultation.

description.zh: 九三学社以科学技术界高中级知识分子为主体，社员中两院院士比例在各民主党派中最高。2023年在武维华主席领导下，重点围绕科技体制改革、基础研究投入、人工智能伦理治理和关键核心技术攻关等议题参政议政，在科技决策咨询中发挥重要作用。
description.en: The Jiusan Society draws members from senior science and technology intellectuals, with the highest proportion of Chinese Academy members among all participating parties. Under Chairman Wu Weihua in 2023, it focuses on science system reform, basic research investment, AI ethics governance, and key technology breakthroughs, playing an important role in science and technology policy consultation.

leaderTitle.en: Chairwoman of the TDSL Central Committee

ideology.zh: 促进祖国统一、维护台胞权益
ideology.en: Promoting national reunification, protecting Taiwan compatriots' rights

relationship.zh: 参政党，接受中共领导，参与政治协商。
relationship.en: Participating party under CPC leadership, engaged in political consultation.

description.zh: 台盟是八个民主党派中规模最小的，由居住在祖国大陆的台湾省籍人士组成。2023年在苏辉主席领导下，重点围绕推动两岸融合发展、深化两岸经济文化交流合作、维护台湾同胞合法权益等议题参政议政，在促进祖国和平统一进程中发挥独特作用。
description.en: The TDSL is the smallest of the eight participating parties, composed of people of Taiwanese origin residing in mainland China. Under Chairwoman Su Hui in 2023, it focuses on promoting cross-strait integrated development, deepening economic and cultural exchanges, and protecting Taiwan compatriots' rights, playing a unique role in advancing peaceful reunification.

description.zh: 2000年的法国是欧盟核心推动力量，希拉克总统领导下积极推进欧洲一体化与独立外交路线。
description.en: France in 2000 was a core EU driving force, actively advancing European integration and independent diplomacy under President Chirac.

governmentForm.zh: 半总统制共和国
governmentForm.en: Semi-presidential republic

socialStructure.zh: 高度城市化的后工业社会，中产阶级为主体
socialStructure.en: Highly urbanized post-industrial society, middle class dominant

rulingClass.zh: 民选政治精英、国家高级官僚（ENA）、产业与金融领袖
rulingClass.en: Elected politicians, senior state bureaucracy (ENA), industrial and financial leaders

succession.zh: 总统直选（七年任期，2002年改为五年）+ 议会选举
succession.en: Direct presidential election (7-year term, changed to 5 in 2002) + parliamentary elections

structure.zh: 总统/总理/国民议会/参议院/宪法委员会
structure.en: President / PM / National Assembly / Senate / Constitutional Council

function.zh: 警务、治安、地方行政
function.en: Policing, public order, local administration

function.zh: 军事防务与核威慑
function.en: Military defense and nuclear deterrent

function.zh: 财政、税收、经济政策
function.en: Finance, taxation, economic policy

function.zh: 外交关系、法语非洲、欧盟事务
function.en: Foreign relations, Francophone Africa, EU affairs

function.zh: 公立教育体系管理
function.en: Public education system management

localAdmin.zh: 大区-省-市镇三级行政，中央集权传统

legalSystem.zh: 大陆法系，拿破仑法典传统，宪法委员会违宪审查
legalSystem.en: Civil law, Napoleonic tradition, Constitutional Council review

taxationSystem.zh: 增值税、所得税、社会保险缴款、企业税
taxationSystem.en: VAT, income tax, social security contributions, corporate tax

religion.zh: 天主教传统，政教分离（laïcité）原则

philosophy.zh: 启蒙理性主义、共和主义、人权宣言传统
philosophy.en: Enlightenment rationalism, republicanism, Declaration of Rights tradition

culturalAchievements.zh: 文学、哲学、电影、时尚、美食在全球影响深远
culturalAchievements.en: Global influence in literature, philosophy, cinema, fashion, gastronomy

languageFamily.zh: 印欧语系罗曼语族

gdpDescription.zh: 2000年法国GDP约1.33万亿美元，世界第五大经济体，工业、服务业与农业均发达
gdpDescription.en: France's GDP ~$1.33T in 2000, world's 5th largest economy, with advanced industry, services, and agriculture

mainIndustries.zh: 航空航天、汽车、奢侈品、核能、农业、旅游、金融
mainIndustries.en: Aerospace, automotive, luxury goods, nuclear energy, agriculture, tourism, finance

economicSystem.zh: 国家干预色彩较强的混合市场经济
economicSystem.en: Mixed market economy with significant state intervention

fiscalPolicy.zh: 高税收、高支出的福利国家模式
fiscalPolicy.en: High-tax, high-spending welfare state model

technology.zh: 核武器（潜射+空基）、阵风战斗机、航母戴高乐号
technology.en: Nuclear weapons (SLBM + air-based), Rafale fighters, carrier Charles de Gaulle

allies.zh: 欧盟成员国、北约成员国、美国、法语非洲国家
allies.en: EU members, NATO members, US, Francophone African countries

foreignPolicy.zh: 欧洲一体化核心推动者、法语非洲影响力、独立外交传统
foreignPolicy.en: Core EU integration driver, Francophone African influence, independent diplomatic tradition

keyInnovations.zh: 空客航空航天、核能技术、TGV高速铁路、阿丽亚娜火箭
keyInnovations.en: Airbus aerospace, nuclear technology, TGV, Ariane rockets

strengths.zh: 独立核威慑、航空航天工业、文化软实力、欧盟核心地位
strengths.en: Independent nuclear deterrent, aerospace, cultural soft power, core EU status

weaknesses.zh: 劳动力市场僵化、社会矛盾、财政赤字
weaknesses.en: Labor market rigidity, social tensions, fiscal deficits

outlook.zh: 欧元启动将进一步深化法国在欧洲经济中的核心作用
outlook.en: Euro launch will further deepen France's core role in European economy

ideology.zh: 社会民主主义

relationship.zh: 在左翼共治格局下掌控政府，与总统希拉克的共治关系既是合作又存在权力博弈。社会党主导立法与内政议程，推行35小时工作制等标志性改革。
relationship.en: Controlled the government under cohabitation, sharing power with President Chirac in a relationship of cooperation and rivalry. The Socialists set the legislative and domestic agenda, implementing landmark reforms such as the 35-hour work week.

description.zh: 法国社会党是法国主要左翼政党，1969年由旧工人国际法国支部改组而成。在若斯潘领导下推行社会民主改革，标志性政策包括35小时工作周。2000年时社会党掌握国民议会多数并主导政府，但需与右翼总统希拉克共处共治框架。党的基层支持主要来自工会、公务员和城市知识阶层。
description.en: The French Socialist Party was the main left-wing party, reorganized in 1969 from the old SFIO. Under Jospin it pursued social-democratic reforms, notably the 35-hour work week. In 2000 the party held a National Assembly majority and led the government but had to coexist with right-wing President Chirac under cohabitation. Its grassroots support came from unions, civil servants, and urban intellectuals.

role.zh: 政府首脑，推行35小时工作制与就业政策
role.en: Head of government, implementing the 35-hour work week and employment policy

role.zh: 35小时工作制法案主要推动者
role.en: Chief architect of the 35-hour work week legislation

ideology.zh: 戴高乐主义

relationship.zh: 希拉克以总统身份掌握外交与国防主导权，但在共治体制下被迫与左翼政府分享权力。RPR与社会党之间的紧张关系贯穿整个共治时期，双方在经济政策和欧洲事务上分歧明显。
relationship.en: Chirac wielded presidential authority over foreign affairs and defense but was forced to share power with the left-wing government under cohabitation. Tensions between the RPR and the Socialists pervaded the entire period, with clear disagreements on economic policy and European affairs.

description.zh: 保卫共和联盟是法国主要右翼政党，继承戴高乐主义传统，1976年由希拉克创立。2000年时希拉克虽为总统但因议会失利而处于共治困境，党在地方层面仍有强大基础。RPR正酝酿与法国民主联盟合并组建更大的右翼政党联盟（后来的人民运动联盟UMP）。党的支持基础主要是保守中产阶级、企业界和农村选民。
description.en: The RPR was France's main right-wing party, heir to the Gaullist tradition, founded by Chirac in 1976. In 2000 Chirac was president but trapped in cohabitation after losing parliamentary elections. The RPR retained a strong local base and was preparing a merger with the UDF to form a broader right-wing alliance (later the UMP). Its support base was mainly conservative middle classes, business circles, and rural voters.

role.zh: 国家元首，主导外交与国防政策
role.en: Head of state, leading foreign affairs and defense policy

role.zh: 党务领导与组织协调
role.en: Party leadership and organizational coordination

ideology.zh: 极右翼民族主义

relationship.zh: 国民阵线被主流左右翼政党共同排斥，处于'共和阵线'封锁之外。尽管无法进入执政联盟，但其在移民、安全和欧洲一体化议题上的立场对选举格局产生持续冲击。
relationship.en: The National Front was shunned by both mainstream left and right parties through the 'republican front' cordon. Though excluded from governing coalitions, its positions on immigration, security, and European integration continually disrupted the electoral landscape.

description.zh: 国民阵线由让-马里·勒庞于1972年创立，是法国极右翼代表性政党。主张强硬反移民、反欧盟一体化和法国优先政策。2000年时虽无议会实权但选举影响力不断上升，已在地方选举中取得突破。勒庞的煽动性言论和争议立场使其成为法国政治中最具争议性的人物之一。该党正为2002年总统大选蓄力，将震惊法国政坛。
description.en: The National Front was founded by Jean-Marie Le Pen in 1972 as France's flagship far-right party. It advocated hardline anti-immigration, anti-EU integration, and France-first policies. In 2000 it held no real parliamentary power but its electoral influence was rising steadily, having achieved breakthroughs in local elections. Le Pen's inflammatory rhetoric and controversial positions made him one of the most polarizing figures in French politics. The party was building momentum for the 2002 presidential election, which would shock the French political establishment.

role.zh: 创党领袖与极右翼运动核心人物
role.en: Founding leader and central figure of the far-right movement

role.zh: 1999年分裂后另立门户，削弱了国民阵线内部团结
role.en: Split in 1999 to form a rival party, weakening FN internal unity

description.zh: 2000年的德国是欧洲最大经济体，统一十年后正在推进结构改革与欧洲一体化。
description.en: Germany in 2000 was Europe's largest economy, pursuing structural reforms and European integration a decade after reunification.

governmentForm.zh: 议会制联邦共和国
governmentForm.en: Parliamentary federal republic

socialStructure.zh: 统一后东西差距仍存的工业化社会
socialStructure.en: Industrialized society with persisting East-West divide after reunification

rulingClass.zh: 政党政治精英、产业资本集团、工会领袖、联邦州长
rulingClass.en: Party politicians, industrial groups, union leaders, state premiers

succession.zh: 联邦议院选举产生总理
succession.en: Chancellor elected by Bundestag

structure.zh: 联邦总统/联邦总理/联邦议院/联邦参议院/联邦宪法法院
structure.en: President / Chancellor / Bundestag / Bundesrat / Federal Constitutional Court

function.zh: 税收与预算
function.en: Taxation and budget

function.zh: 军事防务
function.en: Military defense

function.zh: 外交政策与欧盟事务
function.en: Foreign policy and EU affairs

function.zh: 内务与安全
function.en: Internal affairs and security

localAdmin.zh: 16个联邦州拥有广泛立法与行政权
localAdmin.en: 16 Länder with extensive legislative and executive authority

legalSystem.zh: 大陆法系，联邦宪法法院拥有强大的违宪审查权
legalSystem.en: Civil law, Federal Constitutional Court with strong judicial review

taxationSystem.zh: 所得税、增值税、团结附加税、教会税、社会保险
taxationSystem.en: Income tax, VAT, solidarity surcharge, church tax, social insurance

philosophy.zh: 康德与黑格尔传统、社会市场经济理念
philosophy.en: Kantian and Hegelian tradition, social market economy philosophy

culturalAchievements.zh: 古典音乐、哲学、工程学、柏林文化复兴
culturalAchievements.en: Classical music, philosophy, engineering, Berlin cultural renaissance

languageFamily.zh: 印欧语系日耳曼语族

gdpDescription.zh: 欧洲最大、世界第三大经济体，出口导向型工业强国，统一后东部重建仍在进行
gdpDescription.en: Europe's largest, world's 3rd largest economy, export-oriented industrial powerhouse, eastern reconstruction ongoing

mainIndustries.zh: 汽车制造、机械工程、化工、电子、钢铁、金融
mainIndustries.en: Automotive, mechanical engineering, chemicals, electronics, steel, finance

economicSystem.zh: 社会市场经济（Soziale Marktwirtschaft）
economicSystem.en: Social market economy (Soziale Marktwirtschaft)

fiscalPolicy.zh: 统一成本仍在消化，推进预算整顿
fiscalPolicy.en: Still absorbing reunification costs, pursuing budget consolidation

technology.zh: 北约标准化装备，豹2坦克、台风战斗机

allies.zh: 北约成员国、欧盟成员国、美国、法国（欧洲核心伙伴）
allies.en: NATO, EU, US, France (core European partner)

foreignPolicy.zh: 多边主义、欧洲一体化核心推动者、大西洋合作
foreignPolicy.en: Multilateralism, core EU integration driver, Atlantic cooperation

keyInnovations.zh: 汽车工程、精密机械、化工技术、SAP企业软件
keyInnovations.en: Automotive engineering, precision machinery, chemical technology, SAP enterprise software

strengths.zh: 世界级制造业与出口、强大工程基础、欧盟核心地位
strengths.en: World-class manufacturing/exports, strong engineering base, core EU status

weaknesses.zh: 东部重建负担、劳动力市场僵化、人口老龄化
weaknesses.en: Eastern reconstruction burden, labor market rigidity, aging population

outlook.zh: 施罗德改革有望释放经济活力，欧元启动将深化德国的欧洲经济领导力
outlook.en: Schröder reforms may unleash economic vitality, euro launch will deepen Germany's European economic leadership

ideology.zh: 社会民主主义

relationship.zh: 执政联盟主导党，与绿党和自民党组成红绿灯联盟。
relationship.en: Lead party of the ruling traffic-light coalition with Greens and FDP.

description.zh: 朔尔茨2021年组建红绿灯联盟执政。2023年面临俄乌战争后的能源危机余波、经济衰退压力和联盟内部分歧加剧，支持率持续低迷。
description.en: Scholz formed the traffic-light coalition in 2021. In 2023 it grappled with energy crisis aftershocks, recession, and deepening coalition infighting while suffering low poll numbers.

name.zh: 基督教民主联盟/基督教社会联盟

ideology.zh: 基督教民主主义、中间偏右

relationship.zh: 最大反对党，民调领先。
relationship.en: Largest opposition party, leading in polls.

description.zh: 默克尔时代结束后默茨带领CDU/CSU重回保守路线，2023年作为最大反对党在民调中大幅领先，被普遍视为下届联邦大选热门胜选者。
description.en: After the Merkel era, Merz steered CDU/CSU back to a conservative course. Leading polls by wide margins in 2023, it was widely expected to win the next federal election.

leader.zh: 爱丽丝·魏德尔 / 蒂诺·克鲁帕拉

ideology.zh: 右翼民粹主义、民族保守主义

relationship.zh: 极右翼反对党，被其他政党联合排斥。
relationship.en: Far-right opposition, excluded by all other parties.

description.zh: 2023年支持率飙升至历史新高（约20%以上），在东部多个州民调中位居第一。部分州党部被宪法保护局列为极端主义嫌疑观察对象，所有主流政党均拒绝与其合作。
description.en: Surged to record poll highs (above 20%) in 2023, leading in several eastern states. Parts under domestic intelligence surveillance; all mainstream parties maintain a cordon sanitaire.

description.zh: 2000年的荷兰是高度开放的贸易国家，欧盟创始成员，鹿特丹港为欧洲门户。
description.en: The Netherlands in 2000 was a highly open trading nation, EU founding member, with Rotterdam as Europe's gateway port.

governmentForm.zh: 议会制君主立宪制
governmentForm.en: Parliamentary constitutional monarchy

socialStructure.zh: 共识政治（polder model）下的富裕贸易社会
socialStructure.en: Affluent trading society under consensus politics (polder model)

rulingClass.zh: 联合政府政治家、贸易与金融精英
rulingClass.en: Coalition politicians, trade and financial elite

succession.zh: 议会选举组阁
succession.en: Parliamentary coalition formation

structure.zh: 女王/首相/二院制议会
structure.en: Queen / PM / Bicameral Parliament

taxationSystem.zh: 所得税、增值税、企业税
taxationSystem.en: Income tax, VAT, corporate tax

religion.zh: 新教与天主教并存，世俗化

philosophy.zh: 自由主义、包容传统
philosophy.en: Liberalism, tolerance tradition

culturalAchievements.zh: 黄金时代绘画传统、设计创新
culturalAchievements.en: Golden Age painting tradition, design innovation

languageFamily.zh: 印欧语系日耳曼语族

gdpDescription.zh: 高度开放的贸易经济体，鹿特丹港为欧洲最大港口
gdpDescription.en: Highly open trading economy, Rotterdam as Europe's largest port

mainIndustries.zh: 石油化工、食品加工、电子、物流贸易、金融
mainIndustries.en: Petrochemicals, food processing, electronics, logistics, finance

economicSystem.zh: 开放市场经济
economicSystem.en: Open market economy

allies.zh: 北约与欧盟成员国、美国

foreignPolicy.zh: 多边主义、自由贸易、国际法治
foreignPolicy.en: Multilateralism, free trade, international rule of law

strengths.zh: 欧洲物流枢纽、高度开放创新经济
strengths.en: Europe's logistics hub, highly open innovative economy

weaknesses.zh: 国土面积小、低地国家气候脆弱性
weaknesses.en: Small territory, low-country climate vulnerability

outlook.zh: 欧元启动与EU扩大将进一步增强荷兰的贸易枢纽地位
outlook.en: Euro launch and EU enlargement will further strengthen Dutch trade hub status

name.en: People's Party for Freedom and Democracy (VVD)

ideology.zh: 自由保守主义

relationship.zh: 看守政府主导党，联合政府2023年7月因移民政策分歧倒台。
relationship.en: Lead party of the caretaker government after the coalition collapsed in July 2023 over migration policy.

description.zh: 吕特执政13年后联合政府因移民政策分歧倒台，2023年11月大选中VVD遭遇重大失利，极右翼PVV意外大胜，荷兰政治格局剧变。
description.en: After Rutte's 13-year tenure, the coalition collapsed over migration policy. VVD suffered major losses in the November 2023 election as the far-right PVV scored a shock victory, reshaping Dutch politics.

ideology.zh: 右翼民粹主义、反伊斯兰

relationship.zh: 2023年11月大选最大赢家，正在组阁谈判中。
relationship.en: Biggest winner of the November 2023 election, in coalition formation talks.

description.zh: 维尔德斯领导的PVV在2023年11月大选中意外获得37席成为第一大党，以反移民和反伊斯兰立场吸引大量选民，正主导艰难的组阁谈判。
description.en: Wilders' PVV shocked the nation by winning 37 seats in the November 2023 election, becoming the largest party on anti-immigration and anti-Islam platforms, leading difficult coalition talks.

ideology.zh: 社会自由主义、进步主义

relationship.zh: 前联合政府成员，2023年大选后席位大幅缩水。
relationship.en: Former coalition member, seats drastically reduced after the 2023 election.

description.zh: D66作为前联合政府中的进步派力量，在2023年大选中遭遇惨败，从24席缩减至9席，反映了荷兰选民对进步自由主义政党的失望。
description.en: As the progressive force in the former coalition, D66 suffered a devastating loss in the 2023 election, dropping from 24 to 9 seats, reflecting voter disillusionment with progressive liberal parties.

description.zh: 2000年的比利时是欧盟与北约总部所在地，语言社区分裂但在欧洲事务中发挥关键枢纽作用。
description.en: Belgium in 2000 hosted EU and NATO headquarters, linguistically divided but playing a key hub role in European affairs.

governmentForm.zh: 联邦议会制君主立宪制
governmentForm.en: Federal parliamentary constitutional monarchy

socialStructure.zh: 荷语区、法语区、德语区三社区联邦制社会
socialStructure.en: Three-community federation: Flemish, French, German-speaking

rulingClass.zh: 联合政府政治家、欧盟机构官僚
rulingClass.en: Coalition politicians, EU institutional bureaucracy

succession.zh: 议会选举组阁，王位世袭
succession.en: Parliamentary coalition, hereditary monarchy

structure.zh: 国王/首相/联邦议会/社区与大区政府
structure.en: King / PM / Federal Parliament / Community and Regional governments

localAdmin.zh: 三社区三大区复杂联邦制

legalSystem.zh: 大陆法系，受法国法传统影响
legalSystem.en: Civil law, influenced by French legal tradition

taxationSystem.zh: 高税率体系
taxationSystem.en: High tax rate system

culturalAchievements.zh: 超现实主义艺术、漫画传统、巧克力与啤酒
culturalAchievements.en: Surrealism, comics tradition, chocolate and beer

languageFamily.zh: 日耳曼语族与罗曼语族

mainIndustries.zh: 化工、钻石加工、物流、金融、食品
mainIndustries.en: Chemicals, diamond processing, logistics, finance, food

economicSystem.zh: 开放市场经济
economicSystem.en: Open market economy

allies.zh: 北约与欧盟总部所在国

foreignPolicy.zh: 欧洲一体化核心推动者
foreignPolicy.en: Core European integration driver

strengths.zh: 欧盟与北约总部的政治影响力、安特卫普港
strengths.en: EU/NATO HQ political influence, Port of Antwerp

weaknesses.zh: 语言社区分裂的政治复杂性
weaknesses.en: Political complexity from linguistic divisions

outlook.zh: 作为欧洲首都的地位确保持续影响力
outlook.en: Status as European capital ensures continued influence

name.zh: 开放弗拉芒自由民主党
name.en: Open Flemish Liberals and Democrats (Open VLD)

ideology.zh: 自由主义

relationship.zh: 七党联合政府（维维尔迪联盟）的首相所属党。
relationship.en: PM's party in the seven-party Vivaldi coalition government.

description.zh: 德克罗领导维维尔迪七党联盟执政，2023年面临能源转型、移民政策和联邦制改革等挑战，各党派在语言社区利益上的分歧使施政艰难。
description.en: De Croo leads the seven-party Vivaldi coalition, facing challenges on energy transition, migration, and federal reform in 2023, with linguistic community divisions complicating governance.

ideology.zh: 弗拉芒民族主义、保守主义

relationship.zh: 弗拉芒地区最大党，联邦层面最大反对党。
relationship.en: Largest party in Flanders, largest federal opposition party.

description.zh: N-VA主张弗拉芒更大自治权甚至联邦制改革，2023年在弗拉芒地区民调领先，为2024年大选积极备战，批评联合政府的财政和移民政策。
description.en: N-VA advocates greater Flemish autonomy and federal reform. Leading Flemish polls in 2023, it actively prepared for the 2024 election while criticizing the coalition's fiscal and migration policies.

ideology.zh: 右翼民粹主义、弗拉芒独立

relationship.zh: 极右翼反对党，被所有主流政党组成'防疫封锁线'排斥。
relationship.en: Far-right opposition, excluded by all mainstream parties through a cordon sanitaire.

description.zh: 弗拉芒利益党主张弗拉芒独立和严格反移民政策，2023年民调持续走高，但所有主流政党维持对其的政治隔离，拒绝与之组建联合政府。
description.en: Advocates Flemish independence and strict anti-immigration policies. Rising steadily in 2023 polls, but all mainstream parties maintain a cordon sanitaire, refusing coalition talks.

description.zh: 2000年的奥地利是富裕的中欧联邦共和国，因自由党入阁引发欧盟外交制裁。
description.en: Austria in 2000 was a wealthy Central European federal republic, facing EU diplomatic sanctions over the Freedom Party's coalition entry.

governmentForm.zh: 议会制联邦共和国
governmentForm.en: Parliamentary federal republic

socialStructure.zh: 高福利社会，社会伙伴关系传统
socialStructure.en: High-welfare society, social partnership tradition

rulingClass.zh: 联合政府政治家、社会伙伴机构
rulingClass.en: Coalition politicians, social partnership institutions

succession.zh: 议会选举产生总理
succession.en: Chancellor from parliament

structure.zh: 联邦总统/联邦总理/国民议会/联邦议会
structure.en: Federal President / Chancellor / National Council / Federal Council

taxationSystem.zh: 所得税、增值税、社会保险
taxationSystem.en: Income tax, VAT, social insurance

culturalAchievements.zh: 古典音乐之都（莫扎特、施特劳斯、马勒）
culturalAchievements.en: Capital of classical music (Mozart, Strauss, Mahler)

languageFamily.zh: 印欧语系日耳曼语族

mainIndustries.zh: 旅游、机械、钢铁与金属、金融
mainIndustries.en: Tourism, machinery, steel and metals, finance

economicSystem.zh: 社会市场经济
economicSystem.en: Social market economy

allies.zh: 欧盟成员国（中立，非北约）

foreignPolicy.zh: 中立传统、欧洲一体化
foreignPolicy.en: Neutrality tradition, European integration

strengths.zh: 高生活质量、中欧枢纽、音乐与文化遗产
strengths.en: High quality of life, Central European hub, musical heritage

weaknesses.zh: 极右翼政治争议、小经济体量
weaknesses.en: Far-right political controversy, small economy

outlook.zh: 欧盟制裁将考验奥地利的欧洲归属感
outlook.en: EU sanctions will test Austrian European belonging

ideology.zh: 基督教民主主义、中间偏右

relationship.zh: 与绿党组成联合政府执政。
relationship.en: Governing in coalition with the Greens.

description.zh: 内哈默接替因丑闻辞职的库尔茨后领导ÖVP，2023年与绿党联合执政，面临通胀压力和FPÖ民调飙升的挑战，支持率持续下滑。
description.en: Nehammer leads ÖVP after Kurz's scandal-driven resignation. Governing with the Greens in 2023, the party faces inflation pressures and a surging FPÖ, with support declining steadily.

ideology.zh: 绿色政治、社会自由主义

relationship.zh: 联合政府伙伴，与ÖVP共同执政。
relationship.en: Coalition partner, governing jointly with ÖVP.

description.zh: 绿党首次进入联邦政府，推动气候保护和反腐议程。2023年在环保政策上取得进展但受限于与ÖVP的政策妥协，面临来自左右两翼的竞争压力。
description.en: In federal government for the first time, pushing climate protection and anti-corruption. Made progress on environmental policy in 2023 but constrained by ÖVP compromises, facing competition from both left and right.

ideology.zh: 右翼民粹主义、民族保守主义

relationship.zh: 主要反对党，民调持续领先。
relationship.en: Main opposition party, consistently leading in polls.

description.zh: 基克尔领导下的FPÖ以反移民、反疫苗和亲俄立场吸引大量不满选民，2023年民调持续位居第一，成为奥地利政坛最强势力量。
description.en: Under Kickl, FPÖ attracted disaffected voters with anti-immigration, anti-vaccine, and pro-Russia stances. Leading polls throughout 2023, it became the strongest force in Austrian politics.

description.zh: 2000年的瑞士以永久中立和直接民主著称，全球金融中心与国际组织枢纽。
description.en: Switzerland in 2000 was known for permanent neutrality and direct democracy, a global financial center and international organization hub.

governmentForm.zh: 联邦制直接民主共和国
governmentForm.en: Federal direct democratic republic

socialStructure.zh: 富裕多语社会
socialStructure.en: Wealthy multilingual society

rulingClass.zh: 联邦委员、银行家、制药精英
rulingClass.en: Federal councillors, bankers, pharma elite

succession.zh: 联邦议会选举联邦委员会
succession.en: Federal Assembly elects Federal Council

structure.zh: 联邦委员会/国民院/联邦院/联邦法院
structure.en: Federal Council / National Council / Council of States / Federal Supreme Court

taxationSystem.zh: 联邦/州/市镇三级低税率体系
taxationSystem.en: Federal/cantonal/municipal low-rate three-tier system

culturalAchievements.en: International organization HQs, precision industry, CERN
