mainIndustries.zh: 银行、保险、制药、精密钟表、食品加工、机械
mainIndustries.en: Banking, insurance, pharma, precision watches, food processing, machinery

economicSystem.zh: 自由市场经济
economicSystem.en: Free market economy

allies.zh: 永久中立，非北约/非欧盟成员

foreignPolicy.zh: 永久中立、国际斡旋、多边机构总部
foreignPolicy.en: Permanent neutrality, mediation, multilateral HQs

keyInnovations.zh: CERN粒子物理、ETH苏黎世研究、精密工程
keyInnovations.en: CERN particle physics, ETH Zurich research, precision engineering

strengths.zh: 全球金融中心、高生活质量、中立地位
strengths.en: Global financial center, high quality of life, neutral status

weaknesses.zh: 非EU成员限制市场准入
weaknesses.en: Non-EU status limits market access

outlook.zh: 2002年加入联合国有望进一步融入国际社会
outlook.en: 2002 UN membership will further integrate into international community

ideology.zh: 右翼民粹主义、保守主义

relationship.zh: 联邦委员会魔法公式成员，国民院第一大党。
relationship.en: Member of the Federal Council Magic Formula, largest party in the National Council.

description.zh: 瑞士最大政党，在2023年10月大选中巩固第一大党地位。主张限制移民和反对EU融合，在联邦委员会中占两席，通过直接民主工具推动保守议程。
description.en: Switzerland's largest party, consolidating its position in the October 2023 election. Advocates immigration limits and EU skepticism, holds two Federal Council seats, and pushes conservative agenda through direct democracy tools.

leader.zh: 塞德里克·韦尔穆特 / 马蒂亚·迈耶

ideology.zh: 社会民主主义

relationship.zh: 联邦委员会魔法公式成员，中左翼力量。
relationship.en: Member of the Federal Council Magic Formula, center-left force.

description.zh: 瑞士第二大政党，在联邦委员会中占两席。2023年关注气候政策、社会公平和医疗改革，在大选中基本维持议席，继续在共识政治中发挥平衡作用。
description.en: Switzerland's second-largest party with two Federal Council seats. Focused on climate policy, social equity, and healthcare reform in 2023, largely maintaining seats and continuing its balancing role in consensus politics.

ideology.zh: 古典自由主义

relationship.zh: 联邦委员会魔法公式成员，亲商自由派。
relationship.en: Member of the Federal Council Magic Formula, pro-business liberals.

description.zh: FDP在联邦委员会中占两席，代表瑞士传统自由主义路线。2023年大选中议席有所流失，面临绿色自由党和中间党的竞争，但仍是联邦政治核心力量。
description.en: FDP holds two Federal Council seats, representing Switzerland's traditional liberal line. Lost some seats in the 2023 election amid competition from GLP and The Centre, but remains a core force in federal politics.

description.zh: 2023年的日本在机器人AI与半导体设备领域具有独特优势，正以G7广岛AI进程推动国际AI治理。
description.en: Japan in 2023 has unique strengths in robotics AI and semiconductor equipment, driving international AI governance through the G7 Hiroshima AI Process.

governmentForm.zh: 议会制君主立宪制
governmentForm.en: Parliamentary constitutional monarchy

gdpDescription.zh: 全球第三大经济体，先进制造与技术创新中心，日元持续贬值

economicSystem.en: Mixed market economy with close government-industry cooperation

debtLevel.en: 260% of GDP, highest among developed nations

fiscalPolicy.zh: 安倍经济学遗产下的量化宽松与财政刺激，同时推进数字化转型
fiscalPolicy.en: Quantitative easing and fiscal stimulus under Abenomics legacy, while promoting digital transformation

description.zh: 地面防御与灾害救援主力

description.zh: 亚洲最先进海军之一，准航母出云级
description.en: One of Asia's most advanced navies, Izumo-class quasi-carriers

description.zh: F-35战机采购，区域空防核心
description.en: F-35 procurement, regional air defense core

description.en: Japanese domestic LLM development attempt

products.en: Efficient small models (founded by ex-Google researchers)

role.en: SoftBank CEO, one of the largest AI investors globally

role.zh: Sakana AI联合创始人，打造日本AI冠军
role.en: Sakana AI co-founder, building a Japanese AI champion

computeInfrastructure.en: SoftBank investing heavily in $100B-class AI data centers, catching up on compute

talentPool.en: Strong robotics and hardware engineering talent, but relatively weak in AI software talent

globalRanking.en: #5-6 globally, strong in robotics AI but weak in LLMs

outlook.en: Potential breakthrough through robotics-AI convergence and semiconductor equipment dominance

strengths.en: Global leader in robotics technology

outlook.en: Maintains critical role in AI era through hardware strengths and robotics-AI convergence

ideology.zh: 保守主义

relationship.zh: 执政党，与公明党组成联合政府。
relationship.en: Ruling party in coalition with Komeito.

description.zh: 日本战后长期执政的保守大党。2023年推进大幅增加防卫预算、强化日美同盟和经济安保战略。年末爆发派阀政治资金丑闻，严重冲击内阁支持率。
description.en: Japan's dominant conservative party. In 2023, Kishida pursued a historic defense spending increase and economic security. A major faction slush-fund scandal late in the year sent approval ratings plummeting.

ideology.zh: 自由主义、社会民主主义

relationship.zh: 最大在野党。
relationship.en: Largest opposition party.

description.zh: 日本最大在野党，2023年在国会中就物价高涨和自民党政治资金问题追究政府责任，但自身支持率依然低迷，反对党碎片化格局未能改变。
description.en: Japan's largest opposition party challenged the government over inflation and the LDP funding scandal in 2023, but its own support remained low amid a fragmented opposition.

ideology.zh: 中道主义、和平主义

relationship.zh: 执政联盟伙伴，与自民党长期联合执政。
relationship.en: Coalition partner, long-standing alliance with the LDP.

description.zh: 与创价学会关系密切的中道政党，自1999年起与自民党组成联合执政体制。2023年在防卫预算增加和安保政策转向等议题上对自民党形成一定牵制，维护和平宪法理念。
description.en: A centrist party affiliated with Soka Gakkai, in coalition with the LDP since 1999. It serves as a moderating force, tempering the LDP's defense expansion while advocating welfare and pacifist principles.

governmentForm.zh: 联邦议会制共和国，世界最大民主国家，总统为国家元首（礼仪性），总理掌握实权，两院制议会（人民院与联邦院）。
governmentForm.en: Federal parliamentary republic, the world's largest democracy, with the president as ceremonial head of state, the prime minister holding executive power, and a bicameral parliament (Lok Sabha and Rajya Sabha).

socialStructure.zh: 种姓制度遗存与现代阶层共存，IT精英新中产快速崛起，但农村贫困人口仍占大比例，城乡差距显著。
socialStructure.en: Legacy caste system coexists with modern class structures; a new IT-driven middle class is rising rapidly, but rural poverty remains widespread with significant urban-rural divides.

rulingClass.zh: 民选政治家、官僚体系（IAS行政官员）、工业财阀（塔塔、安巴尼、阿达尼家族）、IT企业领袖共同构成权力精英。
rulingClass.en: Elected politicians, the bureaucratic corps (IAS civil servants), industrial conglomerates (Tata, Ambani, Adani families), and IT corporate leaders form the ruling elite.

succession.zh: 总理由人民院多数党领袖出任，总统由选举人团间接选举产生，均无连任限制。
succession.en: The prime minister is the leader of the majority party in the Lok Sabha, the president is indirectly elected by an electoral college, with no term limits for either.

structure.zh: 联邦三权分立：总统与总理领导的行政部门、两院制议会（人民院545席/联邦院245席）、以最高法院为首的独立司法体系。
structure.en: Federal separation of powers: the executive led by the president and prime minister, bicameral parliament (545-seat Lok Sabha / 245-seat Rajya Sabha), and an independent judiciary headed by the Supreme Court.

function.zh: 协调政府决策、国家安全与重大政策推进。
function.en: Coordinates government decision-making, national security, and major policy implementation.

function.zh: 管理三军及国防研究与发展组织（DRDO），负责边境安全与军事现代化。
function.en: Manages the three armed services and DRDO, responsible for border security and military modernization.

function.zh: 制定财政预算、税收政策、金融监管及公共支出管理。
function.en: Formulates fiscal budgets, tax policies, financial regulation, and public expenditure management.

function.zh: 推动数字印度计划、IT产业发展、网络安全与AI国家战略。
function.en: Drives the Digital India initiative, IT industry development, cybersecurity, and the national AI strategy.

function.zh: 管理外交关系、海外侨民事务与国际多边合作。
function.en: Manages diplomatic relations, diaspora affairs, and international multilateral cooperation.

localAdmin.zh: 28个邦与8个联邦属地，各邦设首席部长与邦议会，县（District）为基层行政单位。潘查亚特制度（Panchayat Raj）为农村自治体系。
localAdmin.en: 28 states and 8 union territories, each state with a chief minister and legislature; districts form the basic administrative unit. The Panchayat Raj system provides rural self-governance.

legalSystem.zh: 以英国普通法为基础的混合法律体系，宪法为最高法律，最高法院拥有违宪审查权。
legalSystem.en: A hybrid legal system based on British common law, with the Constitution as supreme law and the Supreme Court exercising judicial review.

taxationSystem.zh: 商品及服务税（GST）统一间接税制度，联邦与邦分享税收，个人所得税与公司税为直接税主体。
taxationSystem.en: Goods and Services Tax (GST) as a unified indirect tax, shared between central and state governments, with personal income tax and corporate tax as primary direct taxes.

role.zh: 国家元首（礼仪性）
role.en: Head of State (ceremonial)

role.zh: 国防事务主管
role.en: Head of defense affairs

role.zh: 外交政策制定与执行
role.en: Foreign policy formulation and execution

religion.en: Hinduism (79.8%) predominant, with Islam (14.2%), Christianity (2.3%), Sikhism (1.7%), and Buddhism (0.7%) coexisting

philosophy.zh: 韦达传统、甘地非暴力思想与世俗主义宪法精神并存，印度教民族主义（Hindutva）影响上升。
philosophy.en: Vedic traditions, Gandhian non-violence, and constitutional secularism coexist, with rising influence of Hindu nationalism (Hindutva).

writingSystem.zh: 天城文（印地语）、拉丁字母（英语为官方语言之一）及多种地方文字
writingSystem.en: Devanagari (Hindi), Latin alphabet (English as co-official language), and numerous regional scripts

culturalAchievements.zh: 宝莱坞全球最大电影产量、印度古典舞蹈与音乐传统、瑜伽全球传播、IT外包产业文化、太空探索成就（月船三号）。
culturalAchievements.en: Bollywood as the world's largest film industry by output, classical Indian dance and music traditions, global spread of yoga, IT outsourcing culture, and space exploration achievements (Chandrayaan-3).

languageFamily.zh: 印欧语系（印地语/乌尔都语等）与达罗毗荼语系（泰米尔语/泰卢固语等），22种宪法承认语言
languageFamily.en: Indo-European (Hindi/Urdu etc.) and Dravidian (Tamil/Telugu etc.) families, with 22 constitutionally recognized languages

gdpDescription.zh: 全球第五大经济体，2023年超越英国。服务业占GDP约55%，IT服务与数字支付系统领先发展中国家，但人均收入仍较低。
gdpDescription.en: The world's fifth-largest economy, surpassing the UK in 2023. Services account for ~55% of GDP; IT services and digital payment systems lead among developing nations, but per-capita income remains low.

mainIndustries.zh: IT服务与外包、制药（全球仿制药之都）、纺织、农业、数字支付、汽车、化工
mainIndustries.en: IT services and outsourcing, pharmaceuticals (global generics capital), textiles, agriculture, digital payments, automobiles, chemicals

tradeGoods.zh: IT服务出口、仿制药、纺织服装、精炼石油、珠宝、农产品（大米/茶叶/香料）
tradeGoods.en: IT service exports, generic drugs, textiles and garments, refined petroleum, jewelry, agricultural products (rice/tea/spices)

householdWealth.zh: 家庭财富中位数约3000美元，极度不均等。IT从业者收入远超全国平均，农村家庭依赖小规模农业。
householdWealth.en: Median household wealth approximately $3,000, highly unequal. IT workers earn far above national average while rural households depend on smallholder farming.

tradeRoutes.zh: 印度洋航线为主，对美/欧IT服务出口，对中东石油进口，与东盟贸易增长迅速。
tradeRoutes.en: Primarily Indian Ocean routes; IT service exports to the US/EU, oil imports from the Middle East, and rapidly growing ASEAN trade.

economicSystem.zh: 混合经济体制，1991年经济自由化改革后市场化程度提高，但国有企业仍占重要地位，政府通过产业政策引导发展。
economicSystem.en: Mixed economy; market liberalization since 1991 reforms has increased private sector role, but state-owned enterprises remain significant, with government guiding development through industrial policy.

treasuryDescription.zh: 外汇储备约5900亿美元，为全球第四大储备持有国。印度央行积极管理汇率波动。
treasuryDescription.en: Forex reserves approximately $590 billion, the fourth-largest globally. The RBI actively manages exchange rate volatility.

debtLevel.zh: 中央政府债务约占GDP的57%，含邦政府债务总体约83%。
debtLevel.en: Central government debt ~57% of GDP, total including state debt ~83%.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政整顿路径下逐步降低赤字目标，同时加大基础设施投资（Gati Shakti国家总体规划）与数字化公共服务支出。
fiscalPolicy.en: Gradual deficit reduction under fiscal consolidation while increasing infrastructure investment (Gati Shakti master plan) and digital public service spending.

description.zh: 全球第二大陆军，部署于中印与印巴边境，正推进现代化改革。
description.en: The world's second-largest army, deployed along China and Pakistan borders, undergoing modernization reforms.

description.zh: 拥有航空母舰（维克兰特号），建设蓝水海军以维护印度洋利益。
description.en: Operates aircraft carrier INS Vikrant, building blue-water navy capabilities to secure Indian Ocean interests.

description.zh: 装备阵风与苏-30MKI战斗机，光辉国产战机项目推进中。
description.en: Equipped with Rafale and Su-30MKI fighters, with the indigenous Tejas fighter program advancing.

description.zh: 管理印度核三位一体威慑力量（陆基/海基/空基）。
description.en: Manages India's nuclear triad deterrence (land/sea/air-based).

commanderInChief.zh: 总统德劳帕迪·穆尔穆（名义），总理莫迪（实际）
commanderInChief.en: President Droupadi Murmu (nominal), PM Modi (de facto)

command.en: Coordinates joint operations across three services

technology.zh: 混合装备体系（俄制/法制/以制/国产），布拉莫斯导弹、核弹头约164枚、太空军事能力发展中。
technology.en: Mixed equipment system (Russian/French/Israeli/indigenous), BrahMos missiles, ~164 nuclear warheads, developing space military capabilities.

threats.zh: 巴基斯坦边境恐怖主义与克什米尔争端、中印实控线（LAC）对峙、东北部分离主义叛乱、纳萨尔毛派武装。
threats.en: Pakistan-border terrorism and Kashmir dispute, China-India LAC standoffs, northeast separatist insurgencies, Naxalite-Maoist armed movements.

recentBattles.zh: 2020-2023年中印拉达克边境持续对峙，加勒万河谷冲突后双方增兵。无大规模战争但边境态势紧张。
recentBattles.en: 2020-2023 continued China-India Ladakh border standoffs since the Galwan Valley clash, with both sides increasing troop deployments. No large-scale war but tense border situation.

populationDescription.zh: 2023年超越中国成为全球人口第一大国，年轻人口占比高，人口红利正在释放，但就业压力巨大。
populationDescription.en: Surpassed China in 2023 as the world's most populous country; high youth population share with demographic dividend unfolding, but immense employment pressure.

ethnicGroups.zh: 印度-雅利安人（72%）、达罗毗荼人（25%）、蒙古利亚人种及其他（3%），2000多个民族群体
ethnicGroups.en: Indo-Aryan (72%), Dravidian (25%), Mongoloid and others (3%), with over 2,000 ethnic groups

socialClasses.zh: IT精英与新兴中产阶层、城市白领、小企业主、庞大的非正规经济劳动者、农村小农与无地农民构成多层社会结构。
socialClasses.en: IT elites and emerging middle class, urban white-collar workers, small business owners, a vast informal economy labor force, and rural smallholders and landless peasants form a multi-tiered social structure.

allies.zh: 四方安全对话（Quad：美国/日本/澳大利亚）、法国（战略伙伴）、以色列（国防合作），同时维持战略自主。
allies.en: Quad (US/Japan/Australia), France (strategic partner), Israel (defense cooperation), while maintaining strategic autonomy.

enemies.zh: 巴基斯坦（克什米尔争端与跨境恐怖主义）、中国（边境紧张与地缘竞争），但均保持外交渠道。
enemies.en: Pakistan (Kashmir dispute and cross-border terrorism), China (border tensions and geopolitical rivalry), though diplomatic channels are maintained with both.

vassals.zh: 无正式附庸，但在南亚地区（不丹/尼泊尔/斯里兰卡）具有显著影响力。
vassals.en: No formal vassals, but exercises significant influence in South Asia (Bhutan/Nepal/Sri Lanka).

treaties.zh: Quad安全合作、美印防务合作协定（BECA/LEMOA/COMCASA）、印法战略伙伴关系、BRICS成员、上合组织成员。
treaties.en: Quad security cooperation, US-India defense pacts (BECA/LEMOA/COMCASA), India-France strategic partnership, BRICS member, SCO member.

foreignPolicy.zh: 多向结盟的战略自主外交（Multi-alignment），在美中竞争中保持平衡，推动全球南方议程，2023年担任G20主席国。
foreignPolicy.en: Multi-alignment strategic autonomy, balancing between US-China competition, championing the Global South agenda, and serving as G20 president in 2023.

recentDiplomaticEvents.zh: 2023年G20新德里峰会主席国、美印高技术合作深化（iCET倡议）、加拿大外交危机（锡克教活动人士事件）。
recentDiplomaticEvents.en: 2023 G20 New Delhi Summit presidency, deepening US-India high-tech cooperation (iCET initiative), diplomatic crisis with Canada (Sikh activist affair).

era.zh: 数字化转型与太空探索并进
era.en: Digital transformation and space exploration advancing in parallel

keyInnovations.zh: UPI数字支付系统（全球领先移动支付）、月船三号月球软着陆、Aadhaar生物识别身份系统（13亿用户）、仿制药制造技术。
keyInnovations.en: UPI digital payment system (global mobile payment leader), Chandrayaan-3 lunar soft landing, Aadhaar biometric ID system (1.3 billion users), generic pharmaceutical manufacturing.

infrastructure.zh: 数字基础设施快速发展（India Stack）、5G网络加速部署、太空发射能力（ISRO）、但农村互联网覆盖仍有差距。
infrastructure.en: Rapidly developing digital infrastructure (India Stack), accelerating 5G deployment, space launch capability (ISRO), though rural internet coverage gaps remain.

policy.zh: 数字印度倡议 + 国家AI战略"AI for All"强调包容性发展，NITI Aayog主导AI政策协调。
policy.en: Digital India initiative + National AI Strategy "AI for All" emphasizing inclusive development, with NITI Aayog coordinating AI policy.

regulatoryStance.zh: 相对宽松的监管环境，优先促进AI产业发展与应用，尚未出台综合性AI立法。
regulatoryStance.en: Relatively permissive regulatory environment prioritizing AI industry growth and application, with no comprehensive AI legislation yet.

investmentScale.zh: 2023年印度AI投资约15亿美元，政府通过IndiaAI计划加大公共投入。
investmentScale.en: India AI investment ~$1.5 billion in 2023, with government increasing public investment through the IndiaAI initiative.

valuation.zh: 三大IT巨头合计市值超3000亿美元
valuation.en: Top three IT giants combined market cap over $300 billion

keyProducts.zh: IT服务AI集成、企业级AI解决方案
keyProducts.en: IT services AI integration, enterprise AI solutions

valuation.zh: Ola创始人创立的印度LLM初创公司，2023年估值约10亿美元
valuation.en: Indian LLM startup by Ola founder, ~$1 billion valuation in 2023

keyProducts.zh: 印度多语言大语言模型
keyProducts.en: Indian multilingual large language model

valuation.en: Reliance Industries market cap over $200 billion

keyProducts.zh: AI驱动电信服务、JioAI云平台
keyProducts.en: AI-powered telecom services, JioAI cloud platform

contribution.zh: 创立印度首个估值十亿美元的AI初创企业，推动印度语言AI模型
contribution.en: Founded India's first billion-dollar AI startup, advancing Indian-language AI models

contribution.zh: 推动Jio平台AI化转型，投资AI基础设施建设
contribution.en: Driving Jio platform AI transformation and investing in AI infrastructure

researchFocus.zh: AI促进发展（AI for Development）、印度多语言NLP（22种官方语言）、医疗健康AI、农业AI、普惠金融AI。
researchFocus.en: AI for Development, multilingual NLP for 22 official Indian languages, healthcare AI, agricultural AI, financial inclusion AI.

computeInfrastructure.zh: IndiaAI计算使命目标建设10000+ GPU算力中心，主要云服务商在印度设有数据中心，但高端GPU获取受限。
computeInfrastructure.en: IndiaAI compute mission targets 10,000+ GPU capacity; major cloud providers operate data centers in India, but access to high-end GPUs is limited.

talentPool.zh: 全球最大IT劳动力，IITs培养大量工程人才，但顶尖AI人才大量流向美国（人才外流严重）。
talentPool.en: World's largest IT workforce, IITs producing massive engineering talent, but top AI talent heavily drains to the US (significant brain drain).

globalRanking.zh: 全球第7-8位，在AI人才输出与IT服务AI领域实力强劲
globalRanking.en: Ranked #7-8 globally, strong in AI talent export and IT services AI

outlook.zh: 凭借人口红利与数字基础设施优势，若投资规模扩大，有望在AI应用层实现突破，但需解决基础研究与算力短板。
outlook.en: Massive potential through demographic dividend and digital infrastructure; could break through in AI applications if investment scales up, but must address gaps in foundational research and compute.

strengths.zh: IT服务人才全球供应链核心、世界最大年轻劳动力、UPI数字支付全球领先、太空探索成就。
strengths.en: Core of global IT services talent supply chain, world's largest young workforce, UPI digital payments leading globally, space exploration achievements.

weaknesses.zh: 人均收入低、基础设施不均衡、AI基础研究与算力落后、顶尖人才外流、种姓制度遗存。
weaknesses.en: Low per-capita income, uneven infrastructure, lagging AI foundational research and compute, top talent brain drain, legacy of caste system.

outlook.zh: 作为全球人口第一大国和IT人才大国，若能留住人才并扩大AI投资，将成为AI时代的重要力量。
outlook.en: As the world's most populous nation and IT talent powerhouse, India could become a major force in the AI era if it retains talent and scales AI investment.

description.zh: 2023年的印度超越中国成为全球人口第一大国，以IT服务人才优势融入全球AI产业链，数字基础设施快速发展。
description.en: India in 2023 surpasses China as the world's most populous country, integrating into the global AI supply chain through IT talent, with rapidly developing digital infrastructure.

ideology.zh: 印度教民族主义、保守主义

relationship.zh: 执政联盟（全国民主联盟NDA）主导党，在人民院占绝对多数。
relationship.en: Lead party of the ruling National Democratic Alliance (NDA), holding an absolute majority in the Lok Sabha.

description.zh: 莫迪领导下的BJP自2014年执政以来深刻重塑印度政治格局。2023年在多个邦选举中大胜，推进数字印度、制造业转型和基建投资，同时推动印度教民族主义议程，反对党空间持续被压缩。
description.en: Under Modi, BJP has reshaped Indian politics since 2014. Winning major state elections in 2023, it pushed Digital India, manufacturing transformation, and infrastructure investment while advancing a Hindu nationalist agenda, further squeezing opposition space.

leaderTitle.zh: 前任党主席、核心领导人

ideology.zh: 中间偏左、世俗主义

relationship.zh: 最大反对党，领导印度反对党联盟INDIA。
relationship.en: Largest opposition party, leading the opposition INDIA alliance.

description.zh: 印度历史最悠久的政党，曾长期主导印度政坛。2023年拉胡尔·甘地发起'团结印度'长途徒步运动，组建反对党联盟INDIA挑战BJP，但在多数邦选举中表现不佳。
description.en: India's oldest party, once dominant in Indian politics. In 2023, Rahul Gandhi launched the Bharat Jodo Yatra and formed the opposition INDIA alliance to challenge BJP, but performed poorly in most state elections.

ideology.zh: 民粹主义、反腐败

relationship.zh: INDIA反对党联盟成员，德里和旁遮普邦执政。
relationship.en: Member of the INDIA opposition alliance, governing Delhi and Punjab.

description.zh: 凯杰里瓦尔领导的AAP以反腐和免费公共服务为旗帜崛起。2023年凯杰里瓦尔因涉嫌酒类政策腐败案被逮捕，成为政治热点事件，AAP指控这是BJP的政治迫害。
description.en: AAP rose under Kejriwal on anti-corruption and free public services. In 2023, Kejriwal was arrested in a liquor policy corruption case, becoming a major political flashpoint, with AAP alleging political persecution by BJP.

governmentForm.zh: 联邦总统制共和国。
governmentForm.en: Federal presidential republic.

socialStructure.zh: Russia社会。
socialStructure.en: Russia society.

rulingClass.zh: 政治精英。
rulingClass.en: Political elites.

succession.zh: 选举或继承。
succession.en: Election or succession.

structure.zh: 政府结构。
structure.en: Government structure.

function.zh: 财政。
function.en: Finance.

function.zh: 安全。
function.en: Security.

taxationSystem.zh: 税收体系。
taxationSystem.en: Tax system.

culturalAchievements.zh: Russia的文化遗产。
culturalAchievements.en: Cultural heritage of Russia.

languageFamily.zh: 多语言

philosophy.zh: 社会价值观。
philosophy.en: Social values.

gdpDescription.zh: 经济概况。
gdpDescription.en: Economy overview.

mainIndustries.zh: 石油天然气、军工、矿业

householdWealth.zh: 家庭财富。
householdWealth.en: Household wealth.

economicSystem.zh: 经济体制。
economicSystem.en: Economic system.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政政策。
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal policy.

description.zh: 军事力量。
description.en: Military forces.

technology.zh: 军事装备。

description.zh: 2000年的俄罗斯在普京领导下从90年代危机中恢复。
description.en: Russia in 2000: recovering under Putin from 1990s crisis.

ideology.zh: 保守主义、俄罗斯民族主义

relationship.zh: 绝对主导的执政党，控制国家杜马超级多数。
relationship.en: Absolutely dominant ruling party, controlling a supermajority in the State Duma.

description.zh: 统一俄罗斯党作为普京的政治工具，完全主导俄罗斯政治。2023年在俄乌战争持续背景下，该党全力支持战争动员和经济军事化，任何反战声音在体制内被彻底压制。
description.en: United Russia serves as Putin's political vehicle, dominating Russian politics entirely. In 2023, amid the ongoing Ukraine war, the party fully backed war mobilization and economic militarization, with all anti-war voices suppressed within the system.

name.en: Communist Party of the Russian Federation (KPRF)

ideology.zh: 共产主义、左翼民族主义

relationship.zh: 名义上最大反对党，实际上配合克里姆林宫立场。
relationship.en: Nominally the largest opposition party, but effectively aligned with the Kremlin.

description.zh: KPRF是俄罗斯杜马第二大党，但长期被视为'系统性反对派'，在关键议题上与克里姆林宫保持一致。2023年支持俄乌战争，未对普京政权构成实质挑战。
description.en: KPRF is the second-largest Duma party but long considered 'systemic opposition,' aligning with the Kremlin on key issues. Supported the Ukraine war in 2023, posing no real challenge to Putin's regime.

leader.zh: 阿列克谢·纳瓦利内（狱中）

ideology.zh: 自由民主主义、反腐败

relationship.zh: 被克里姆林宫定性为'极端主义组织'，遭全面打压。
relationship.en: Designated as 'extremist organization' by the Kremlin, facing total suppression.

description.zh: 纳瓦利内2023年仍在北极圈监狱服刑，其反腐基金会被取缔，支持者遭逮捕或流亡。俄罗斯自由派反对运动在国内几乎被完全消灭，仅在海外维持活动。
description.en: Navalny remained imprisoned in an Arctic penal colony in 2023, his anti-corruption foundation banned, supporters arrested or exiled. Russia's liberal opposition was virtually eliminated domestically, surviving only in exile abroad.

governmentForm.zh: 联邦议会制君主立宪制，英王为名义国家元首（由总督代表），总理为政府首脑，议会分参众两院。世界上最稳定的民主国家之一。
governmentForm.en: Federal parliamentary constitutional monarchy, with the British monarch as nominal head of state (represented by the Governor General), the prime minister as head of government, and a bicameral parliament. One of the world's most stable democracies.

socialStructure.zh: 高度平等的福利社会，多元文化主义为国策，中产阶级占主导，移民群体贡献巨大，科技精英集中于多伦多-蒙特利尔走廊。
socialStructure.en: Highly egalitarian welfare society with official multiculturalism policy; middle class predominant, major immigrant contributions, tech elite concentrated in the Toronto-Montreal corridor.

rulingClass.zh: 民选政治家、联邦公务员体系、银行与资源业高管、科技/学术精英。
rulingClass.en: Elected politicians, federal civil service, banking and resource industry executives, tech and academic elites.

succession.zh: 总理由众议院多数党领袖出任，君主继位遵循英国王位继承法。无总理任期限制。
succession.en: The prime minister is the leader of the majority party in the House of Commons; royal succession follows the British line. No term limits for prime ministers.

structure.zh: 联邦议会制：总督（代表英王）、总理与内阁领导行政，众议院338席民选、参议院105席任命，最高法院为终审司法机构。
structure.en: Federal parliamentary system: Governor General (representing the Crown), PM and Cabinet lead the executive, 338-seat elected House of Commons, 105-seat appointed Senate, Supreme Court as final judicial authority.

function.zh: 协调政府优先事项、政策方向与内阁决策。
function.en: Coordinates government priorities, policy direction, and cabinet decision-making.

function.zh: 管理加拿大武装力量、北约义务履行与北极安全。
function.en: Manages Canadian Armed Forces, NATO obligations, and Arctic security.

function.zh: 制定联邦预算、税收政策与经济战略。
function.en: Formulates federal budget, tax policies, and economic strategy.

name.zh: 创新、科学与经济发展部

function.zh: 推动AI战略、科技创新、知识产权与数字经济发展。
function.en: Drives AI strategy, tech innovation, intellectual property, and digital economy development.

function.zh: 管理外交关系、国际贸易与发展援助。
function.en: Manages diplomatic relations, international trade, and development aid.

localAdmin.zh: 10省3地区，各设省长（Premier）与省议会，市政府处理地方事务。联邦制下各省自治权较大（尤其魁北克）。
localAdmin.en: 10 provinces and 3 territories, each with a premier and legislature; municipal governments handle local affairs. Provinces hold significant autonomy under federalism (especially Quebec).

legalSystem.zh: 英国普通法体系（魁北克省民事采用法国民法典），《加拿大权利与自由宪章》为基本权利保障。
legalSystem.en: British common law system (Quebec uses French civil code for civil matters), with the Canadian Charter of Rights and Freedoms as the foundation of rights protection.

taxationSystem.zh: 联邦个人与公司所得税、商品及服务税（GST 5%），各省另征省销售税或合并销售税（HST）。
taxationSystem.en: Federal personal and corporate income tax, Goods and Services Tax (GST 5%), with provinces levying additional Provincial Sales Tax or Harmonized Sales Tax (HST).

role.zh: 英王在加拿大的代表（礼仪性）
role.en: Representative of the Crown in Canada (ceremonial)

role.zh: 管理外交政策与国际关系
role.en: Manages foreign policy and international relations

role.zh: 联邦财政与经济政策
role.en: Federal finance and economic policy

religion.zh: 基督教（天主教/新教）为主（53%），无宗教信仰增长最快（35%），多元宗教并存
religion.en: Christianity (Catholic/Protestant) predominant (53%), non-religious fastest-growing (35%), with multifaith coexistence

philosophy.zh: 官方多元文化主义、社会自由主义传统、和平主义外交理念、环保与包容性价值观。
philosophy.en: Official multiculturalism, social liberal tradition, pacifist diplomatic philosophy, environmental and inclusive values.

writingSystem.zh: 拉丁字母（英语与法语均为官方语言）
writingSystem.en: Latin alphabet (English and French as co-official languages)

culturalAchievements.zh: 深度学习诞生地（Hinton/Bengio/LeCun中两位在加拿大）、全民医保体系、多元文化融合典范、环保与清洁能源领先。
culturalAchievements.en: Birthplace of deep learning (two of Hinton/Bengio/LeCun based in Canada), universal healthcare system, exemplar of multicultural integration, leader in environmental protection and clean energy.

languageFamily.zh: 印欧语系日耳曼语族（英语）与罗曼语族（法语）双官方语言
languageFamily.en: Indo-European, Germanic (English) and Romance (French) as dual official languages

gdpDescription.zh: 全球第八大经济体，资源丰富，金融体系稳健，科技产业集中于多伦多-滑铁卢走廊，与美国经济高度整合。
gdpDescription.en: The world's eighth-largest economy; resource-rich, with a stable financial system, tech industry concentrated in the Toronto-Waterloo corridor, and highly integrated with the US economy.

mainIndustries.zh: 自然资源（石油/矿产/林业）、银行金融、科技、汽车制造、农业、航空航天
mainIndustries.en: Natural resources (oil/mining/forestry), banking and finance, technology, auto manufacturing, agriculture, aerospace

tradeGoods.zh: 原油与天然气、矿产（钾肥/镍/铀）、汽车与零部件、木材与纸浆、小麦与农产品、AI/科技服务
tradeGoods.en: Crude oil and natural gas, minerals (potash/nickel/uranium), automobiles and parts, lumber and pulp, wheat and agricultural products, AI/tech services

householdWealth.zh: 家庭财富中位数约10.7万美元，房价高企（尤其温哥华/多伦多）挤压年轻人购房能力。
householdWealth.en: Median household wealth ~$107,000; high housing prices (especially Vancouver/Toronto) squeezing young people's ability to buy homes.

tradeRoutes.zh: 与美国贸易占总量约75%（CUSMA/USMCA框架），对欧盟（CETA）与亚太贸易增长中。
tradeRoutes.en: Trade with the US accounts for ~75% of total (CUSMA/USMCA framework), with growing EU (CETA) and Asia-Pacific trade.

economicSystem.zh: 混合市场经济，政府通过社会安全网与产业政策积极干预，自然资源国有管理与私营企业并存。
economicSystem.en: Mixed market economy with active government intervention through social safety nets and industrial policy; natural resource public management coexists with private enterprise.

treasuryDescription.zh: 联邦债务约占GDP 42%，在G7中处于较低水平。加拿大央行独立运营，通胀管控有效。
treasuryDescription.en: Federal debt ~42% of GDP, low among G7. The Bank of Canada operates independently with effective inflation management.

debtLevel.zh: 联邦债务约占GDP 42%，含省级债务总体约75%。
debtLevel.en: Federal debt ~42% of GDP, total including provincial debt ~75%.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 扩张性财政支出用于社会安全网、住房政策与绿色转型，同时通过碳税推动气候目标。
fiscalPolicy.en: Expansionary fiscal spending on social safety net, housing policy, and green transition, while advancing climate goals through carbon pricing.

description.zh: 轻步兵为主的陆上力量，参与北约海外任务与北极巡逻。
description.en: Light infantry-focused land force, participating in NATO overseas missions and Arctic patrols.

description.zh: 护卫舰与潜艇为主力，负责大西洋/太平洋/北极水域巡逻。
description.en: Frigates and submarines as main force, patrolling Atlantic/Pacific/Arctic waters.

description.zh: 装备CF-18战斗机（计划采购F-35替换），执行NORAD北美防空任务。
description.en: Equipped with CF-18 fighters (F-35 replacement planned), executing NORAD North American air defense missions.

description.zh: JTF2精锐反恐部队，在全球反恐与特种作战中表现优异。
description.en: JTF2 elite counter-terrorism unit, with strong performance in global counter-terrorism and special operations.

commanderInChief.zh: 总督玛丽·西蒙（名义），总理特鲁多（实际）
commanderInChief.en: Governor General Mary Simon (nominal), PM Trudeau (de facto)

command.zh: 加拿大武装力量最高军事长官
command.en: Highest military officer of the Canadian Armed Forces

technology.zh: 依赖北约盟国（尤其美国）高端军事技术，自身在C4ISR、网络安全与北极监视技术方面有专长。
technology.en: Relies on NATO allies (especially the US) for high-end military technology; own expertise in C4ISR, cybersecurity, and Arctic surveillance technology.

threats.zh: 俄罗斯北极扩张、中国在北极与网络领域威胁、北约2%GDP军费目标压力。
threats.en: Russian Arctic expansion, Chinese threats in Arctic and cyber domains, pressure to meet NATO 2% GDP defense spending target.

recentBattles.zh: 无直接战斗，但向乌克兰提供军事训练与援助（Operation UNIFIER），在拉脱维亚领导北约战斗群。
recentBattles.en: No direct combat, but providing military training and aid to Ukraine (Operation UNIFIER), leading NATO battle group in Latvia.

populationDescription.zh: 人口增长主要依赖移民（2023年创纪录年净增百万移民），多元文化社会，但住房与基础设施承压。
populationDescription.en: Population growth primarily driven by immigration (record net immigration of ~1 million in 2023); multicultural society, but housing and infrastructure under pressure.

ethnicGroups.en: European descent (69.8%), South Asian (7.1%), Chinese (4.7%), Indigenous (5%), Black (4.3%), and others

socialClasses.zh: 庞大中产阶级为社会基石，科技与金融精英、资源行业工人、公共服务从业者、移民创业者构成多元结构。
socialClasses.en: A large middle class as the social foundation, with tech and financial elites, resource industry workers, public service employees, and immigrant entrepreneurs forming a diverse structure.

allies.zh: 美国（最亲密盟友/最大贸易伙伴）、五眼联盟、北约、G7、英联邦。
allies.en: US (closest ally/largest trading partner), Five Eyes, NATO, G7, Commonwealth.

enemies.zh: 无直接敌国，但与中国关系紧张（孟晚舟事件/两个迈克尔/外国干预指控）、与俄罗斯因乌克兰战争对立。
enemies.en: No direct enemies, but tense relations with China (Meng Wanzhou/Two Michaels/foreign interference allegations) and confrontation with Russia over the Ukraine war.

treaties.zh: CUSMA/USMCA（北美自贸协定）、北约、五眼联盟、CETA（加欧综合经贸协定）、CPTPP。
treaties.en: CUSMA/USMCA, NATO, Five Eyes, CETA (Canada-EU), CPTPP.

foreignPolicy.zh: 多边主义与进步价值外交，AI治理国际合作倡导者，支持乌克兰，对中国采取审慎立场。
foreignPolicy.en: Multilateralism and progressive values diplomacy, advocate for international AI governance cooperation, supporting Ukraine, and taking a cautious stance toward China.

recentDiplomaticEvents.zh: 2023年加印外交危机（锡克教领袖遇害指控）、持续向乌克兰提供军事与财政援助、外国干预调查委员会成立。
recentDiplomaticEvents.en: 2023 Canada-India diplomatic crisis (Sikh leader assassination allegation), continued military and financial aid to Ukraine, establishment of foreign interference inquiry commission.

era.zh: 深度学习研究前沿与量子计算探索
era.en: Deep learning research frontier and quantum computing exploration

keyInnovations.zh: 深度学习理论（Hinton/Bengio - AI研究发源地）、Transformer架构共同发明者（Aidan Gomez）、量子计算（D-Wave）、资源开采技术。
keyInnovations.en: Deep learning theory (Hinton/Bengio - AI research birthplace), Transformer architecture co-inventor (Aidan Gomez), quantum computing (D-Wave), resource extraction technology.

infrastructure.zh: 世界级AI研究机构（Mila/Vector Institute/Amii）、主要云服务商加拿大区域、扩展中的政府支持计算基础设施。
infrastructure.en: World-class AI research institutions (Mila/Vector Institute/Amii), major cloud providers' Canadian regions, expanding government-supported compute infrastructure.

policy.zh: 泛加拿大AI战略（2017年全球首个国家AI战略）+ CIFAR 24亿加元AI投资，引领AI安全与负责任AI全球议程。
policy.en: Pan-Canadian AI Strategy (world's first national AI strategy, 2017) + $2.4 billion CIFAR AI investment, leading global AI safety and responsible AI agenda.

regulatoryStance.zh: 推进AI与数据法案（AIDA）立法，强调负责任AI开发与透明度，平衡创新与安全。
regulatoryStance.en: Advancing Artificial Intelligence and Data Act (AIDA) legislation, emphasizing responsible AI development and transparency, balancing innovation with safety.

investmentScale.zh: 2023年加拿大AI投资约55亿美元，政府与私营部门共同推动。
investmentScale.en: Canadian AI investment ~$5.5 billion in 2023, driven by both government and private sector.

capabilities.zh: 面向企业的大语言模型，优化检索增强生成（RAG）与多语言支持。
capabilities.en: Enterprise-focused LLM optimized for retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) and multilingual support.

keyProducts.zh: Command R系列企业级LLM、嵌入模型
keyProducts.en: Command R enterprise LLM series, embedding models

name.zh: Scale AI（加拿大政府支持项目）

keyProducts.zh: 供应链AI优化、产业AI解决方案
keyProducts.en: Supply chain AI optimization, industrial AI solutions

contribution.zh: 深度学习之父，2023年离开Google警告AI风险，图灵奖得主
contribution.en: Father of deep learning, left Google in 2023 to warn about AI risks, Turing Award laureate

contribution.zh: 深度学习与注意力机制先驱，倡导AI安全与国际治理，图灵奖得主
contribution.en: Pioneer of deep learning and attention mechanisms, advocate for AI safety and international governance, Turing Award laureate

contribution.zh: Transformer架构论文共同作者，创立Cohere推动企业AI民主化
contribution.en: Co-author of the Transformer architecture paper, founded Cohere to democratize enterprise AI

researchFocus.zh: AI安全与对齐、深度学习基础理论、自然语言处理、医疗健康AI、负责任AI框架。
researchFocus.en: AI safety and alignment, deep learning fundamentals, natural language processing, healthcare AI, responsible AI frameworks.

computeInfrastructure.zh: 政府支持扩展中，主要云服务商（AWS/Azure/GCP）在加拿大设有区域，CIFAR与研究机构共享算力资源。
computeInfrastructure.en: Expanding with government support; major cloud providers (AWS/Azure/GCP) operate Canadian regions, with CIFAR and research institutions sharing compute resources.

talentPool.zh: 世界级AI研究人才库——多伦多-蒙特利尔走廊为全球AI研究重镇（Mila/Vector Institute/Amii），但面临人才流失至美国的挑战。
talentPool.en: World-class AI research talent pool — Toronto-Montreal corridor is a global AI research hub (Mila/Vector Institute/Amii), but faces talent loss challenge to the US.

globalRanking.zh: 全球第4-5位，在AI基础研究方面以小博大表现卓越
globalRanking.en: Ranked #4-5 globally, punching above its weight in AI foundational research

outlook.zh: 强大的研究基础为AI时代奠定了先发优势，但需防止企业与人才被美国虹吸，商业化能力需提升。
outlook.en: Strong research foundation provides first-mover advantage in the AI era, but must prevent companies and talent from being siphoned to the US; commercialization capability needs strengthening.

strengths.zh: 深度学习研究发源地、世界级AI人才（图灵奖得主集聚）、全球首个国家AI战略、稳定民主治理。
strengths.en: Birthplace of deep learning research, world-class AI talent (Turing Award laureates concentrated here), world's first national AI strategy, stable democratic governance.

weaknesses.zh: AI企业规模与商业化不及美国、顶尖人才与企业流失至美国风险、国防投入不足、住房负担危机。
weaknesses.en: AI enterprise scale and commercialization lag behind the US, risk of losing top talent and companies to the US, insufficient defense spending, housing affordability crisis.

outlook.zh: 凭借AI研究根基与先发优势，若能有效留住人才与扩大产业化，将在AI治理与安全领域引领全球。
outlook.en: With its AI research foundation and first-mover advantage, Canada can lead globally in AI governance and safety if it effectively retains talent and scales industrialization.

description.zh: 2023年的加拿大是全球AI研究的摇篮，Geoffrey Hinton与Yoshua Bengio等深度学习先驱在此奠基，Cohere等AI企业崛起。
description.en: Canada in 2023 is the cradle of global AI research, where deep learning pioneers like Geoffrey Hinton and Yoshua Bengio laid foundations, with AI companies like Cohere rising.

ideology.zh: 自由主义、中间偏左

relationship.zh: 少数政府执政，依赖NDP信任供给协议。
relationship.en: Governing as a minority, relying on an NDP supply-and-confidence agreement.

description.zh: 特鲁多领导的自由党以少数政府形式执政。2023年面临住房危机、生活成本飙升和移民政策争议，民调大幅落后保守党，党内更换领导人的呼声渐起。
description.en: Trudeau's Liberals govern as a minority. In 2023, facing a housing crisis, soaring cost of living, and immigration policy debates, they trailed the Conservatives badly in polls, with growing internal calls for leadership change.

ideology.zh: 保守主义、经济自由主义

relationship.zh: 官方反对党，民调大幅领先。
relationship.en: Official opposition, leading polls by wide margins.

description.zh: 波利耶夫尔以'常识保守主义'为旗号，猛烈抨击自由党的住房、通胀和碳税政策。2023年民调持续大幅领先，被普遍预期将赢得下届大选。
description.en: Poilievre rallied 'common sense conservatism,' fiercely attacking Liberal housing, inflation, and carbon tax policies. Consistently leading polls by wide margins in 2023, widely expected to win the next election.

ideology.zh: 社会民主主义

relationship.zh: 通过信任供给协议支持自由党少数政府。
relationship.en: Supporting the Liberal minority government through a supply-and-confidence agreement.

description.zh: NDP与自由党签订信任供给协议以换取牙科保健和药品计划等政策承诺。2023年辛格在维持协议和展示独立性之间寻求平衡，面对保守党崛起的压力。
description.en: NDP signed a supply-and-confidence deal with the Liberals in exchange for dental care and pharmacare commitments. In 2023, Singh balanced maintaining the deal with demonstrating independence amid rising Conservative pressure.

description.zh: 2023年的台湾通过台积电掌控全球AI芯片制造命脉，生产全球约90%的先进制程半导体，是AI时代最具战略价值的经济体之一。
description.en: Taiwan in 2023 controls the lifeline of global AI chip manufacturing through TSMC, producing ~90% of the world's advanced-node semiconductors, making it one of the most strategically valuable economies in the AI era.

governmentForm.zh: 民主共和制，五权分立宪政体制（行政、立法、司法、考试、监察）
governmentForm.en: Democratic republic with five-branch constitutional system (Executive, Legislative, Judicial, Examination, Control)

socialStructure.zh: 以高科技产业中产阶级为主体的现代化社会，教育普及率极高，贫富差距在亚洲相对较小
socialStructure.en: Modernized society centered on a high-tech middle class, extremely high education access, relatively low wealth inequality for Asia

rulingClass.zh: 民进党执政，总统与行政院长主导行政权，立法院为最高立法机关，科技产业领袖具有重大影响力
rulingClass.en: DPP in power, President and Premier lead executive authority, Legislative Yuan as supreme legislature, tech industry leaders hold significant influence

succession.zh: 总统由公民直选产生，任期四年，可连任一次
succession.en: President directly elected by citizens for a four-year term, renewable once

structure.zh: 五院体制：行政院（内阁）、立法院（国会）、司法院（最高司法）、考试院（公务员考核）、监察院（审计监督）
structure.en: Five-Yuan system: Executive Yuan (Cabinet), Legislative Yuan (Parliament), Judicial Yuan (Supreme Judiciary), Examination Yuan (Civil Service), Control Yuan (Audit & Oversight)

function.zh: 最高行政机关，统辖各部会推行国家政策
function.en: Supreme executive body overseeing all ministries to implement national policy

function.zh: 统管国防政策、军事战略与台海防卫作战
function.en: Oversees defense policy, military strategy, and cross-strait defense operations

function.zh: 产业政策、能源管理、贸易推广与半导体产业战略
function.en: Industrial policy, energy management, trade promotion, and semiconductor industry strategy

function.zh: 税务征管、国库管理、关务与金融监理
function.en: Tax administration, treasury management, customs, and financial supervision

function.zh: 数位治理、资安防护、AI与开放数据政策
function.en: Digital governance, cybersecurity, AI and open data policy

name.zh: 国家科学及技术委员会

function.zh: 科研经费分配、半导体与AI研发战略统筹
function.en: Research funding allocation, semiconductor and AI R&D strategy coordination

function.zh: 维系非邦交国实质关系、驻外代表处管理
function.en: Maintains substantive relations with non-diplomatic partners, overseas representative offices

function.zh: 治安、移民、户政与地方自治事务
function.en: Public security, immigration, household registration, and local governance affairs

function.zh: 全民健保体系管理、公共卫生与社会福利
function.en: National Health Insurance system management, public health, and social welfare

localAdmin.zh: 六直辖市与十六县市地方自治体系
localAdmin.en: Six special municipalities and sixteen counties/cities with local self-governance

legalSystem.zh: 大陆法系为基础的混合法律体系，宪法法庭行使违宪审查权
legalSystem.en: Civil law system with constitutional court exercising judicial review

taxationSystem.zh: 累进综合所得税（5%-40%）、营业税（5%）、营利事业所得税（20%）、证券交易税
taxationSystem.en: Progressive consolidated income tax (5%–40%), business tax (5%), corporate income tax (20%), securities transaction tax

role.zh: 内阁首长，负责行政院日常运作
role.en: Head of Cabinet, responsible for Executive Yuan daily operations

role.zh: 立法院议长，主持立法议事
role.en: President of Legislative Yuan, presides over legislative proceedings

religion.zh: 佛教、道教与民间信仰并存，基督教少数，宗教自由度高
religion.en: Buddhism, Taoism, and folk religions coexist, Christian minority, high religious freedom

philosophy.zh: 儒家传统与现代民主价值融合，重视教育与科技创新
philosophy.en: Confucian tradition blended with modern democratic values, emphasis on education and technological innovation

culturalAchievements.zh: 半导体制造奇迹、新浪潮电影、全民健保体系、婚姻平权亚洲首例
culturalAchievements.en: Semiconductor manufacturing miracle, New Wave cinema, universal healthcare system, first in Asia to legalize same-sex marriage

languageFamily.zh: 汉藏语系（官方为国语/华语），南岛语系原住民语言
languageFamily.en: Sino-Tibetan (Mandarin as official), Austronesian indigenous languages

education.zh: 高等教育入学率超过70%，台大/清华/交大为顶尖学府，半导体专业教育全球领先
education.en: Tertiary enrollment rate over 70%, NTU/NTHU/NCTU as top universities, world-leading semiconductor education

arts.zh: 金马奖华语电影最高殿堂、独立音乐蓬勃发展、珍珠奶茶文化全球传播
arts.en: Golden Horse Awards as pinnacle of Chinese-language cinema, vibrant indie music scene, global spread of bubble tea culture

gdpDescription.zh: 全球半导体制造中心，台积电贡献GDP约15%，出口导向型高科技经济体
gdpDescription.en: Global semiconductor manufacturing center, TSMC contributes ~15% of GDP, export-oriented high-tech economy

mainIndustries.zh: 半导体制造（台积电）
电子零组件
IT硬件与面板
机械设备
石化工业
精密光学

householdWealth.zh: 家庭储蓄率高，房价高企尤其在台北都会区
householdWealth.en: High household savings rate, elevated property prices especially in Taipei metropolitan area

economicSystem.zh: 出口导向型混合市场经济，政府在半导体产业战略中发挥指导作用
economicSystem.en: Export-oriented mixed market economy with government guiding role in semiconductor industrial strategy

debtLevel.zh: 中央政府债务约占GDP 30%，在先进经济体中较低
debtLevel.en: Central government debt ~30% of GDP, low among advanced economies

fiscalPolicy.zh: 审慎财政管理，强调产业投资与国防开支平衡，半导体产业享有战略性税收优惠
fiscalPolicy.en: Prudent fiscal management balancing industrial investment and defense spending, strategic tax incentives for semiconductor industry

description.zh: 地面防御主力，聚焦反登陆作战与城镇战能力
description.en: Ground defense core force, focused on anti-landing operations and urban warfare capabilities

description.zh: 台海与周边海域防御，反舰导弹为核心威慑
description.en: Defense of Taiwan Strait and surrounding waters, anti-ship missiles as core deterrent

description.zh: F-16V战机为主力，承担台海空域防御任务
description.en: F-16V fighters as mainstay, responsible for Taiwan Strait airspace defense

description.zh: 两栖作战与沿海防御精锐部队
description.en: Elite amphibious and coastal defense force

name.en: Information, Communications and Electronic Force Command

description.zh: 网络战与电子战部队，应对信息化战争
description.en: Cyber and electronic warfare force for information-age combat

threats.zh: 中国军事压力与台海武力威胁（首要生存威胁）
threats.en: China military pressure and cross-strait military threat (primary existential threat)

threats.zh: 灰色地带冲突（军机绕台、海上演习）
threats.en: Gray zone conflict (military aircraft incursions, naval exercises)

threats.zh: 网络攻击与信息战
threats.en: Cyberattacks and information warfare

specialCapabilities.zh: 不对称防御战略：反舰导弹（雄风系列）、水雷战、机动岸防、后备动员体系
specialCapabilities.en: Asymmetric defense strategy: anti-ship missiles (Hsiung Feng series), mine warfare, mobile shore defense, reserve mobilization system

demographics_description.zh: 少子化严重（生育率低至0.87），人口高度集中于西部都会带
demographics_description.en: Severe low birth rate (TFR as low as 0.87), population heavily concentrated in western metropolitan corridor

allies.zh: 美国（非官方安全承诺，台湾关系法）
allies.en: United States (informal security commitment, Taiwan Relations Act)

allies.zh: 日本（安全与经济紧密伙伴）
欧盟（贸易与价值观伙伴）
澳大利亚与加拿大（印太民主伙伴）

enemies.zh: 中华人民共和国声索主权（首要威胁）

foreignPolicy.zh: 维持现状、深化与民主盟友关系、以半导体实力构建'硅盾'战略安全
foreignPolicy.en: Maintain status quo, deepen ties with democratic allies, leverage semiconductor power for 'silicon shield' strategic security

recentDiplomaticEvents.zh: 蔡英文过境美国引发中国军演
recentDiplomaticEvents.en: Tsai Ing-wen US transit triggering Chinese military exercises

recentDiplomaticEvents.zh: 与立陶宛互设代表处打破外交孤立
recentDiplomaticEvents.en: Mutual representative offices with Lithuania breaking diplomatic isolation

recentDiplomaticEvents.zh: TSMC赴美日欧设厂深化供应链同盟
recentDiplomaticEvents.en: TSMC building fabs in US, Japan, Europe deepening supply chain alliances

tradeAgreements.zh: 新南向政策（东南亚与南亚经贸）
tradeAgreements.en: New Southbound Policy (Southeast and South Asia trade)

keyInnovations.zh: 台积电3纳米制程（全球最先进量产工艺）
keyInnovations.en: TSMC 3nm process (world's most advanced mass production technology)

keyInnovations.zh: 先进封装CoWoS技术（AI芯片关键）
keyInnovations.en: Advanced chip packaging CoWoS technology (critical for AI chips)

keyInnovations.zh: EUV极紫外光刻量产应用
keyInnovations.en: EUV lithography mass production adoption

keyInnovations.zh: 2纳米制程研发（预计2025量产）
keyInnovations.en: 2nm process development (mass production expected 2025)

infrastructure.zh: 新竹科学园区为全球半导体之都，台南科学园区3纳米晶圆厂集群，高铁连接产业走廊
infrastructure.en: Hsinchu Science Park as the world's semiconductor capital, Tainan Science Park 3nm fab cluster, HSR connecting the industrial corridor

policy.zh: '硅盾'半导体战略聚焦AI芯片制造而非AI模型，台积电为全球AI硬件不可替代的基础设施
policy.en: 'Silicon shield' semiconductor strategy focused on AI chip manufacturing rather than AI models; TSMC as irreplaceable infrastructure for global AI hardware

regulatoryStance.zh: 技术出口管控配合美国芯片法案，对AI应用监管较为宽松
regulatoryStance.en: Technology export controls aligned with US CHIPS Act, relatively light regulation on AI applications

unit.zh: 美元（AI专项），台积电年资本支出360亿美元为实际AI基础设施投资
unit.en: USD (AI-specific), but TSMC's $36B annual capex is the real AI infrastructure investment

description.zh: 政府支持的繁体中文大语言模型，规模适中但意义重大
description.en: Government-backed Traditional Chinese LLM, modest scale but symbolically significant

products.zh: 全球最先进半导体代工厂，制造所有尖端AI芯片（NVIDIA H100、Apple、AMD），全球AI供应链中最关键企业
products.en: World's most advanced semiconductor foundry manufacturing ALL cutting-edge AI chips (NVIDIA H100, Apple, AMD); THE most critical company in the global AI supply chain

products.zh: AI赋能移动芯片组，全球第四大IC设计公司
products.en: AI-enabled mobile chipsets, world's 4th largest IC design company

products.zh: AI服务器制造（NVIDIA GPU服务器主要代工商）、电子组装
products.en: AI server manufacturing (primary OEM for NVIDIA GPU servers), electronics assembly

role.zh: 台积电创办人，发明晶圆代工模式使全球AI芯片成为可能
role.en: TSMC founder, invented the foundry model that enables all AI chips globally

role.zh: 台积电CEO，管理全球战略重要性最高的科技公司
role.en: TSMC CEO, managing the most strategically important tech company in the world

role.zh: NVIDIA CEO，其所有GPU均由台积电制造
role.en: NVIDIA CEO, whose GPUs are all manufactured by TSMC

computeInfrastructure.zh: 制造全球AI芯片但本土AI算力相对有限，国家高速网络与运算中心提供学术算力
computeInfrastructure.en: Manufactures the world's AI chips but domestic AI compute is relatively limited; National Center for High-performance Computing provides academic compute

talentPool.zh: 世界一流半导体工程师队伍，台大/清大研究实力强，硬件工程文化深厚，软件AI人才相对不足
talentPool.en: World-class semiconductor engineering workforce, strong NTU/NTHU research, deep hardware engineering culture, relatively weaker in software AI talent

globalRanking.zh: 全球AI芯片制造绝对垄断地位，TSMC生产全球约90%的先进制程芯片。
globalRanking.en: Absolute monopoly in AI chip manufacturing; TSMC produces ~90% of the world's advanced-node chips.

outlook.zh: 台湾的'硅盾'战略使其成为全球AI硬件不可替代的环节，但台海地缘政治风险为最大隐忧。
outlook.en: Taiwan's 'silicon shield' strategy makes it an irreplaceable link in global AI hardware, but cross-strait geopolitical risk is the greatest concern.

strengths.zh: 台积电垄断全球先进制程芯片制造
strengths.en: TSMC monopoly on advanced-node chip manufacturing

strengths.zh: 半导体工程人才世界一流
strengths.en: World-class semiconductor engineering talent

strengths.zh: 民主韧性与公民社会活力
strengths.en: Democratic resilience and vibrant civil society

strengths.zh: 全民健保等制度优势
strengths.en: Institutional advantages like universal healthcare

weaknesses.zh: 中国军事威胁为首要生存风险
weaknesses.en: China military threat as primary existential risk

weaknesses.zh: 国内市场规模小
weaknesses.en: Small domestic market

weaknesses.zh: 人才流失与少子化隐忧
weaknesses.en: Brain drain concerns and extremely low birth rate

weaknesses.zh: 晶圆厂用水用电压力
weaknesses.en: Water and power supply pressures for semiconductor fabs

outlook.zh: 在AI时代因半导体不可替代性而地位空前重要，但地缘政治脆弱性仍是最大挑战
outlook.en: Unprecedented importance in the AI era due to semiconductor irreplaceability, but geopolitical vulnerability remains the greatest challenge

ideology.zh: 台湾本土主义、自由主义

relationship.zh: 执政党，推动台湾主体性和深化民主。
relationship.en: Ruling party, promoting Taiwan identity and deepening democracy.

description.zh: 蔡英文任内台湾国际能见度大幅提升，半导体战略地位凸显。2023年面临2024年总统大选，推出赖清德为候选人，主打抗中保台和民主价值路线。
description.en: Under Tsai, Taiwan's international visibility surged and semiconductor strategic importance was highlighted. Facing the 2024 presidential election in 2023, the DPP nominated Lai Ching-te, campaigning on resisting China and defending democratic values.

ideology.zh: 中华民族主义、保守主义

relationship.zh: 最大反对党，主张改善两岸关系。
relationship.en: Largest opposition party, advocating improved cross-strait relations.

description.zh: 国民党推出侯友宜参选2024年总统大选，主打务实两岸路线和改善经济民生。2023年在两岸政策和蓝白合作议题上经历激烈内部辩论，最终蓝白合未能成局。
description.en: KMT nominated Hou Yu-ih for the 2024 presidential election, campaigning on pragmatic cross-strait relations and economic livelihood. Experienced intense internal debate on cross-strait policy and a failed blue-white coalition attempt in 2023.

ideology.zh: 中间路线、务实主义

relationship.zh: 第三势力政党，吸引年轻选民。
relationship.en: Third-force party, attracting young voters.

description.zh: 柯文哲创立的民众党以超越蓝绿对立为号召，2023年柯文哲参选总统获得大量年轻选民支持，蓝白合破局后独立参选，成为撼动台湾两党格局的关键力量。
description.en: Ko Wen-je's TPP positioned itself beyond the blue-green divide. Ko's 2024 presidential bid drew strong youth support in 2023. After the failed blue-white merger, he ran independently, becoming a key force shaking Taiwan's two-party system.

governmentForm.zh: 沙特阿拉伯在2000年前后实行以王室为核心的绝对君主制，国王兼具国家元首与政府最高权威地位。
governmentForm.en: Around 2000, Saudi Arabia was an absolute monarchy centered on the royal family, with the king serving as both head of state and supreme governing authority.

socialStructure.zh: 社会结构以王室、宗教学者、部族网络、商人阶层、国家雇员和外来劳工共同构成。石油财富塑造了高福利与国家分配体系，同时保守宗教规范深刻影响公共生活。外籍劳工在建筑、服务和技术领域占重要比重。
socialStructure.en: The social structure was formed by the royal family, religious scholars, tribal networks, merchant groups, state employees, and foreign labor. Oil wealth shaped a high-welfare and state-distribution system, while conservative religious norms deeply influenced public life. Expatriate labor played a major role in construction, services, and technical sectors.

rulingClass.zh: 统治阶层由沙特王室高级成员、关键部族盟友和瓦哈比宗教建制派组成。王室成员在国防、内政、外交和省级治理中广泛掌权。
rulingClass.en: The ruling class consisted of senior members of the House of Saud, key tribal allies, and the Wahhabi religious establishment. Royal family members held extensive authority in defense, interior affairs, foreign policy, and provincial governance.

succession.zh: 王位继承遵循王室内部协商与长幼资历并重的原则，通常在阿卜杜勒-阿齐兹诸子之间传递。继承安排重视家族共识与政治稳定。
succession.en: Succession followed a royal-family process balancing consultation and seniority, usually passing among the sons of Abdulaziz. The arrangement emphasized family consensus and political stability.

structure.zh: 国家由国王统领，辅以王储、部长会议和宗教司法体系。正式政党和民选议会作用极弱，协商会议主要承担咨询职能。各省由王室任命的省长管理，并与内政体系密切衔接。
structure.en: The state was led by the king, assisted by the crown prince, the Council of Ministers, and a religious judicial system. Formal political parties and elected parliamentary institutions played little role, while the Consultative Council served mainly as an advisory body. Provinces were administered by royal appointees closely linked to the interior system.

function.zh: 统筹国王政令、任命、家族协调和最高层决策。
function.en: Managed royal decrees, appointments, family coordination, and top-level decision-making.

function.zh: 负责治安、警察、边境管制、地方行政与内部安全。
function.en: Oversaw policing, border control, local administration, and internal security.

name.en: Ministry of Petroleum and Mineral Resources

function.zh: 管理石油政策、资源开发与能源收益核心事务。
function.en: Directed oil policy, resource development, and core energy-revenue matters.

function.zh: 维护王室安全、部族平衡和国内战略稳定。
function.en: Maintained royal security, tribal balance, and domestic strategic stability.

localAdmin.zh: 全国分为多个省区，由王室任命的省长治理。地方行政高度中央化，但在实践中需与地方部族、宗教领袖和商业精英协商。
localAdmin.en: The kingdom was divided into provinces governed by royal appointees. Local administration was highly centralized, but in practice required negotiation with tribal, religious, and commercial elites.

legalSystem.zh: 法律体系以伊斯兰教法，特别是罕百里学派解释为基础，并辅以王室法令和行政规章。宗教法院在家庭、道德和部分刑事事务中具有重要地位。
legalSystem.en: The legal system was based on Islamic law, especially Hanbali interpretations, supplemented by royal decrees and administrative regulations. Religious courts held an important role in family, moral, and some criminal matters.

taxationSystem.zh: 国家财政主要依靠石油收入，而非广泛直接税。企业税、关税、宗教捐课与各类收费构成次要来源，公民整体税负相对较低。
taxationSystem.en: State finance relied mainly on oil income rather than broad direct taxation. Corporate taxes, customs duties, religious alms-related levies, and various fees were secondary sources, leaving citizens with a relatively low overall tax burden.

culturalAchievements.zh: 沙特在伊斯兰宗教教育、清真寺建设、阿拉伯出版和麦加麦地那朝觐管理方面具有重要影响力。国家借助石油财富大规模建设交通、大学和宗教文化基础设施。
culturalAchievements.en: Saudi Arabia held major influence in Islamic religious education, mosque construction, Arabic publishing, and the administration of pilgrimage to Mecca and Medina. Using oil wealth, the state heavily invested in transport, universities, and religious-cultural infrastructure.

languageFamily.zh: 闪含语系闪语族，以阿拉伯语为官方语言
languageFamily.en: Afro-Asiatic, Semitic branch, with Arabic as the official language

philosophy.zh: 以逊尼派伊斯兰、瓦哈比宗教思想、阿拉伯君主传统和部族社会价值为核心
philosophy.en: Centered on Sunni Islam, Wahhabi religious thought, Arab monarchical tradition, and tribal social values

gdpDescription.zh: 沙特经济以石油出口为核心，国家收入、投资和消费高度依赖能源价格。尽管制造业和服务业有所扩张，经济结构在2000年前后仍明显单一。
gdpDescription.en: Saudi Arabia’s economy was centered on oil exports, with state revenue, investment, and consumption highly dependent on energy prices. Although manufacturing and services had expanded, the economic structure remained clearly concentrated around hydrocarbons around 2000.

mainIndustries.zh: 石油开采、石化、炼油、建筑、金融服务、宗教朝觐服务
mainIndustries.en: Oil extraction, petrochemicals, refining, construction, financial services, pilgrimage services

tradeGoods.zh: 原油、石化产品、精炼燃料、塑料制品、化肥
tradeGoods.en: Crude oil, petrochemicals, refined fuels, plastics, fertilizer

householdWealth.zh: 本国公民家庭在住房、公共补贴和国家福利方面享有较高保障，但财富在王室、核心商人家族与普通家庭之间差异明显。外来劳工普遍收入较低，财产积累有限。
householdWealth.en: Citizen households enjoyed relatively strong support through housing, public subsidies, and state welfare, but wealth differences between the royal family, major merchant families, and ordinary households were substantial. Foreign workers generally had lower incomes and limited wealth accumulation.

unit.en: US dollars per person per year (nominal, approx.)

economicSystem.zh: 以石油租金为基础的国家主导型资本主义经济
economicSystem.en: A state-led capitalist economy based on oil rent

source.zh: 投资收益与国有企业分红
source.en: Investment income and state enterprise dividends

treasuryDescription.zh: 国库受益于巨额石油收入和海外资产配置，财政缓冲能力显著强于多数地区国家。其弱点在于对国际油价波动的高度敏感。
treasuryDescription.en: The treasury benefited from major oil income and overseas asset holdings, giving it stronger fiscal buffers than most regional states. Its main vulnerability was extreme sensitivity to international oil-price fluctuations.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政政策以石油收益驱动的支出分配、补贴维持和基础设施投资为主，意在确保社会稳定与王室合法性。
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal policy focused on oil-funded expenditure distribution, subsidy maintenance, and infrastructure investment, aimed at preserving social stability and royal legitimacy.

description.zh: 装备现代化程度较高，依赖进口武器与外部训练支持。
description.en: Relatively modernized and dependent on imported weapons and external training support.

description.zh: 拥有先进战机与防空系统，是王国最具威慑力的军种之一。
description.en: Equipped with advanced combat aircraft and air-defense systems, making it one of the kingdom’s most formidable branches.

description.zh: 承担内部安全、王室防卫与关键设施保护任务。
description.en: Handled internal security, royal defense, and protection of key installations.

technology.zh: 军队技术水平较高，主要依赖美国和西方装备，包括现代战机、导弹、防空和指挥系统，但自主军工基础较弱。
technology.en: The military was technologically advanced, relying chiefly on American and other Western equipment, including modern aircraft, missiles, air-defense, and command systems, though its indigenous defense-industrial base was limited.

threats.zh: 主要威胁包括伊拉克局势余波、伊朗地区影响力、海湾安全风险、国内极端主义和石油设施安全。
threats.en: Main threats included the aftereffects of the Iraq crisis, Iranian regional influence, Gulf security risks, domestic extremism, and the security of oil infrastructure.

populationDescription.zh: 全国人口约2100万，其中外籍劳工占相当比例。人口高度集中于利雅得、吉达和东部产油区，整体结构较年轻，城市化程度高。
populationDescription.en: The kingdom had about 21 million people, with foreign workers forming a significant share. Population was concentrated in Riyadh, Jeddah, and the eastern oil-producing region, and the overall structure was young and highly urbanized.

socialClasses.zh: 王室与高层宗教建制、商人和承包商、国家公务员、中产公民、低收入本国劳动者、外籍劳工
socialClasses.en: Royal and senior religious elites, merchants and contractors, state employees, middle-class citizens, lower-income Saudi workers, and foreign laborers

allies.zh: 与美国、海湾阿拉伯国家、埃及和巴基斯坦保持密切安全与战略合作。
allies.en: Maintained close security and strategic ties with the United States, Gulf Arab states, Egypt, and Pakistan.

enemies.zh: 与伊拉克在海湾战争后关系敌对，并对伊朗保持长期战略戒备。
enemies.en: Relations with Iraq remained hostile after the Gulf War, and the kingdom maintained long-term strategic suspicion toward Iran.

foreignPolicy.zh: 外交政策强调维护王室安全、稳定全球能源市场、领导逊尼派阿拉伯阵营并依靠美国安全保护伞。
foreignPolicy.en: Foreign policy emphasized royal security, stability in global energy markets, leadership within the Sunni Arab camp, and reliance on the American security umbrella.

keyInnovations.zh: 大规模油田开发、海水淡化、石化工业、现代机场与通信网络
keyInnovations.en: Large-scale oilfield development, desalination, petrochemicals, and modern airport and communications networks

strengths.zh: 石油储量巨大、财政实力雄厚、宗教圣地地位突出且外部安全支持强大。
strengths.en: It had immense oil reserves, strong fiscal resources, prominent religious legitimacy through the holy cities, and powerful external security backing.

weaknesses.zh: 经济过度依赖石油、政治参与有限、劳动力结构失衡且存在宗教与社会保守压力。
weaknesses.en: The economy was overly dependent on oil, political participation was limited, the labor structure was imbalanced, and social pressures were shaped by religious conservatism.

outlook.zh: 短中期内王国仍将保持繁荣与稳定，但长期发展取决于经济多元化与社会治理调整。
outlook.en: In the short to medium term the kingdom was likely to remain prosperous and stable, but long-term development depended on diversification and social-governance adjustment.

description.zh: 2000年前后的沙特阿拉伯是一个依靠石油财富、王室统治与宗教合法性维系繁荣的海湾君主国。
description.en: Around 2000, Saudi Arabia was a Gulf monarchy whose prosperity rested on oil wealth, royal rule, and religious legitimacy.

ruler.zh: 贾比尔·艾哈迈德·萨巴赫

governmentForm.zh: 君主立宪制酋长国。
governmentForm.en: Constitutional monarchy (emirate).

socialStructure.zh: 科威特公民为少数（约40%），外籍劳工占多数。
socialStructure.en: Kuwaiti citizens minority (~40%); foreign workers majority.

rulingClass.zh: 萨巴赫王室和商人家族。
rulingClass.en: Al-Sabah royal family and merchant families.

succession.zh: 埃米尔世袭。
succession.en: Hereditary emirate.

structure.zh: 君主立宪制，一院制国民议会。
structure.en: Constitutional monarchy; unicameral National Assembly.

function.zh: 石油管理。
function.en: Oil management.

function.zh: 财政。
function.en: Finance.

taxationSystem.zh: 石油收入为主，无所得税。
taxationSystem.en: Oil revenue; no income tax.

culturalAchievements.zh: 海湾石油文化、科威特塔等现代建筑。
culturalAchievements.en: Gulf oil culture; Kuwait Towers modern architecture.

languageFamily.zh: 亚非语系（阿拉伯语）

philosophy.zh: 温和伊斯兰与海湾商人传统。
philosophy.en: Moderate Islam and Gulf merchant tradition.

gdpDescription.zh: 石油富国，从海湾战争中完全恢复。
gdpDescription.en: Oil-rich; fully recovered from Gulf War.

mainIndustries.zh: 石油天然气、石化、金融

householdWealth.zh: 科威特公民极富裕。
householdWealth.en: Citizens extremely wealthy.

economicSystem.zh: 石油主导型国家经济。
economicSystem.en: Oil-dominated state economy.

treasuryDescription.zh: 科威特投资局管理巨额主权基金。

fiscalPolicy.zh: 石油收入分配与储蓄并行。
fiscalPolicy.en: Oil revenue distribution and savings in parallel.

description.zh: 美制装备。
description.en: US-equipped.

technology.zh: 美制先进装备。

threats.zh: 伊拉克潜在威胁。
threats.en: Potential Iraqi threat.

allies.zh: 美国、沙特、英国

foreignPolicy.zh: 亲美安全同盟。
foreignPolicy.en: Pro-US security alliance.

strengths.zh: 巨大石油储量、主权财富基金。
strengths.en: Vast oil reserves; sovereign wealth fund.

weaknesses.zh: 石油依赖、外籍劳工问题、伊拉克威胁。
weaknesses.en: Oil dependency, foreign labor issues, Iraqi threat.

description.zh: 2000年的科威特从海湾战争中完全恢复，石油财富重建。
description.en: Kuwait in 2000: fully recovered from Gulf War; oil wealth rebuilt.

governmentForm.zh: 绝对君主制。
governmentForm.en: Absolute monarchy.

socialStructure.zh: Qatar社会。
socialStructure.en: Qatar society.

rulingClass.zh: 政治精英。
rulingClass.en: Political elites.

succession.zh: 选举或继承。
succession.en: Election or succession.

structure.zh: 政府结构。
structure.en: Government structure.

function.zh: 财政。
function.en: Finance.

function.zh: 安全。
function.en: Security.

taxationSystem.zh: 税收体系。
taxationSystem.en: Tax system.

culturalAchievements.zh: Qatar的文化遗产。
culturalAchievements.en: Cultural heritage of Qatar.

languageFamily.zh: 多语言

philosophy.zh: 社会价值观。
philosophy.en: Social values.

gdpDescription.zh: 经济概况。
gdpDescription.en: Economy overview.

mainIndustries.zh: 石油天然气

householdWealth.zh: 家庭财富。
householdWealth.en: Household wealth.

economicSystem.zh: 经济体制。
economicSystem.en: Economic system.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政政策。
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal policy.

description.zh: 军事力量。
description.en: Military forces.

technology.zh: 军事装备。

description.zh: 2000年的卡塔尔凭借天然气日益富裕。
description.en: Qatar in 2000: increasingly wealthy from natural gas.

governmentForm.zh: 绝对君主制，卡布斯自1970年执政。
governmentForm.en: Absolute monarchy; Qaboos in power since 1970.

socialStructure.zh: 阿拉伯部落社会。
socialStructure.en: Arab tribal society.

rulingClass.zh: 苏丹及王室。
rulingClass.en: Sultan and royal court.

succession.zh: 苏丹指定继承人。
succession.en: Sultan designated successor.

structure.zh: 绝对君主制，协商议会。
structure.en: Absolute monarchy; consultative council.

function.zh: 石油管理。
function.en: Oil management.

taxationSystem.zh: 石油收入。
taxationSystem.en: Oil revenue.

religion.zh: 伊斯兰教（伊巴德派为主）

culturalAchievements.zh: 阿拉伯航海传统、乳香贸易遗产。
culturalAchievements.en: Arab seafaring tradition; frankincense trade heritage.

languageFamily.zh: 亚非语系（阿拉伯语）

philosophy.zh: 伊巴德派温和伊斯兰。
philosophy.en: Ibadi moderate Islam.

gdpDescription.zh: 石油富国，经济多元化努力中。
gdpDescription.en: Oil-rich; diversifying.

mainIndustries.zh: 石油天然气、渔业、旅游

householdWealth.zh: 公民生活水平高。
householdWealth.en: Citizens enjoy high living standards.

economicSystem.zh: 国家石油经济。
economicSystem.en: State oil economy.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 石油收入储蓄。
fiscalPolicy.en: Oil revenue savings.

description.zh: 英式装备。
description.en: British equipment.

technology.zh: 英制和美制装备。

allies.zh: 英国、美国、海湾国家

foreignPolicy.zh: 温和务实外交。
foreignPolicy.en: Moderate pragmatic diplomacy.

strengths.zh: 石油、战略位置、稳定。
strengths.en: Oil, strategic location, stability.

weaknesses.zh: 石油依赖、外籍劳工、继承不确定。
weaknesses.en: Oil dependency, foreign labor, succession uncertainty.

description.zh: 2000年的阿曼在卡布斯领导下稳定繁荣。
description.en: Oman in 2000: stable and prosperous under Sultan Qaboos.

dynasty.zh: 民主化后第三共和时期

governmentForm.zh: 半总统制共和国，总统与总理并立，国家大呼拉尔（议会）为最高立法机关。
governmentForm.en: Semi-presidential republic with a president and prime minister; the State Great Khural (parliament) serves as the supreme legislative body.

socialStructure.zh: 城乡二元结构突出，乌兰巴托集中全国近半人口，游牧民与城市中产阶级并存。
socialStructure.en: Pronounced urban-rural duality, with nearly half the national population concentrated in Ulaanbaatar; nomadic herders coexist with an urban middle class.

rulingClass.zh: 民选总统与总理、国家大呼拉尔议员、矿业利益集团与前国企管理层。
rulingClass.en: Elected president and prime minister, Great Khural members, mining interest groups, and former state enterprise management.

succession.zh: 总统由全民直选产生，任期六年，不可连任。
succession.en: The president is directly elected for a six-year term, non-renewable.

structure.zh: 半总统制，总统为国家元首，总理领导内阁，国家大呼拉尔（76席）为一院制议会。
structure.en: Semi-presidential system: the president is head of state, the prime minister leads the cabinet, and the State Great Khural (76 seats) is a unicameral parliament.

function.zh: 管理国家财政预算、税收政策与矿业收入分配。
function.en: Manages the national budget, tax policy, and mining revenue distribution.

name.en: Ministry of Mining and Heavy Industry

function.zh: 监管采矿许可、矿产开发与重工业政策。
function.en: Oversees mining licenses, mineral development, and heavy industry policy.

name.en: Ministry of Digital Development and Communications

function.zh: 推进数字基础设施建设、电子政务与ICT产业发展。
function.en: Advances digital infrastructure, e-government, and ICT industry development.

function.zh: 负责国家安全、军队管理与联合国维和任务协调。
function.en: Handles national security, military administration, and coordination of UN peacekeeping missions.

localAdmin.zh: 全国分21个省（aimag）和首都乌兰巴托市，各省设省长与地方议会，牧区基层为苏木（乡）。
localAdmin.en: Divided into 21 provinces (aimags) and the capital Ulaanbaatar, each with a governor and local council; rural grassroots units are soums (districts).

legalSystem.zh: 大陆法系，以1992年民主宪法为根本法，司法独立程度有限。
legalSystem.en: Civil law system based on the 1992 democratic constitution, with limited judicial independence.

taxationSystem.zh: 以企业所得税（标准税率25%）、个人所得税（10%）和矿业特许权使用费为主要税源。
taxationSystem.en: Main tax sources include corporate income tax (standard 25%), personal income tax (10%), and mining royalties.

religion.zh: 藏传佛教为主（约53%），萨满教传统犹存，少数信仰伊斯兰教（哈萨克族）
religion.en: Tibetan Buddhism predominant (~53%), shamanic traditions persist, small Muslim minority (Kazakh ethnic group)

philosophy.zh: 游牧民族自由精神与成吉思汗崇拜交织，民主价值观与传统草原文化并存。
philosophy.en: Nomadic spirit of freedom intertwined with Genghis Khan reverence; democratic values coexist with traditional steppe culture.

writingSystem.zh: 蒙古西里尔字母为主，传统蒙古文字复兴运动推进中
writingSystem.en: Mongolian Cyrillic script primarily, with an ongoing revival movement for the traditional Mongolian script

culturalAchievements.zh: 呼麦（喉音唱法）被列为世界非物质文化遗产，那达慕大会、马头琴音乐传统享誉国际。
culturalAchievements.en: Khoomei (throat singing) inscribed as UNESCO Intangible Cultural Heritage; Naadam Festival and morin khuur (horse-head fiddle) music traditions are internationally renowned.

languageFamily.zh: 阿尔泰语系蒙古语族（蒙古语为官方语言）
languageFamily.en: Altaic, Mongolic branch (Mongolian as the official language)

gdpDescription.zh: 矿业驱动型经济，铜矿（奥尤陶勒盖）与煤矿出口占GDP大部分。经济易受大宗商品价格波动与对华出口依赖影响。
gdpDescription.en: Mining-driven economy with copper (Oyu Tolgoi) and coal exports comprising the bulk of GDP. The economy is vulnerable to commodity price swings and heavy dependence on exports to China.

mainIndustries.zh: 铜矿开采、煤炭出口、畜牧业（羊绒）、建筑业、零售服务
mainIndustries.en: Copper mining, coal exports, livestock (cashmere), construction, retail services

tradeGoods.zh: 铜精矿、焦煤、羊绒、黄金、铁矿石、石油
tradeGoods.en: Copper concentrate, coking coal, cashmere, gold, iron ore, crude oil

householdWealth.zh: 家庭财富中位数低，城乡差距巨大。乌兰巴托居民收入远高于牧区，矿业繁荣带动部分中产崛起。
householdWealth.en: Low median household wealth with a vast urban-rural gap. Ulaanbaatar residents earn far more than herders; mining booms have fueled a partial middle-class rise.

tradeRoutes.zh: 对华贸易占出口约90%，矿产品经铁路南下至中国；与俄罗斯有传统贸易通道。
tradeRoutes.en: China accounts for ~90% of exports, with minerals shipped south via railway; traditional trade routes with Russia also exist.

economicSystem.zh: 市场经济体制，政府通过矿业法规与国有企业保留关键产业控制权，国际货币基金组织提供宏观稳定支持。
economicSystem.en: Market economy with the government retaining control of key sectors through mining regulations and state enterprises; the IMF provides macro-stability support.

source.zh: 矿业税收与特许权使用费

treasuryDescription.zh: 外汇储备约42亿美元，蒙古银行持有一定黄金储备；财政状况因矿业周期波动。
treasuryDescription.en: Foreign reserves approximately $4.2 billion; the Bank of Mongolia holds gold reserves; fiscal position fluctuates with mining cycles.

displayNote.zh: 外债约占GDP的190%，债务负担较重。
displayNote.en: External debt approximately 190% of GDP, a heavy debt burden.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政稳定法限制赤字，通过人类发展基金（矿业收益）向公民分红，近年依赖IMF援助恢复财政纪律。
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal Stability Law limits deficits; citizen dividends via the Human Development Fund (mining revenues); recent IMF assistance to restore fiscal discipline.

description.zh: 轻型机械化部队为主，配备苏联时期装甲车辆与少量现代化装备。
description.en: Primarily light mechanized units equipped with Soviet-era armored vehicles and limited modernized equipment.

description.zh: 小型空军，运输机与直升机为主，无现代战斗机。
description.en: Small air force focused on transport aircraft and helicopters, without modern fighter jets.

commanderInChief.zh: 总统乌赫那·呼日勒苏赫

technology.zh: 以苏联遗留装备为主，部分接受美国、日本与韩国军事援助进行现代化升级，积极参与联合国维和行动。
technology.en: Primarily Soviet-legacy equipment, with partial modernization via US, Japanese, and Korean military aid; active participation in UN peacekeeping operations.

threats.zh: 夹在中俄两大国之间，战略空间有限；无直接军事威胁但地缘依赖性强。
threats.en: Sandwiched between China and Russia with limited strategic space; no direct military threat but high geopolitical dependence.

recentBattles.zh: 无近期战斗，积极参与联合国维和行动（阿富汗、南苏丹等），被誉为人均维和贡献最高的国家之一。
recentBattles.en: No recent combat; actively participates in UN peacekeeping (Afghanistan, South Sudan, etc.), recognized as one of the highest per-capita peacekeeping contributors.

populationDescription.zh: 世界人口密度最低的国家之一（约2人/平方公里），人口年轻化，乌兰巴托集中约150万人口。
populationDescription.en: One of the world's least densely populated countries (~2 people/km²), with a young population; about 1.5 million concentrated in Ulaanbaatar.

ethnicGroups.zh: 喀尔喀蒙古族（约85%）、哈萨克族（约4%）、布里亚特族及其他少数民族
ethnicGroups.en: Khalkha Mongols (~85%), Kazakhs (~4%), Buriats, and other minorities

socialClasses.zh: 矿业精英与政商阶层、城市中产阶级、蒙古包（格尔区）贫民、游牧牧民。
socialClasses.en: Mining elites and political-business class, urban middle class, ger-district poor, nomadic herders.

allies.zh: 与中俄均保持友好关系，美国、日本、韩国、印度为'第三邻国'外交重要对象。
allies.en: Maintains friendly relations with both China and Russia; the US, Japan, South Korea, and India are key 'third neighbor' diplomatic partners.

enemies.zh: 无明确敌对国家，但受中俄战略挤压。
enemies.en: No explicit adversaries, but faces strategic pressure from China and Russia.

treaties.zh: 中蒙友好合作条约、俄蒙友好条约、美蒙战略伙伴关系、参与亚洲基础设施投资银行。
treaties.en: China-Mongolia Treaty of Friendship, Russia-Mongolia Treaty of Friendship, US-Mongolia Strategic Partnership, AIIB membership.

foreignPolicy.zh: '第三邻国'政策平衡中俄影响力，积极参与多边主义与联合国事务，推动矿业外交。
foreignPolicy.en: 'Third neighbor' policy to balance Chinese and Russian influence; active multilateralism and UN engagement; mining diplomacy.

recentDiplomaticEvents.zh: 2023年推进与美日韩深化合作，力拓奥尤陶勒盖铜金矿全面投产引发中蒙经济合作关注。
recentDiplomaticEvents.en: Deepened cooperation with the US, Japan, and South Korea in 2023; the full commissioning of Rio Tinto's Oyu Tolgoi copper-gold mine drew attention to China-Mongolia economic ties.

keyInnovations.zh: 移动支付普及率较高、电子政务推进、光纤网络覆盖主要城市、数字游牧文化吸引国际远程工作者。
keyInnovations.en: High mobile payment adoption, e-government advancement, fiber-optic coverage of major cities, and digital nomad culture attracting international remote workers.

infrastructure.zh: 乌兰巴托4G/部分5G覆盖，农牧区通信基础设施薄弱；铁路与公路网络有限。
infrastructure.en: 4G/partial 5G coverage in Ulaanbaatar, weak rural telecommunications infrastructure; limited railway and road networks.

policy.zh: 2022年发布《蒙古国人工智能国家计划》，旨在推动AI在公共服务与矿业中的应用，但尚处起步阶段。
policy.en: Released the 'National AI Program of Mongolia' in 2022, aiming to promote AI in public services and mining, but still in its infancy.

regulatoryStance.zh: 尚无专门AI法规，依赖现有数据保护与网络安全法律框架。
regulatoryStance.en: No dedicated AI regulations yet; relies on existing data protection and cybersecurity legal frameworks.

investmentScale.zh: AI领域投资极少，主要依赖国际开发机构（亚洲开发银行、世界银行）数字化项目资金。
investmentScale.en: Minimal AI investment, primarily relying on international development agencies (ADB, World Bank) for digitalization project funding.

keyProducts.zh: 移动通信、互联网服务、初步数字化方案
keyProducts.en: Mobile telecom, internet services, early-stage digitalization solutions

researchFocus.zh: 矿业数据分析、自然语言处理（蒙古语）的初步探索。
researchFocus.en: Preliminary exploration of mining data analytics and NLP for the Mongolian language.

computeInfrastructure.zh: 极为有限，无大规模数据中心或GPU集群，依赖云服务提供商。
computeInfrastructure.en: Extremely limited; no large-scale data centers or GPU clusters; reliant on cloud service providers.

talentPool.zh: AI人才稀缺，少数留学归国人员与大学研究者，蒙古国立大学设有计算机科学系。
talentPool.en: Scarce AI talent; a small number of returnees and university researchers; the National University of Mongolia has a computer science department.

globalRanking.zh: 全球AI竞争力排名较低，属边缘参与者。
globalRanking.en: Low global AI competitiveness ranking; a peripheral participant.

outlook.zh: 矿业数字化与牧业智能化提供应用场景，但人才匮乏与资金不足制约AI发展前景。
outlook.en: Mining digitalization and smart herding offer application scenarios, but talent shortages and funding constraints limit AI development prospects.

strengths.zh: 丰富矿产资源、战略性地理位置、年轻人口结构、民主治理经验。
strengths.en: Rich mineral resources, strategic geographic location, young demographic structure, democratic governance experience.

weaknesses.zh: 经济过度依赖矿业、地缘政治受中俄制约、基础设施薄弱、人才外流严重。
weaknesses.en: Over-reliance on mining, geopolitically constrained by China and Russia, weak infrastructure, severe brain drain.

outlook.zh: 若能实现经济多元化并善用'第三邻国'外交，蒙古有潜力成为中亚连接枢纽。
outlook.en: If it can diversify its economy and leverage 'third neighbor' diplomacy, Mongolia has potential to become a Central Asian connectivity hub.

description.zh: 2023年的蒙古国是一个夹在中俄之间的年轻民主国家，依靠丰富矿产资源驱动经济发展。奥尤陶勒盖铜金矿全面投产提振经济，'第三邻国'外交策略努力在大国博弈中寻求平衡。AI领域几乎空白，但数字游牧文化为其带来独特的国际科技联系。
description.en: Mongolia in 2023 is a young democracy sandwiched between China and Russia, with an economy driven by rich mineral resources. The full commissioning of the Oyu Tolgoi copper-gold mine boosts the economy, while a 'third neighbor' diplomatic strategy seeks balance amid great-power competition. The AI sector is virtually nonexistent, but a digital nomad culture provides unique international tech connections.

dynasty.zh: 曼谷王朝后期立宪君主制时期
dynasty.en: Late Chakri Era under constitutional monarchy

governmentForm.zh: 泰国在2000年前后实行以国王为国家元首、民选政府执政的立宪君主制。
governmentForm.en: Around 2000, Thailand functioned as a constitutional monarchy with the king as head of state and an elected government exercising executive power.

socialStructure.zh: 社会由王室、军方、官僚、城市中产、商人、农民和劳工构成，阶层分化较明显。曼谷在政治、经济与文化上居于绝对中心，东北与北部农村地区则在收入和基础设施上相对落后。佛教僧团、学校体系与地方网络在社会整合中作用重要。
socialStructure.en: Society was composed of the monarchy, military, bureaucracy, urban middle classes, merchants, peasants, and laborers, with clear social stratification. Bangkok stood as the overwhelming political, economic, and cultural center, while the rural northeast and north lagged in income and infrastructure. The Buddhist sangha, school system, and local networks played major roles in social integration.

rulingClass.zh: 统治阶层由王室、军方高层、中央官僚、大型财团和主要政党领袖共同组成。国王普密蓬虽不直接日常执政，却拥有极高道德威望与政治影响力。
rulingClass.en: The ruling class consisted of the monarchy, senior military officers, central bureaucrats, major business conglomerates, and leading party politicians. King Bhumibol did not govern day to day, but he possessed immense moral authority and political influence.

succession.zh: 王位依王室继承法传承，政府首脑则通过议会选举与组阁程序产生。政治危机时，军方与王室影响常对权力更替产生关键作用。
succession.en: The throne passed according to royal succession law, while the head of government emerged through parliamentary elections and cabinet formation. In times of political crisis, the influence of the military and monarchy often played a decisive role in transfers of power.

structure.zh: 国家制度由君主、国会、内阁、司法机关和以曼谷为核心的中央官僚体系构成。1997年宪法后，泰国加强了代议制、政党政治和独立机构建设。尽管如此，军方仍保有潜在的政治干预能力。
structure.en: The state system consisted of the monarch, parliament, cabinet, judiciary, and a Bangkok-centered central bureaucracy. After the 1997 constitution, Thailand strengthened representative institutions, party politics, and independent agencies. Even so, the military retained latent capacity for political intervention.

function.zh: 管理省级行政、治安协调与地方治理。
function.en: Managed provincial administration, security coordination, and local governance.

function.zh: 负责预算、税收、国债和财政政策。
function.en: Handled budgeting, taxation, public debt, and fiscal policy.

function.zh: 统筹国防事务并协调三军。
function.en: Oversaw defense matters and coordinated the armed forces.

function.zh: 主管基础教育、高等教育政策与教师体系。
function.en: Oversaw basic education, higher education policy, and the teaching system.

localAdmin.zh: 地方行政分为府、县与乡镇，长期由中央官僚体系深度控制。至2000年前后，地方选举与部分自治逐渐扩大，但曼谷的统筹地位仍然突出。
localAdmin.en: Local administration was divided into provinces, districts, and subdistricts, and had long been tightly controlled by the central bureaucracy. By around 2000, local elections and some autonomy had expanded, but Bangkok's coordinating role remained dominant.

legalSystem.zh: 法律体系以大陆法传统为基础，并受现代成文法与王室法制传统影响。宪法法院和行政法院等新机构在1997年后地位上升。
legalSystem.en: The legal system was based on civil-law traditions, shaped by modern statutory law and royal legal traditions. New institutions such as the Constitutional Court and Administrative Court gained importance after 1997.

taxationSystem.zh: 税制以增值税、企业所得税、个人所得税和消费税为主，征收能力在东南亚属较强水平。出口导向产业和城市消费为税基的重要来源。
taxationSystem.en: The tax system relied mainly on VAT, corporate income tax, personal income tax, and excise taxes, with comparatively strong collection capacity by Southeast Asian standards. Export-oriented industry and urban consumption formed major parts of the tax base.

culturalAchievements.zh: 泰国在佛教建筑、宫廷艺术、影视音乐、旅游文化与饮食传统方面拥有广泛国际影响。20世纪末其大众文化、广告与商业媒体在区域内也相当活跃。
culturalAchievements.en: Thailand possessed broad international influence in Buddhist architecture, court arts, film and music, tourism culture, and culinary traditions. By the late 20th century, its popular culture, advertising, and commercial media were also highly active within the region.

languageFamily.zh: 泰语属台-卡岱语系，全国亦有华语、马来语及山地民族语言。
languageFamily.en: Thai belongs to the Tai-Kadai language family, while Chinese varieties, Malay, and upland minority languages were also spoken.

philosophy.zh: 国家文化以君主忠诚、上座部佛教伦理和泰民族认同相结合为核心。
philosophy.en: National culture centered on a combination of loyalty to the monarchy, Theravada Buddhist ethics, and Thai national identity.

writingSystem.zh: 使用泰文字母书写泰语。
writingSystem.en: Thai was written in the Thai script.

gdpDescription.zh: 泰国经济在亚洲金融危机后已逐步复苏，制造业、旅游业和出口农业仍是主要支柱。其金融体系经过重组后较1998年趋于稳定，但对外需与资本流动依赖仍高。
gdpDescription.en: Thailand's economy was gradually recovering after the Asian financial crisis, with manufacturing, tourism, and export agriculture remaining key pillars.
