Economy highly dependent on gas exports (mainly to China), with extremely opaque official data. Internet strictly censored, tight social information blockade. As a UN-recognized permanently neutral state, Turkmenistan joins no military alliances. Ashgabat's white marble buildings are the most internationally recognized image of this closed country.

governmentForm.zh: 总统制共和国。2020年第三次「颜色革命」后扎帕罗夫上台，2021年修宪恢复强总统制。中亚唯一经历过多次政权更迭的国家。
governmentForm.en: Presidential republic. Japarov came to power after 2020 third 'color revolution', 2021 constitutional amendments restored strong presidency. Only Central Asian country with multiple regime changes.

socialStructure.zh: 南北部族对立是政治主线。游牧传统深刻影响社会结构。公民社会相对于中亚其他国家较为活跃。
socialStructure.en: North-south tribal rivalry is political mainline. Nomadic traditions deeply influence social structure. Civil society relatively active compared to other Central Asian countries.

rulingClass.zh: 扎帕罗夫及其民族主义盟友、安全机构、南方部族精英。
rulingClass.en: Japarov and nationalist allies, security apparatus, southern tribal elites.

succession.zh: 中亚唯一通过革命实现多次政权更迭的国家（2005、2010、2020年），但民主化有限。
succession.en: Only Central Asian country with multiple revolutionary regime changes (2005, 2010, 2020), but limited democratization.

structure.zh: 2021年修宪后恢复强总统制，削弱议会权力。
structure.en: Strong presidency restored after 2021 constitutional amendments, weakened parliament.

function.zh: 国家决策核心。
function.en: Core of state decisions.

function.zh: 管理国内安全与情报。
function.en: Managing domestic security and intelligence.

localAdmin.zh: 全国分7个州与2个直辖市（比什凯克与奥什）。地方自治相对发展。
localAdmin.en: 7 regions and 2 cities (Bishkek and Osh). Relatively developed local autonomy.

legalSystem.zh: 大陆法系，司法独立性相对于邻国略好但仍不足。
legalSystem.en: Civil law system, judicial independence slightly better than neighbors but still insufficient.

taxationSystem.zh: 税收体系较为简化，企业税10%。对采矿业征收特别税。
taxationSystem.en: Simplified tax system, corporate tax 10%. Special taxes on mining industry.

religion.zh: 逊尼派伊斯兰教（约80%），世俗传统较强。游牧文化影响深远。
religion.en: Sunni Islam (~80%), strong secular tradition. Deep nomadic cultural influence.

philosophy.zh: 游牧自由传统与苏联遗产结合。《玛纳斯》史诗是民族精神支柱。
philosophy.en: Nomadic freedom tradition combined with Soviet legacy. Manas epic as pillar of national spirit.

writingSystem.zh: 西里尔字母（暂无拉丁化计划）。

culturalAchievements.zh: 《玛纳斯》史诗（世界最长史诗之一）、传统毡房文化、天山自然遗产、世界游牧民族运动会。
culturalAchievements.en: Manas epic (one of world's longest epics), traditional yurt culture, Tian Shan natural heritage, World Nomad Games.

languageFamily.zh: 吉尔吉斯语（突厥语族），俄语为官方语言。
languageFamily.en: Kyrgyz (Turkic family), Russian as official language.

gdpDescription.zh: 中亚较贫困国家之一。经济依赖黄金开采（库姆托金矿）、水电、农业和海外劳工汇款（占GDP约30%）。
gdpDescription.en: One of Central Asia's poorer countries. Economy dependent on gold mining (Kumtor), hydropower, agriculture, and overseas worker remittances (~30% of GDP).

mainIndustries.zh: 黄金开采（库姆托金矿）、水电、农牧业、轻工业
mainIndustries.en: Gold mining (Kumtor), hydropower, agriculture and livestock, light industry

tradeGoods.zh: 黄金、电力、农产品、纺织品

economicSystem.zh: 中亚经济最开放的国家之一。高度依赖海外劳工汇款与外国援助。
economicSystem.en: One of Central Asia's most open economies. Highly dependent on overseas worker remittances and foreign aid.

debtLevel.zh: 公共债务约55%GDP，对外债依赖度高。
debtLevel.en: Public debt ~55% GDP, high dependence on external debt.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 依赖国际贷款（世界银行/亚开行）与外国援助。
fiscalPolicy.en: Dependent on international loans (World Bank/ADB) and foreign aid.

description.zh: 规模较小，苏联遗留装备。
description.en: Small scale, Soviet-era equipment.

description.zh: 少量苏制直升机与运输机。
description.en: Small number of Soviet helicopters and transports.

description.zh: 边防与国内安全力量。
description.en: Border and domestic security forces.

commanderInChief.zh: 总统兼任武装力量最高统帅

threats.zh: 与塔吉克斯坦边境武装冲突、费尔干纳盆地族群紧张、国内政治不稳定。
threats.en: Border armed conflicts with Tajikistan, Fergana Valley ethnic tensions, domestic political instability.

recentBattles.zh: 2022年吉尔吉斯-塔吉克边境武装冲突（约100人死亡），2020年「颜色革命」。
recentBattles.en: 2022 Kyrgyzstan-Tajikistan border armed conflict (~100 killed), 2020 'color revolution'.

populationDescription.zh: 人口约690万。吉尔吉斯族约73%、乌兹别克族约15%。南方费尔干纳地区乌兹别克族集中。
populationDescription.en: Population ~6.9M. Kyrgyz ~73%, Uzbeks ~15%. Uzbeks concentrated in southern Fergana region.

ethnicGroups.zh: 吉尔吉斯族（约73%）、乌兹别克族（约15%）、俄罗斯族（约5%）等。

allies.zh: 俄罗斯（CSTO成员/军事基地所在国）、中国（经济伙伴）。在大国间平衡。
allies.en: Russia (CSTO member/military base host), China (economic partner). Balancing among great powers.

enemies.zh: 无正式敌国。与塔吉克斯坦存在边境争端。
enemies.en: No formal enemies. Border disputes with Tajikistan.

foreignPolicy.zh: 在俄罗斯安全保障与中国经济影响之间平衡。CSTO与EAEU成员。
foreignPolicy.en: Balancing between Russian security guarantee and Chinese economic influence. CSTO and EAEU member.

keyInnovations.zh: 水电技术、小规模IT创业生态。
keyInnovations.en: Hydropower technology, small-scale IT startup ecosystem.

infrastructure.zh: 基础设施落后，山地地形制约交通发展。互联网普及率约70%。
infrastructure.en: Underdeveloped infrastructure, mountainous terrain constrains transport. Internet penetration ~70%.

outlook.zh: AI发展极为初期，缺乏资金、人才和基础设施。
outlook.en: Extremely early AI development, lacking funding, talent, and infrastructure.

strengths.zh: 水电资源丰富、公民社会相对活跃、天山自然旅游资源、年轻人口。
strengths.en: Rich hydropower resources, relatively active civil society, Tian Shan tourism, young population.

weaknesses.zh: 政治不稳定、经济落后、与塔吉克边境冲突、海外劳工依赖。
weaknesses.en: Political instability, economic underdevelopment, Tajikistan border conflicts, overseas labor dependence.

outlook.zh: 中亚民主化程度最高但也最不稳定的国家。经济发展依赖外部援助与劳工汇款。
outlook.en: Most democratized but also most unstable Central Asian country. Economic development depends on external aid and remittances.

description.zh: 2023年的吉尔吉斯斯坦是中亚唯一经历过三次政权更迭（2005、2010、2020年）的国家，扎帕罗夫总统在2021年修宪恢复强总统制。经济高度依赖黄金开采（库姆托金矿）和海外劳工汇款。与塔吉克斯坦的边境冲突（2022年）造成约百人死亡。《玛纳斯》史诗和游牧文化是民族精神支柱。作为中亚最开放和公民社会最活跃的国家，吉尔吉斯斯坦在民主化与稳定之间持续摇摆。
description.en: Kyrgyzstan in 2023 is the only Central Asian country with three regime changes (2005, 2010, 2020), with President Japarov restoring strong presidency through 2021 constitutional amendments. Economy highly dependent on gold mining (Kumtor) and overseas worker remittances. Border conflict with Tajikistan (2022) killed ~100. Manas epic and nomadic culture are pillars of national spirit. As Central Asia's most open country with the most active civil society, Kyrgyzstan continues swinging between democratization and stability.

governmentForm.zh: 高度威权总统制。拉赫蒙自1994年执政近30年，被授予「民族领袖」终身称号。长子鲁斯塔姆被视为可能接班人。
governmentForm.en: Highly authoritarian presidential system. Rahmon in power since 1994 for nearly 30 years, granted lifelong 'Leader of the Nation' title. Eldest son Rustam seen as potential successor.

socialStructure.zh: 以地区和氏族网络为基础。北方列宁纳巴德派与南方库利亚布派（拉赫蒙所属）长期竞争。1992-1997年内战创伤深远。
socialStructure.en: Based on regional and clan networks. Northern Leninabad faction vs. southern Kulyab faction (Rahmon's) long-term competition. 1992-1997 civil war left deep scars.

rulingClass.zh: 拉赫蒙家族（大量家族成员占据要职）、库利亚布派系精英、安全机构。
rulingClass.en: Rahmon family (many family members in key positions), Kulyab faction elites, security apparatus.

succession.zh: 拉赫蒙长子鲁斯塔姆·埃莫马利已任杜尚别市长和上院议长，被视为准备接班。
succession.en: Rahmon's eldest son Rustam Emomali serves as Dushanbe mayor and Senate speaker, seen as being groomed for succession.

structure.zh: 强总统制，议会功能弱化。安全机构权力庞大。
structure.en: Strong presidency, weakened parliament. Security apparatus holds extensive power.

function.zh: 国家决策核心。
function.en: Core of state decisions.

function.zh: 管理国内安全、情报与反伊斯兰极端主义。
function.en: Managing domestic security, intelligence, and anti-Islamic extremism.

localAdmin.zh: 全国分4个州（含戈尔诺-巴达赫尚自治州）。中央控制强但山区治理困难。
localAdmin.en: 4 regions (including Gorno-Badakhshan Autonomous Region). Strong central control but mountainous governance challenges.

legalSystem.zh: 苏联遗产法律体系，司法受行政强烈影响。
legalSystem.en: Soviet-legacy legal system, judiciary strongly influenced by executive.

taxationSystem.zh: 税收体系不完善，依赖铝业出口收入和外国援助。
taxationSystem.en: Incomplete tax system, dependent on aluminum export revenue and foreign aid.

religion.zh: 逊尼派伊斯兰教为主（约96%），帕米尔地区有伊斯玛仪派少数群体。宗教活动受严格管控。
religion.en: Sunni Islam predominant (~96%), Ismaili minority in Pamir region. Religious activities strictly controlled.

philosophy.zh: 波斯文化传统——塔吉克人是中亚唯一的波斯语系民族。以波斯诗人鲁达基和伊本·西那为文化骄傲。
philosophy.en: Persian cultural tradition — Tajiks are Central Asia's only Persian-speaking people. Cultural pride in Persian poets Rudaki and Ibn Sina.

culturalAchievements.zh: 波斯文学传统、帕米尔高原自然遗产、传统音乐（shashmaqam与法拉比传统）。
culturalAchievements.en: Persian literary tradition, Pamir Plateau natural heritage, traditional music (shashmaqam and Falaki tradition).

languageFamily.zh: 塔吉克语（波斯语变体，印欧语系伊朗语族），俄语广泛使用。
languageFamily.en: Tajik (Persian variant, Indo-European Iranian branch), Russian widely used.

gdpDescription.zh: 中亚最贫困国家之一。经济严重依赖海外劳工汇款（主要在俄罗斯务工，占GDP约30%）和铝业出口。罗贡大坝项目是最大基建工程。
gdpDescription.en: One of Central Asia's poorest countries. Economy heavily dependent on overseas worker remittances (mainly working in Russia, ~30% of GDP) and aluminum exports. Rogun Dam is largest infrastructure project.

mainIndustries.zh: 铝冶炼、水电、棉花、农业

economicSystem.zh: 国家主导经济，铝业由国有企业TALCO垄断。高度依赖外国援助与劳工汇款。
economicSystem.en: State-dominated economy, aluminum industry monopolized by SOE TALCO. Highly dependent on foreign aid and remittances.

debtLevel.zh: 公共债务约40%GDP。罗贡大坝为最大财政负担。
debtLevel.en: Public debt ~40% GDP. Rogun Dam as biggest fiscal burden.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 依赖国际贷款（中国/世界银行）与外国援助。罗贡大坝建设消耗大量财政资源。
fiscalPolicy.en: Dependent on international loans (China/World Bank) and foreign aid. Rogun Dam construction consuming significant fiscal resources.

description.zh: 苏联遗留装备，维护水平低。阿富汗边境防御为重点。
description.en: Soviet-era equipment, low maintenance. Afghan border defense as priority.

description.zh: 边防与国内安全力量。帕米尔地区维稳为重点。
description.en: Border and domestic security. Pamir region stability as priority.

commanderInChief.zh: 总统兼任武装力量最高统帅

threats.zh: 阿富汗塔利班外溢风险（1400公里边境）、吉尔吉斯斯坦边境冲突、帕米尔地区不稳定、伊斯兰极端主义渗透。
threats.en: Afghan Taliban spillover risk (1,400km border), Kyrgyzstan border conflicts, Pamir region instability, Islamic extremism infiltration.

recentBattles.zh: 2022年与吉尔吉斯斯坦边境武装冲突。2022年戈尔诺-巴达赫尚自治州骚乱镇压。
recentBattles.en: 2022 border armed conflict with Kyrgyzstan. 2022 Gorno-Badakhshan unrest suppression.

populationDescription.zh: 人口约1010万。塔吉克族约84%。中亚人口增长率最高，中位年龄最年轻（约22岁）。
populationDescription.en: Population ~10.1M. Tajiks ~84%. Highest population growth and youngest median age (~22) in Central Asia.

ethnicGroups.zh: 塔吉克族（约84%）、乌兹别克族（约14%）等。

allies.zh: 俄罗斯（CSTO成员/军事基地所在国）、中国（经济与基建伙伴/上合组织成员）。
allies.en: Russia (CSTO member/military base host), China (economic/infrastructure partner/SCO member).

enemies.zh: 无正式敌国。与吉尔吉斯斯坦存在边境争端。对阿富汗塔利班高度警惕。
enemies.en: No formal enemies. Border disputes with Kyrgyzstan. Highly vigilant toward Afghan Taliban.

foreignPolicy.zh: 高度依赖俄罗斯安全保障（第201军事基地驻扎）和中国经济援助。
foreignPolicy.en: Highly dependent on Russian security guarantee (201st military base) and Chinese economic aid.

keyInnovations.zh: 罗贡大坝建设（建成后将是世界最高大坝335米）、水电技术。
keyInnovations.en: Rogun Dam construction (will be world's tallest at 335m when complete), hydropower technology.

infrastructure.zh: 基础设施落后，山地地形严重制约交通。互联网普及率约40%。冬季能源短缺严重。
infrastructure.en: Underdeveloped infrastructure, mountainous terrain severely constrains transport. Internet penetration ~40%. Severe winter energy shortages.

policy.zh: 无专门AI政策。数字化发展极为滞后。
policy.en: No AI-specific policies. Digital development extremely lagging.

outlook.zh: AI发展条件极为匮乏，短期内不具备发展基础。
outlook.en: Extremely lacking AI development conditions, no development basis in short term.

strengths.zh: 水电资源潜力巨大（罗贡大坝）、年轻人口、与中俄战略合作。
strengths.en: Enormous hydropower potential (Rogun Dam), young population, strategic cooperation with China and Russia.

weaknesses.zh: 极度贫困、威权统治近30年、阿富汗边境安全威胁、内战创伤未愈、人才大量外流。
weaknesses.en: Extreme poverty, nearly 30 years of authoritarian rule, Afghan border security threats, unhealed civil war scars, massive brain drain.

outlook.zh: 罗贡大坝如能建成将是经济转型希望，但政治封闭与贫困仍是长期障碍。
outlook.en: Rogun Dam completion would be hope for economic transformation, but political closure and poverty remain long-term obstacles.

description.zh: 2023年的塔吉克斯坦是中亚最贫困国家之一，拉赫蒙总统执政近30年。经济严重依赖海外劳工汇款（主要在俄罗斯务工）和铝业出口。与阿富汗共享1400公里边境，塔利班回归后安全压力加大。罗贡大坝——计划中的世界最高大坝——是最大国家工程。1992-1997年内战的创伤仍影响着社会结构。塔吉克人作为中亚唯一波斯语系民族，拥有深厚的波斯文化传统。
description.en: Tajikistan in 2023 is one of Central Asia's poorest countries, with President Rahmon in power for nearly 30 years. Economy heavily dependent on overseas worker remittances (mainly in Russia) and aluminum exports. Shares 1,400km border with Afghanistan, with increased security pressure after Taliban return. Rogun Dam — planned as world's tallest — is the largest national project. Scars from the 1992-1997 civil war still affect social structures. Tajiks as Central Asia's only Persian-speaking people possess deep Persian cultural traditions.

dynasty.zh: 阿拉伯埃及共和国（穆巴拉克时期）

governmentForm.zh: 总统制共和国，国家权力高度集中于总统及其主导的行政体系。
governmentForm.en: A presidential republic with power highly concentrated in the presidency and its dominant executive apparatus.

socialStructure.zh: 社会由城市中产阶级、庞大的农村人口、国家官僚体系与军警系统共同构成。宗教在社会生活中影响深远，逊尼派伊斯兰教占主导，同时科普特基督徒构成重要少数群体。贫富差距、青年就业问题与城乡差异在2000年前后较为明显。
socialStructure.en: Society was composed of an urban middle class, a large rural population, and extensive state bureaucratic and security institutions. Religion played a major role in social life, with Sunni Islam dominant and Coptic Christians forming a significant minority. Inequality, youth unemployment, and the urban-rural divide were notable around 2000.

rulingClass.zh: 统治阶层以总统、执政党高层、军方将领、安全机构领导人与高级官僚为核心。商业精英与国家关联企业管理层也在政策与资源分配中拥有影响力。
rulingClass.en: The ruling class centered on the president, top figures of the ruling party, senior military officers, security chiefs, and high bureaucrats. Business elites and managers tied to state-linked enterprises also held influence over policy and resource allocation.

succession.zh: 总统通过公民投票确认、实质上由执政体制控制提名与接班安排。2000年前后，政权延续主要依赖体制内部协调而非真正竞争性选举。
succession.en: The president was confirmed by popular referendum, though nominations and succession were effectively controlled by the ruling system. Around 2000, regime continuity depended more on internal elite coordination than on genuinely competitive elections.

structure.zh: 中央政府由总统、总理、内阁、人民议会及安全机构构成，但实际决策权集中于总统府。国家机器对媒体、地方行政与治安系统具有较强控制力。司法名义上独立，但在政治敏感事务上常受行政影响。
structure.en: The central government consisted of the president, prime minister, cabinet, People's Assembly, and security institutions, but real decision-making was concentrated in the presidency. The state maintained strong control over the media, local administration, and internal security. The judiciary was formally independent but often influenced by the executive in politically sensitive matters.

function.zh: 负责警察、国内安全、公共秩序与政治监控。
function.en: Responsible for policing, internal security, public order, and political surveillance.

function.zh: 负责武装部队建设、国防规划与战略协调。
function.en: Responsible for the armed forces, defense planning, and strategic coordination.

function.zh: 负责预算、税收、债务管理与财政调度。
function.en: Responsible for budgeting, taxation, debt management, and fiscal administration.

name.en: Ministry of Agriculture and Land Reclamation

function.zh: 负责农业政策、灌溉配合与土地开发项目。
function.en: Responsible for agricultural policy, coordination on irrigation, and land development projects.

localAdmin.zh: 全国划分为多个省，由中央任命的省长主导地方行政。地方议会存在，但实权总体有限，财政与治安上依赖中央。
localAdmin.en: The country was divided into governorates led by centrally appointed governors. Local councils existed, but their real power was limited, and they depended on the center for finance and security.

legalSystem.zh: 法律体系以大陆法传统、埃及成文法及部分伊斯兰法原则并存。民商法较为世俗化，家庭法与身份法领域则保留较强宗教色彩。
legalSystem.en: The legal system combined civil law traditions, Egyptian statutory law, and limited Islamic legal principles. Civil and commercial law was relatively secular, while family and personal status law retained strong religious elements.

taxationSystem.zh: 财政收入主要来自所得税、关税、销售税、国有企业收益与苏伊士运河相关收入。税制征收能力有限，非正规经济规模较大影响税基。
taxationSystem.en: State revenue came mainly from income taxes, customs duties, sales taxes, state enterprise income, and Suez Canal-related receipts. Collection capacity was limited, and the large informal economy weakened the tax base.

culturalAchievements.zh: 埃及在阿拉伯世界的电影、音乐、新闻出版与高等教育领域长期居于核心地位。开罗在20世纪末仍是阿拉伯语文化生产与思想辩论的重要中心。
culturalAchievements.en: Egypt remained a leading center of film, music, journalism, and higher education in the Arab world. By the late twentieth century, Cairo was still a major hub of Arabic cultural production and intellectual debate.

languageFamily.zh: 阿非罗-亚细亚语系闪米特语族（阿拉伯语）

philosophy.zh: 现代埃及文化融合阿拉伯民族主义、伊斯兰社会价值、国家世俗治理传统与古埃及历史认同。
philosophy.en: Modern Egyptian culture blended Arab nationalism, Islamic social values, secular state traditions, and identification with the Pharaonic past.

writingSystem.zh: 现代标准阿拉伯文，使用阿拉伯字母；行政与教育中亦广泛使用英语和部分法语。
writingSystem.en: Modern Standard Arabic written in the Arabic script; English and some French were also widely used in administration and education.

gdpDescription.zh: 经济结构多元，但整体仍属中低收入水平国家。旅游业、石油天然气、苏伊士运河收入、农业与侨汇共同支撑国家财政和外汇。
gdpDescription.en: The economy was diversified but still at a lower-middle-income level overall. Tourism, oil and gas, Suez Canal revenues, agriculture, and remittances jointly supported state finance and foreign exchange earnings.

mainIndustries.zh: 石油天然气、旅游业、纺织、食品加工、建筑、水泥、化工、农业
mainIndustries.en: Oil and gas, tourism, textiles, food processing, construction, cement, chemicals, agriculture

tradeGoods.zh: 原油、天然气、棉花、纺织品、化肥、农产品、消费品进口、机械设备
tradeGoods.en: Crude oil, natural gas, cotton, textiles, fertilizers, agricultural goods, imported consumer goods, machinery

householdWealth.zh: 家庭财富分布不均，城市上层与侨汇家庭积累较多资产，而广大低收入家庭依赖工资、补贴和非正规经济。住房自有率较高，但金融资产普及程度有限。
householdWealth.en: Household wealth was unevenly distributed, with urban upper strata and remittance-receiving families holding more assets, while many low-income households depended on wages, subsidies, and the informal economy. Home ownership was relatively common, but financial asset ownership remained limited.

economicSystem.zh: 国家主导下逐步市场化的混合经济，保留较大公共部门并推进有限自由化改革。
economicSystem.en: A mixed economy under strong state influence, combining a large public sector with gradual market-oriented reforms.

source.zh: 石油、天然气与苏伊士相关收入
国有企业、费用与其他收入
source.en: State enterprises, fees, and other receipts

treasuryDescription.zh: 国库与外汇储备受旅游收入、能源出口、外援和债务负担共同影响。整体具备基本支付能力，但财政弹性有限。
treasuryDescription.en: Treasury strength and foreign reserves were shaped by tourism income, energy exports, foreign aid, and debt obligations. The state retained basic payment capacity, but fiscal flexibility was limited.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政政策强调维持社会稳定、补贴基本生活品并控制赤字，同时在国际金融机构压力下推进有限改革。
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal policy emphasized social stability, subsidies for basic goods, and deficit control, while pursuing limited reforms under pressure from international financial institutions.

description.zh: 规模最大，装备以美制与苏制体系混合为主，负责本土防御与地面作战。
description.en: The largest branch, using a mix of American and Soviet-origin equipment, responsible for territorial defense and ground warfare.

description.zh: 负责地中海与红海方向海上防务及苏伊士运河相关战略通道安全。
description.en: Responsible for maritime defense in the Mediterranean and Red Sea, including security of strategic routes linked to the Suez Canal.

description.zh: 拥有较完整防空网与战斗机部队，是国家威慑的重要组成部分。
description.en: Maintained a relatively extensive air defense network and fighter force, forming an important part of national deterrence.

technology.zh: 军队技术水平处于地区中上层次，依赖美国援助、许可生产和分批现代化改装。信息化与精确打击能力有限，但常规机械化作战能力较强。
technology.en: Military technology ranked in the upper-middle tier regionally, relying on U.S. aid, licensed production, and incremental modernization. Networked warfare and precision-strike capabilities were limited, but conventional mechanized capacity was solid.

threats.zh: 主要安全关切包括国内激进组织活动、与周边地区动荡相连的边境风险，以及尼罗河水资源与地区力量平衡问题。
threats.en: Main security concerns included domestic militant activity, border risks linked to regional instability, and long-term issues of Nile water resources and regional balance of power.

populationDescription.zh: 人口高度集中在尼罗河河谷与三角洲地带，沙漠地区稀少。人口年轻化明显，教育普及提高但就业吸纳能力不足。
populationDescription.en: Population was heavily concentrated in the Nile Valley and Delta, with sparse settlement in desert regions. The population was notably young, and educational expansion outpaced job creation.

socialClasses.zh: 国家官僚与军警阶层、城市专业中产、工人与服务业群体、农村农民与城市贫民并存。
socialClasses.en: State bureaucratic and military-security strata, an urban professional middle class, workers and service groups, and rural peasants and urban poor coexisted.

allies.zh: 美国、阿拉伯温和派国家、以色列（维持和平关系）、欧盟主要国家。
allies.en: The United States, moderate Arab states, Israel (in maintained peace), and major EU countries.

enemies.zh: 主要敌对对象并非传统国家战争对手，而是国内外伊斯兰激进组织与地区不稳定因素。
enemies.en: Its main adversaries were not conventional wartime state enemies but domestic and transnational Islamist militant groups and sources of regional instability.

foreignPolicy.zh: 外交上强调阿拉伯世界领导地位、与美国保持战略合作、维持与以色列和平并争取地区调停者角色。
foreignPolicy.en: Foreign policy emphasized leadership in the Arab world, strategic cooperation with the United States, peace with Israel, and a mediating role in regional affairs.

keyInnovations.zh: 重点在通信基础设施扩展、能源开发、灌溉农业技术改良及军工许可生产，而非全球前沿原创科技。
keyInnovations.en: Key advances lay in expanding communications infrastructure, energy development, irrigation improvements, and licensed military production rather than frontier global innovation.

strengths.zh: 拥有战略地理位置、庞大人口、阿拉伯文化影响力、强大军队和苏伊士运河带来的持续收益。
strengths.en: It possessed a strategic geographic position, a large population, major Arab cultural influence, a strong military, and steady income from the Suez Canal.

weaknesses.zh: 经济效率不足、贫困与失业压力大、政治开放有限，且对外援、旅游和能源收入存在依赖。
weaknesses.en: Weaknesses included limited economic efficiency, heavy poverty and unemployment pressures, constrained political openness, and dependence on aid, tourism, and energy income.

outlook.zh: 若改革有限而社会压力持续累积，长期稳定性将面临挑战；但短期内政权凭借安全机构与对外支持仍较稳固。
outlook.en: If reform remained limited while social pressures accumulated, long-term stability would be challenged; yet in the short term, the regime remained fairly secure through its security apparatus and external backing.

description.zh: 2000年前后的埃及是一个由总统与安全国家主导、在阿拉伯世界具重要地位的中等强国。
description.en: Around 2000, Egypt was a security-dominated presidential state and an important middle power in the Arab world.

ruler.zh: 阿卜杜勒-阿齐兹·布特弗利卡

dynasty.zh: 阿尔及利亚人民民主共和国

governmentForm.zh: 总统制共和国，军方在政治中具有重大影响力。
governmentForm.en: Presidential republic with the military holding significant political influence.

socialStructure.zh: 阿拉伯与柏柏尔双重文化社会，城市中产阶级与农村贫困人口并存。
socialStructure.en: Dual Arab-Berber cultural society; urban middle class coexisted with rural poor.

rulingClass.zh: 军方高层、总统与执政党民族解放阵线精英。
rulingClass.en: Senior military officers, president, and FLN ruling party elites.

succession.zh: 总统通过选举产生，军方对候选人有实质影响力。
succession.en: President elected, though military held substantial influence over candidates.

structure.zh: 总统制，两院制议会（国民议会与民族院），行政权集中于总统。
structure.en: Presidential system with bicameral parliament (People's National Assembly and Council of the Nation); executive power centered on the president.

function.zh: 掌管武装力量与国家安全。
function.en: Oversaw armed forces and national security.

function.zh: 国内安全、地方行政。
function.en: Internal security and local administration.

function.zh: 管理石油天然气与矿产资源。
function.en: Managed oil, gas, and mineral resources.

localAdmin.zh: 全国分48个省，由省长和省议会管理。
localAdmin.en: Divided into 48 provinces, each with a governor and provincial assembly.

legalSystem.zh: 大陆法系与伊斯兰法结合。
legalSystem.en: Civil law combined with Islamic law.

taxationSystem.zh: 以石油天然气收入为主，辅以企业税和增值税。
taxationSystem.en: Primarily oil and gas revenue, supplemented by corporate and value-added taxes.

culturalAchievements.zh: 丰富的阿拉伯-柏柏尔文化遗产，法语文学传统突出，拥有卡斯巴等世界遗产。
culturalAchievements.en: Rich Arab-Berber heritage; prominent Francophone literary tradition; UNESCO sites including the Casbah.

languageFamily.zh: 亚非语系（阿拉伯语、柏柏尔语）；法语广泛使用

philosophy.zh: 伊斯兰信仰与后殖民民族主义并存。
philosophy.en: Islamic faith coexisted with post-colonial nationalism.

writingSystem.zh: 阿拉伯文字与拉丁字母（法语）并用。
writingSystem.en: Arabic script and Latin alphabet (French) in parallel use.

gdpDescription.zh: 石油天然气为经济支柱，占出口收入约97%。经济结构单一。
gdpDescription.en: Oil and gas formed the economic backbone, accounting for ~97% of export revenue. Highly mono-structural.

mainIndustries.zh: 石油天然气、石化、采矿、农业、食品加工
mainIndustries.en: Oil and gas, petrochemicals, mining, agriculture, food processing

tradeGoods.zh: 原油、天然气、石化产品、磷酸盐
tradeGoods.en: Crude oil, natural gas, petrochemicals, phosphates

householdWealth.zh: 中等偏下水平，城乡差距明显，青年失业率高。
householdWealth.en: Below-average; significant urban-rural gap; high youth unemployment.

economicSystem.zh: 国家主导型市场经济，石油收入支撑公共支出。
economicSystem.en: State-led market economy; oil revenue supported public spending.

treasuryDescription.zh: 外汇储备相对充裕，得益于石油收入。
treasuryDescription.en: Foreign reserves relatively adequate thanks to oil revenue.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 石油收入主导的扩张性财政政策。
fiscalPolicy.en: Expansionary fiscal policy driven by oil revenue.

description.zh: 北非最大陆军之一。
description.en: One of the largest armies in North Africa.

description.zh: 配备苏制和法制战机。
description.en: Equipped with Soviet and French aircraft.

description.zh: 地中海沿岸防御。
description.en: Mediterranean coastal defense.

technology.zh: 苏制与法制装备混合，正在现代化。
technology.en: Mix of Soviet and French equipment; modernization underway.

threats.zh: 国内伊斯兰武装叛乱（内战尾声）、边境安全。
threats.en: Domestic Islamist insurgency (civil war winding down), border security.

populationDescription.zh: 约3100万人，阿拉伯族占多数，柏柏尔族约20%。

socialClasses.zh: 军方与政治精英为上层，大量城市工人和农村人口为中下层。
socialClasses.en: Military and political elites at top; large urban worker and rural population at middle and lower levels.

keyInnovations.zh: 石油天然气开采技术，电信基础设施扩展。
keyInnovations.en: Oil and gas extraction technology; telecommunications infrastructure expansion.

infrastructure.zh: 石油设施现代化，城市基础设施逐步改善。
infrastructure.en: Modernized oil facilities; urban infrastructure gradually improving.

allies.zh: 法国、俄罗斯、阿拉伯国家联盟

enemies.zh: 与摩洛哥因西撒哈拉问题关系紧张
enemies.en: Tense relations with Morocco over Western Sahara

foreignPolicy.zh: 不结盟运动参与者，支持巴勒斯坦事业和非洲统一。
foreignPolicy.en: Non-Aligned Movement participant; supported Palestinian cause and African unity.

strengths.zh: 丰富的石油天然气资源，军事实力强大。
strengths.en: Rich oil and gas resources; strong military.

weaknesses.zh: 经济结构单一、内战遗留问题、高失业率、腐败。
weaknesses.en: Mono-structural economy, civil war legacy, high unemployment, corruption.

outlook.zh: 内战渐息，经济依赖石油仍是隐忧。
outlook.en: Civil war winding down; oil dependence remained a concern.

description.zh: 2000年的阿尔及利亚正从十年内战中恢复，石油收入支撑国家运行。
description.en: Algeria in 2000 was recovering from a decade-long civil war, sustained by oil revenue.

governmentForm.zh: 君主立宪制，国王权力强大。
governmentForm.en: Constitutional monarchy; strong royal power.

socialStructure.zh: 阿拉伯-柏柏尔社会。
socialStructure.en: Arab-Berber society.

rulingClass.zh: 国王及王宫精英。
rulingClass.en: King and royal court elites.

succession.zh: 国王世袭。
succession.en: Hereditary monarchy.

structure.zh: 君主立宪制，两院制议会。
structure.en: Constitutional monarchy; bicameral.

function.zh: 安全。
function.en: Security.

function.zh: 财政。
function.en: Finance.

taxationSystem.zh: 增值税和关税。
taxationSystem.en: VAT and customs.

culturalAchievements.zh: 马拉喀什、菲斯等世界遗产，柏柏尔文化。
culturalAchievements.en: Marrakech, Fes World Heritage; Berber culture.

languageFamily.zh: 亚非语系（阿拉伯语、柏柏尔语）；法语广泛

philosophy.zh: 温和伊斯兰与王室传统。
philosophy.en: Moderate Islam and royal tradition.

gdpDescription.zh: 中等偏下收入，经济改革推进中。
gdpDescription.en: Lower-middle income; economic reform underway.

mainIndustries.zh: 磷酸盐、旅游、纺织、农业

householdWealth.zh: 城乡差距大。
householdWealth.en: Large urban-rural gap.

economicSystem.zh: 市场经济。
economicSystem.en: Market economy.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 渐进改革财政。
fiscalPolicy.en: Gradual reform fiscal policy.

description.zh: 法制和美制装备。
description.en: French and US equipment.

technology.zh: 法制和美制。

allies.zh: 法国、美国、海湾国家

enemies.zh: 与阿尔及利亚因西撒关系紧张
enemies.en: Tense with Algeria over Western Sahara

strengths.zh: 旅游、地理位置、年轻人口。
strengths.en: Tourism, location, young population.

weaknesses.zh: 贫困、教育差距、西撒问题。
weaknesses.en: Poverty, education gap, Western Sahara.

description.zh: 2000年的摩洛哥在新国王领导下推进改革。
description.en: Morocco in 2000: reform under new king.

governmentForm.zh: 总统制威权。
governmentForm.en: Presidential authoritarian.

socialStructure.zh: Tunisia社会。
socialStructure.en: Tunisia society.

rulingClass.zh: 政治精英。
rulingClass.en: Political elites.

succession.zh: 选举或继承。
succession.en: Election or succession.

structure.zh: 政府结构。
structure.en: Government structure.

function.zh: 财政。
function.en: Finance.

function.zh: 安全。
function.en: Security.

taxationSystem.zh: 税收体系。
taxationSystem.en: Tax system.

culturalAchievements.zh: Tunisia的文化遗产。
culturalAchievements.en: Cultural heritage of Tunisia.

languageFamily.zh: 多语言

philosophy.zh: 社会价值观。
philosophy.en: Social values.

gdpDescription.zh: 经济概况。
gdpDescription.en: Economy overview.

mainIndustries.zh: 旅游、纺织、石油

householdWealth.zh: 家庭财富。
householdWealth.en: Household wealth.

economicSystem.zh: 经济体制。
economicSystem.en: Economic system.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政政策。
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal policy.

description.zh: 军事力量。
description.en: Military forces.

technology.zh: 军事装备。

description.zh: 2000年的突尼斯经济发展但不自由。
description.en: Tunisia in 2000: development but unfreedom.

dynasty.zh: 大阿拉伯利比亚人民社会主义民众国
dynasty.en: Great Socialist People's Libyan Arab Jamahiriya

governmentForm.zh: 民众国体制，卡扎菲为实际最高领导人。
governmentForm.en: Jamahiriya system; Gaddafi as de facto supreme leader.

socialStructure.zh: 阿拉伯-柏柏尔社会，部落关系重要。
socialStructure.en: Arab-Berber; tribal relations important.

rulingClass.zh: 卡扎菲及其家族和部落盟友。
rulingClass.en: Gaddafi, his family, and tribal allies.

succession.zh: 卡扎菲绝对权力。
succession.en: Gaddafi's absolute power.

structure.zh: 名义上的直接民主（民众国），实为独裁。
structure.en: Nominally direct democracy (Jamahiriya); de facto dictatorship.

function.zh: 行政。
function.en: Administration.

taxationSystem.zh: 石油收入。
taxationSystem.en: Oil revenue.

culturalAchievements.zh: 古罗马遗址（莱普提斯马格纳）、撒哈拉文化。
culturalAchievements.en: Roman ruins (Leptis Magna); Saharan culture.

languageFamily.zh: 亚非语系（阿拉伯语）

philosophy.zh: 卡扎菲'第三世界理论'与伊斯兰。
philosophy.en: Gaddafi's 'Third Universal Theory' and Islam.

gdpDescription.zh: 石油富国，国际制裁放松中。
gdpDescription.en: Oil-rich; international sanctions easing.

mainIndustries.zh: 石油天然气

householdWealth.zh: 生活水平较高（非洲标准）。
householdWealth.en: Relatively high living standards (by African standards).

economicSystem.zh: 国家控制石油经济。
economicSystem.en: State-controlled oil economy.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 石油收入分配。
fiscalPolicy.en: Oil revenue distribution.

description.zh: 苏制装备。
description.en: Soviet equipment.

description.zh: 老化战机。
description.en: Aging aircraft.

technology.zh: 老化的苏制装备。

allies.zh: 非洲联盟国家

foreignPolicy.zh: 泛非主义转向，试图缓和与西方关系。
foreignPolicy.en: Pan-African turn; trying to ease Western relations.

strengths.zh: 巨大石油储量、地缘位置。
strengths.en: Vast oil reserves; geographic position.

weaknesses.zh: 独裁、国际孤立、经济单一。
weaknesses.en: Dictatorship, international isolation, mono-economy.

description.zh: 2000年的利比亚在卡扎菲统治下从国际孤立中缓慢走出。
description.en: Libya in 2000: slowly emerging from isolation under Gaddafi.

ruler.zh: 马维亚·乌尔德·西德·艾哈迈德·塔亚

dynasty.zh: 塔亚总统时期的毛里塔尼亚伊斯兰共和国
dynasty.en: Islamic Republic of Mauritania under President Taya

governmentForm.zh: 毛里塔尼亚在2000年前后是由总统主导的伊斯兰共和国，形式上实行多党制选举。
governmentForm.en: Around 2000, Mauritania was an Islamic republic dominated by a strong presidency, formally operating under a multiparty electoral system.

socialStructure.zh: 社会结构由阿拉伯-柏柏尔的白摩尔人、哈拉廷人以及南部非洲族群共同组成，历史上的身份等级影响仍然存在。城市人口集中在努瓦克肖特和努瓦迪布，而广大的农村与游牧地区仍保留传统部族联系。伊斯兰教是社会生活与公共规范的核心。
socialStructure.en: Society was composed of Arab-Berber Bidhan groups, Haratin communities, and southern African ethnic groups, with older status hierarchies still shaping social relations. Urban population was concentrated in Nouakchott and Nouadhibou, while vast rural and pastoral regions retained tribal ties. Islam stood at the center of social life and public norms.

rulingClass.zh: 统治阶层以总统、军方高层、执政党干部以及与国家机器关系密切的部族和商界精英为主。国家权力在行政与安全系统中高度集中。
rulingClass.en: The ruling class consisted mainly of the president, senior military officers, ruling-party officials, and tribal and business elites closely linked to the state. Power was highly concentrated within the executive and security apparatus.

succession.zh: 国家元首通过总统选举产生，但实际权力交接深受军方支持、执政网络和政治稳定考量影响。2000年前后的政权延续主要依赖现任总统及其军政联盟。
succession.en: The head of state was chosen through presidential elections, but real succession was heavily shaped by military backing, ruling networks, and concerns over stability. Around 2000, regime continuity depended largely on the incumbent president and his military-political coalition.

structure.zh: 中央政府由总统、总理、内阁和议会构成，总统掌握核心决策权。国家行政高度集中，地方政府在财政与治安上仍依赖中央。伊斯兰共和国的法律体系同时受到法国法传统与伊斯兰法原则影响。
structure.en: The central government consisted of the president, prime minister, cabinet, and legislature, with the president holding the key decision-making authority. Administration was highly centralized, and local authorities remained dependent on the center for finance and security. The legal order of the Islamic republic reflected both French legal traditions and principles of Islamic law.

function.zh: 负责地方行政、国内安全、户籍管理与基础通信监管。
function.en: Oversaw local administration, internal security, civil registration, and regulation of basic communications.

function.zh: 负责国家预算、税收征管、国库与对外财政协调。
function.en: Managed the state budget, tax collection, treasury functions, and external fiscal coordination.

name.en: Ministry of Fisheries and Maritime Economy

function.zh: 管理渔业资源、出口许可与海洋经济开发。
function.en: Managed fishery resources, export licensing, and maritime economic development.

function.zh: 负责基础教育、阿拉伯语与法语教育体系及教师管理。
function.en: Handled primary education, Arabic- and French-language schooling systems, and teacher administration.

localAdmin.zh: 全国划分为若干大区与省级单位，由中央任命或强力影响的行政长官管理。地方议会存在，但权限有限。
localAdmin.en: The country was divided into regions and lower administrative units managed by centrally appointed or strongly influenced officials. Local councils existed, but with limited authority.

legalSystem.zh: 法律体系混合法国大陆法传统、伊斯兰法和成文行政法规。涉及家庭与个人身份事务时，伊斯兰法原则具有重要地位。
legalSystem.en: The legal system blended French civil-law traditions, Islamic law, and codified administrative regulations. Islamic principles held particular importance in family and personal-status matters.

taxationSystem.zh: 财政收入主要来自贸易关税、渔业许可、企业税和有限的所得税征收。由于正规经济规模较小，税基较窄且对外部收入依赖较高。
taxationSystem.en: Public revenue came mainly from trade duties, fishing licenses, business taxation, and limited income-tax collection. Because the formal economy was small, the tax base was narrow and external revenue sources were important.

culturalAchievements.zh: 毛里塔尼亚以诗歌传统、古兰经教育和撒哈拉学术网络著称。2000年前后，国家文化认同在阿拉伯化政策与多族群现实之间持续调整。
culturalAchievements.en: Mauritania was known for its poetic traditions, Qur'anic learning, and Saharan scholarly networks. Around 2000, national cultural identity continued to evolve between Arabization policies and a multiethnic social reality.

languageFamily.zh: 阿拉伯语属闪含语系；法语属印欧语系；普拉尔语、索宁克语和沃洛夫语属尼日尔-刚果语系。
languageFamily.en: Arabic belongs to the Afro-Asiatic family; French to Indo-European; Pulaar, Soninke, and Wolof to the Niger-Congo family.

philosophy.zh: 以逊尼派伊斯兰思想、马立克学派法学传统及萨赫勒地区部族社会伦理为主。
philosophy.en: Dominated by Sunni Islamic thought, Maliki legal tradition, and the social ethics of Sahelian tribal society.

writingSystem.zh: 主要使用阿拉伯字母和拉丁字母，官方与教育中阿拉伯语、法语并行。
writingSystem.en: Used primarily Arabic and Latin scripts, with Arabic and French functioning side by side in government and education.

gdpDescription.zh: 经济规模较小，以渔业、铁矿石出口、畜牧业和外援为支柱。正式工业基础薄弱，受气候、国际市场价格和基础设施不足制约明显。
gdpDescription.en: The economy was small, relying on fisheries, iron ore exports, livestock, and foreign aid. Its formal industrial base was weak and heavily constrained by climate, global commodity prices, and limited infrastructure.

mainIndustries.zh: 渔业、铁矿开采、畜牧业、港口贸易、基础服务业
mainIndustries.en: Fisheries, iron ore mining, livestock raising, port trade, basic services

tradeGoods.zh: 铁矿石、鱼类及鱼粉、牲畜、进口燃料、食品和制成品
tradeGoods.en: Iron ore, fish and fishmeal, livestock, imported fuel, foodstuffs, and manufactured goods

householdWealth.zh: 家庭财富差异明显，城市商人和官僚阶层拥有较多现金与地产，农村与游牧家庭则多以牲畜和亲族网络作为主要资产。
householdWealth.en: Household wealth was highly unequal: urban merchants and officials held more cash and property, while rural and pastoral families relied mainly on livestock and kinship networks as assets.

economicSystem.zh: 以市场经济和国家主导资源管理并存的混合经济，严重依赖初级产品出口与国际援助。
economicSystem.en: A mixed economy combining market activity with state-led resource management, heavily dependent on primary exports and international assistance.

treasuryDescription.zh: 国库现金与外汇储备有限，财政调度受出口波动和援助到位情况影响较大。
treasuryDescription.en: The treasury and foreign-exchange reserves were limited, and fiscal management was strongly affected by export volatility and aid disbursement.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政政策偏向维持基本行政运作、争取外援并控制赤字，但税收能力有限。
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal policy focused on preserving basic state operations, attracting external assistance, and containing deficits, though domestic tax capacity remained weak.

description.zh: 负责边境巡逻、国内安全与沙漠地区机动部署。
description.en: Responsible for border patrol, internal security, and mobile deployment in desert regions.

description.zh: 拥有少量运输机与轻型作战平台，主要承担侦察和运输任务。
description.en: Operated a small number of transport aircraft and light combat platforms, mainly for reconnaissance and transport.

description.zh: 负责沿海巡逻、渔业海域执法和港口安全。
description.en: Handled coastal patrol, fishery-zone enforcement, and port security.

commanderInChief.zh: 总统马维亚·乌尔德·西德·艾哈迈德·塔亚

technology.zh: 装备以冷战后期轻武器、装甲车、巡逻舰和少量老式飞机为主，通信与后勤能力有限。
technology.en: Equipment consisted mainly of late Cold War small arms, armored vehicles, patrol craft, and a few aging aircraft, with limited communications and logistics capacity.

threats.zh: 主要威胁包括撒哈拉边境走私、地区不稳外溢、政变风险以及族群与社会不平等引发的内部紧张。
threats.en: Main threats included Saharan border smuggling, spillover from regional instability, coup risk, and internal tensions linked to ethnic and social inequality.

populationDescription.zh: 全国人口约270万，分布极不均衡，大部分集中于首都、沿海地带和南部河谷。高生育率与干旱迁徙推动城市扩张。
populationDescription.en: The population was about 2.7 million and very unevenly distributed, concentrated in the capital, the coast, and the southern river valley. High fertility and drought-related migration drove urban growth.

socialClasses.zh: 上层为政治军事精英与大商人，中间层较小，多为公务员、教师和城市专业人士，下层则包括农村农牧民、非正规劳动者和贫困城市居民。
socialClasses.en: The upper stratum consisted of political-military elites and major merchants; the middle stratum was small, including civil servants, teachers, and urban professionals; the lower strata included rural agro-pastoralists, informal workers, and poor urban residents.

allies.zh: 与法国、阿拉伯国家、非洲联盟成员及部分西方援助方保持合作关系。
allies.en: Maintained cooperative relations with France, Arab states, African partners, and several Western donors.

enemies.zh: 无明确国家级宿敌，但与部分邻国在边境、安全与外交议题上偶有摩擦。
enemies.en: Had no clear state-level arch-enemy, though it occasionally experienced frictions with neighbors over border, security, and diplomatic issues.

foreignPolicy.zh: 外交政策重视阿拉伯世界、萨赫勒安全合作、争取外援与维护政权国际合法性。
foreignPolicy.en: Foreign policy emphasized ties with the Arab world, Sahelian security cooperation, external aid, and preservation of the regime's international legitimacy.

keyInnovations.zh: 关键技术集中于铁矿运输、冷冻渔业加工、基础电信网络和港口设施现代化。
keyInnovations.en: Key innovations centered on iron-ore transport, refrigerated fish processing, basic telecommunications networks, and port modernization.

strengths.zh: 拥有丰富渔业资源、铁矿出口能力和连接阿拉伯世界与西非的地缘位置。
strengths.en: It possessed rich fishery resources, iron-ore export capacity, and a strategic position linking the Arab world and West Africa.

weaknesses.zh: 经济单一、基础设施薄弱、社会分层深刻且财政对外依赖高。
weaknesses.en: Its weaknesses were economic concentration, weak infrastructure, deep social stratification, and high fiscal dependence on external support.

outlook.zh: 若能改善治理、扩大基础设施和缓和社会矛盾，具备温和增长潜力，但短期仍脆弱。
outlook.en: If governance improved, infrastructure expanded, and social tensions eased, it had moderate growth potential, though it remained fragile in the short term.

description.zh: 2000年前后的毛里塔尼亚是一个由总统与军政精英主导、依赖渔业和矿产出口的萨赫勒伊斯兰共和国。
description.en: Around 2000, Mauritania was a Sahelian Islamic republic dominated by presidential and military elites and dependent on fisheries and mineral exports.

governmentForm.zh: 尼日利亚在2000年前后实行联邦总统制共和国，由民选总统领导国家与政府。
governmentForm.en: Around the year 2000, Nigeria operated as a federal presidential republic led by an elected president as head of state and government.

socialStructure.zh: 尼日利亚社会高度多元，由豪萨-富拉尼、约鲁巴、伊博及众多地方民族共同构成。宗教上伊斯兰教与基督教并立，北南差异、城乡差异和石油地区分配问题深刻影响社会结构。传统首领、宗教权威、军政精英和商业网络在社会中并存。
socialStructure.en: Nigerian society was highly diverse, composed of Hausa-Fulani, Yoruba, Igbo, and many other peoples. Islam and Christianity stood side by side, while north-south divides, urban-rural disparities, and conflicts over oil-region distribution deeply shaped social structure. Traditional rulers, religious authorities, military-political elites, and commercial networks coexisted within the broader social order.

rulingClass.zh: 统治阶层由联邦政党领袖、州长、军方旧精英、石油利益集团、高级官僚和地方权贵组成。尽管已恢复文官统治，但军方背景人物在国家政治中仍具重要影响。
rulingClass.en: The ruling class consisted of federal party leaders, state governors, former military elites, oil-interest groups, senior bureaucrats, and local power brokers. Although civilian rule had returned, figures with military backgrounds still exercised major influence in national politics.

succession.zh: 总统通过全国选举产生，须兼顾地区与族群政治平衡。若总统缺位，由副总统依联邦宪法继任。
succession.en: The president was chosen by nationwide election, with regional and ethnic balance playing an important political role. If the presidency fell vacant, the vice president succeeded under the federal constitution.

structure.zh: 尼日利亚实行联邦制，总统掌握较强行政权，国会为两院制，联邦最高法院负责宪法与终审事务。全国分为36州及联邦首都区，州政府在教育、治安协作和地方发展中作用显著。2000年前后，民主制度刚从长期军政府统治下恢复不久。
structure.en: Nigeria was a federation in which the president held strong executive powers, the legislature was bicameral, and the Supreme Court handled constitutional and final judicial matters. The country was divided into 36 states and the Federal Capital Territory, with state governments playing important roles in education, security coordination, and local development. Around 2000, democratic institutions had only recently reemerged after long periods of military rule.

function.zh: 负责联邦预算、税收协调、债务和石油财政收入管理。
function.en: Responsible for the federal budget, tax coordination, debt, and management of oil-based fiscal revenue.

function.zh: 负责武装部队、国防规划及对内安全支援。
function.en: Responsible for the armed forces, defense planning, and support for internal security.

function.zh: 负责石油天然气政策、开采监管及与国家石油公司的协调。
function.en: Responsible for oil and gas policy, extraction oversight, and coordination with the national petroleum corporation.

function.zh: 负责监狱、移民、消防和部分国内行政安全事务。
function.en: Responsible for prisons, immigration, fire services, and aspects of domestic administrative security.

localAdmin.zh: 地方行政由州、地方政府区和传统酋长体系共同构成。联邦政府通过财政分配和执政党网络对地方保持强大影响。
localAdmin.en: Local administration combined state governments, local government areas, and traditional chieftaincy structures. The federal government maintained strong influence over the local level through fiscal distribution and party networks.

legalSystem.zh: 尼日利亚法律体系融合英美法、成文法、习惯法和部分北方州的伊斯兰法。法律实施受司法资源不足和腐败问题影响。
legalSystem.en: Nigeria’s legal system combined common law, statutory law, customary law, and Islamic law in some northern states. Enforcement was hampered by limited judicial capacity and corruption.

taxationSystem.zh: 财政严重依赖石油出口收入，非油税收包括公司税、关税和增值税。对石油收入的依赖削弱了普通税基建设。
taxationSystem.en: Public finance depended heavily on oil export revenue, while non-oil taxes included company tax, customs, and VAT. This reliance on petroleum weakened the development of a broad ordinary tax base.

culturalAchievements.zh: 尼日利亚在音乐、文学、宗教传播和通俗影视方面影响巨大。2000年前后，尼莱坞电影工业快速成长，成为非洲最具代表性的文化产业之一。
culturalAchievements.en: Nigeria exercised major influence in music, literature, religious broadcasting, and popular film. Around 2000, the Nollywood film industry was expanding rapidly and becoming one of Africa’s most prominent cultural sectors.

languageFamily.zh: 多语并存，包括亚非语系、尼日尔-刚果语系语言；官方语言为英语。
languageFamily.en: Multilingual, including Afroasiatic and Niger-Congo languages; the official language was English.

philosophy.zh: 以宗教信仰、联邦民族整合、地方共同体传统和后殖民国家认同相交织。
philosophy.en: Interweaving religious faith, federal national integration, local communal traditions, and postcolonial state identity.

writingSystem.zh: 官方行政和教育主要使用拉丁字母书写的英语，也广泛书写豪萨语、约鲁巴语和伊博语。
writingSystem.en: Administration and education used English in the Latin alphabet, while Hausa, Yoruba, and Igbo were also widely written.

gdpDescription.zh: 尼日利亚经济以石油出口为核心，同时拥有庞大的农业、贸易和非正规部门。2000年前后经济总体稳定但基础薄弱，收入分配不均和电力短缺严重制约发展。
gdpDescription.en: Nigeria’s economy was centered on oil exports while also containing a vast agricultural, trading, and informal sector. Around 2000 it was broadly stable but structurally weak, with inequality and severe power shortages constraining development.

mainIndustries.zh: 石油天然气、农业、贸易、食品加工、纺织、基础制造
mainIndustries.en: Oil and gas, agriculture, trade, food processing, textiles, basic manufacturing

tradeGoods.zh: 原油、液化天然气、可可、橡胶、皮革、农产品
tradeGoods.en: Crude oil, liquefied natural gas, cocoa, rubber, leather, agricultural products

householdWealth.zh: 家庭财富差距极大，石油相关和城市商业精英积累较多资产，而广大农村与城市贫民家庭生活脆弱。
householdWealth.en: Household wealth was extremely unequal: oil-linked and urban commercial elites accumulated substantial assets, while many rural and urban poor households remained highly vulnerable.

economicSystem.zh: 资源依赖型混合经济，国家在石油部门影响显著，其余部门市场化程度较高但制度不稳。
economicSystem.en: A resource-dependent mixed economy with strong state influence in petroleum and a more market-driven but institutionally unstable structure elsewhere.

treasuryDescription.zh: 财政储备受国际油价波动影响显著，现金缓冲能力有限。
treasuryDescription.en: Fiscal reserves were strongly affected by swings in international oil prices, leaving only limited cash-buffer capacity.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 政府试图以石油收入支持重建与民生支出，但财政纪律和透明度较弱。
fiscalPolicy.en: The government sought to use oil revenues to support reconstruction and public welfare, but fiscal discipline and transparency remained weak.

description.zh: 是最大军种，承担边境防务、国内安全和维和准备任务。
description.en: The largest branch, responsible for border defense, internal security, and peacekeeping readiness.

description.zh: 负责尼日尔三角洲、沿海油气设施和几内亚湾海上安全。
description.en: Responsible for security in the Niger Delta, offshore oil installations, and the Gulf of Guinea.

description.zh: 承担运输、巡逻、有限空中支援和训练任务。
description.en: Handled transport, patrol, limited air support, and training missions.

commanderInChief.zh: 总统奥卢塞贡·奥巴桑乔

technology.zh: 军队技术水平总体中低，装备来源多样且维护不足，但具一定区域投送与维和经验。
technology.en: Overall military technology was lower-middle, with equipment from varied sources and inadequate maintenance, though the forces retained some regional deployment and peacekeeping experience.

threats.zh: 主要威胁包括尼日尔三角洲动荡、族群与宗教冲突、边境走私以及局部军事叛乱风险。
threats.en: Major threats included unrest in the Niger Delta, ethnic and religious conflict, border smuggling, and risks of localized military unrest.

populationDescription.zh: 尼日利亚人口庞大且增长迅速，是非洲人口最多国家之一。青年人口占比高，城市化加速，但公共服务和就业增长难以完全跟上。
populationDescription.en: Nigeria had a vast and rapidly growing population, making it one of Africa’s most populous countries. Youth formed a high share of the population, and urbanization was accelerating, but public services and job creation struggled to keep pace.

socialClasses.zh: 由政治军政精英、石油和贸易富裕阶层、城市中产、非正规劳动者、农民与贫困社区构成，地区差异极大。
socialClasses.en: Society comprised political and military elites, wealthy oil and trading strata, an urban middle class, informal workers, farmers, and poor communities, with very large regional disparities.

allies.zh: 西非国家经济共同体成员、美国、英国、非洲联盟伙伴
allies.en: Members of ECOWAS, the United States, the United Kingdom, and partners in the African Union

enemies.zh: 无固定国家敌国，但与地区叛乱团体、走私网络和局部武装势力存在对抗。
enemies.en: No fixed state enemy, but it confronted regional rebel groups, smuggling networks, and localized armed actors.

foreignPolicy.zh: 尼日利亚奉行以西非领导地位、非洲维和和资源外交为核心的区域强国路线。
foreignPolicy.en: Nigeria pursued a regional-power foreign policy centered on leadership in West Africa, African peacekeeping, and resource diplomacy.

keyInnovations.zh: 石油开采与液化天然气项目、移动通信初步扩展、录像电影产业兴起、区域金融服务发展。
keyInnovations.en: Oil extraction and LNG projects, early expansion of mobile communications, the rise of video-film production, and development of regional financial services.

strengths.zh: 人口与资源规模巨大，西非影响力强，文化产业活跃，石油出口提供硬通货。
strengths.en: Massive population and resource base, strong influence in West Africa, a vibrant cultural sector, and hard-currency earnings from oil exports.

weaknesses.zh: 腐败严重、基础设施薄弱、宗教族群冲突频发、对石油依赖过高。
weaknesses.en: Severe corruption, weak infrastructure, frequent ethno-religious conflict, and excessive dependence on oil.

outlook.zh: 若能改善电力、治理和联邦分配机制，尼日利亚具有成为非洲核心大国的长期潜力。
outlook.en: If it improved electricity supply, governance, and federal distribution mechanisms, Nigeria had long-term potential to become one of Africa’s core great powers.

description.zh: 2000年前后的尼日利亚是一个刚恢复民主、资源丰富但治理脆弱且社会高度多元的联邦共和国。
description.en: Around 2000, Nigeria was a newly re-democratized federal republic that was resource-rich but governance-fragile and highly socially diverse.

governmentForm.zh: 总统制共和国，西非民主典范。
governmentForm.en: Presidential republic; West African democratic exemplar.

socialStructure.zh: 多民族社会，阿坎族为最大族群。
socialStructure.en: Multi-ethnic; Akan as largest group.

rulingClass.zh: 民选政治精英。
rulingClass.en: Elected political elites.

succession.zh: 总统直选，2000年将实现权力和平交接。
succession.en: Directly elected; peaceful transfer expected in 2000.

structure.zh: 总统制，一院制议会。
structure.en: Presidential; unicameral parliament.

function.zh: 财政。
function.en: Finance.

function.zh: 安全。
function.en: Security.

taxationSystem.zh: 以关税、增值税和可可出口税为主。
taxationSystem.en: Customs, VAT, and cocoa export tax.

religion.zh: 基督教/伊斯兰教/传统信仰

culturalAchievements.zh: 阿散蒂王国遗产、高寿文化和音乐传统。
culturalAchievements.en: Ashanti Kingdom heritage; highlife music tradition.

languageFamily.zh: 尼日尔-刚果语系；英语为官方语言

philosophy.zh: 泛非主义传统（恩克鲁玛遗产）。
philosophy.en: Pan-Africanist tradition (Nkrumah legacy).

gdpDescription.zh: 中低收入国家，可可和黄金出口国。
gdpDescription.en: Lower-middle income; cocoa and gold exporter.

mainIndustries.zh: 可可、黄金开采、木材、旅游

householdWealth.zh: 家庭财富普遍较低，北南差距明显。
householdWealth.en: Low household wealth; significant north-south gap.

economicSystem.zh: 市场经济，私有化进程中。
economicSystem.en: Market economy; privatization underway.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 结构调整方案框架。
fiscalPolicy.en: Structural adjustment framework.

description.zh: 小型职业军队。
description.en: Small professional military.

technology.zh: 西方援助装备。

strengths.en: Vast bauxite reserves.

outlook.zh: 矿业潜力大但治理薄弱。

description.zh: 2000年的几内亚坐拥巨大矿产但深陷贫困。
description.en: Guinea in 2000: sitting on vast minerals but mired in poverty.

dynasty.zh: 独立后多党共和国时期

governmentForm.zh: 几内亚比绍在2000年前后是一个脆弱的总统制共和国，名义上实行多党民主，但军队和派系政治对国家运作影响很大。
governmentForm.en: Around 2000, Guinea-Bissau was a fragile presidential republic that formally practiced multi-party democracy, but the military and factional politics strongly shaped state functioning.

socialStructure.zh: 社会由巴兰特、富拉、曼丁卡、帕佩尔等多个族群构成，农村社会占人口主体。家族、族群纽带和地方长老在日常社会组织中具有重要作用，城市中则存在规模较小的公务员、军人和商人阶层。内战后社会秩序脆弱，贫困和基础设施匮乏普遍存在。
socialStructure.en: Society consisted of multiple ethnic groups including the Balanta, Fula, Mandinka, and Papel, with the rural population forming the majority. Kinship, ethnic ties, and local elders remained important in everyday social organization, while towns contained a smaller civil servant, military, and merchant stratum. After the civil war, social order was fragile, and poverty and poor infrastructure were widespread.

rulingClass.zh: 统治阶层由总统周边政治人物、非洲独立党相关干部、军方高级将领以及城市商界精英构成。军队虽非唯一执政者，却在政权更替与国家资源分配中拥有关键影响。
rulingClass.en: The ruling class consisted of politicians around the presidency, cadres linked to the PAIGC tradition, senior military officers, and urban commercial elites. The military was not the sole ruler, but it exercised decisive influence over regime change and allocation of state resources.

succession.zh: 国家领导人通过选举产生，但现实中政变、军方干预和政治联盟瓦解经常打断正常继承程序。2000年的权力交接虽经选举完成，但稳定性有限。
succession.en: National leaders were chosen through elections, but in practice coups, military intervention, and collapsing political alliances often interrupted normal succession. The transfer of power in 2000 occurred through elections, yet its stability was limited.

structure.zh: 政府由总统、总理、部长会议和国民议会组成，但机构运转能力较弱。中央政府名义上统辖全国，实际上对边远地区的控制有限，地方行政常依赖传统权威和军警力量维持。国家机关受财政短缺、腐败和内战遗留破坏严重制约。
structure.en: The government consisted of the president, prime minister, council of ministers, and national assembly, but institutional capacity was weak. The central government nominally governed the entire country, yet in practice had limited control over remote areas, where local administration often relied on traditional authorities and security forces. State institutions were heavily constrained by fiscal shortages, corruption, and destruction left by civil war.

function.zh: 负责国家行政协调、政治任命与对军政关系的平衡。
function.en: Handled state coordination, political appointments, and balancing civil-military relations.

function.zh: 负责预算、税收、外援管理和基础经济政策。
function.en: Managed budget, taxation, foreign aid, and basic economic policy.

name.en: Ministry of Interior and Local Administration

function.zh: 负责治安、地方官派驻、边境和人口登记事务。
function.en: Oversaw security, local administrative appointments, borders, and civil registration.

name.zh: 教育卫生与社会事务部
name.en: Ministry of Education, Health, and Social Affairs

function.zh: 管理学校、基层医疗和有限的社会救助项目。
function.en: Managed schools, primary healthcare, and limited social assistance programs.

localAdmin.zh: 地方行政分为若干区和部门，但实际治理常因经费不足而停滞。许多农村地区主要依靠村社领袖、宗教人物和地方军警维持秩序。
localAdmin.en: Local administration was divided into regions and sectors, but actual governance often stalled for lack of funds. Many rural areas depended mainly on village leaders, religious figures, and local police or soldiers to maintain order.

legalSystem.zh: 法律体系源于葡萄牙法传统，并受独立后宪法秩序影响。正式法院覆盖不足，许多民事纠纷仍通过习惯法和地方调解解决。
legalSystem.en: The legal system derived from the Portuguese legal tradition and was shaped by the post-independence constitutional order. Formal courts had limited reach, and many civil disputes were still settled through customary law and local mediation.

taxationSystem.zh: 税收以关税、港口收费、营业税和少量所得征收为主。征管能力很弱，国家财政在很大程度上依赖外援和国际金融支持。
taxationSystem.en: Taxation relied mainly on customs duties, port fees, business taxes, and limited income collection. Administrative capacity was weak, and state finance depended heavily on foreign aid and international financial support.

culturalAchievements.zh: 几内亚比绍以多族群音乐传统、口述史诗和克里奥尔文化融合著称。独立斗争历史塑造了强烈的民族记忆，但国家文化机构资源有限。
culturalAchievements.en: Guinea-Bissau was known for its multiethnic musical traditions, oral epics, and Creole cultural blending. The history of the independence struggle shaped a strong national memory, though state cultural institutions had limited resources.

languageFamily.zh: 印欧语系罗曼语族（葡萄牙语）与大西洋-刚果语系、曼德语族并存
languageFamily.en: Romance Indo-European (Portuguese) alongside Atlantic-Congo and Mande language families

philosophy.zh: 地方族群传统、伊斯兰与泛灵信仰并存，兼有葡萄牙殖民遗产与民族解放记忆
philosophy.en: Local ethnic traditions, Islam, and animist beliefs coexisted alongside Portuguese colonial legacies and memories of national liberation

writingSystem.zh: 拉丁字母，官方语言为葡萄牙语，社会广泛使用几内亚比绍克里奥尔语及各族语言
writingSystem.en: Latin alphabet, with Portuguese as the official language and Guinea-Bissau Creole plus ethnic languages widely used in society

gdpDescription.zh: 几内亚比绍在2000年前后属于世界最贫困国家之一，经济以农业和原料出口为主。腰果是最关键的出口品，国内加工和工业化水平极低，内战破坏使经济恢复缓慢。
gdpDescription.en: Around 2000, Guinea-Bissau was among the poorest countries in the world, with an economy centered on agriculture and raw-material exports. Cashews were the key export commodity, domestic processing and industrialization were minimal, and recovery from civil war was slow.

mainIndustries.zh: 腰果种植与出口、稻作农业、渔业、小规模贸易、初级公共服务
mainIndustries.en: Cashew cultivation and export, rice farming, fisheries, small-scale trade, and basic public services

tradeGoods.zh: 腰果、花生、鱼类、木材、进口燃料、食品和日用品
tradeGoods.en: Cashews, peanuts, fish, timber, and imported fuel, food, and consumer goods

householdWealth.zh: 家庭财富水平普遍很低，农村家庭以自给农业和季节性腰果收入维生。城市家庭略多接触现金经济，但仍缺乏稳定工资和金融资产。
householdWealth.en: Household wealth was generally very low, with rural families relying on subsistence farming and seasonal cashew income. Urban households were somewhat more connected to the cash economy, but still lacked stable wages and financial assets.

economicSystem.zh: 低收入农业主导、依赖外援的混合经济
economicSystem.en: A low-income agriculture-led mixed economy dependent on foreign aid

treasuryDescription.zh: 国库储备非常有限，经常面临工资拖欠和现金短缺。财政流动性高度依赖外援到账与出口季节收入。
treasuryDescription.en: Treasury reserves were extremely limited, and the state often faced wage arrears and cash shortages. Fiscal liquidity depended heavily on aid disbursement and seasonal export receipts.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政政策以维持最低国家运作为目标，优先支付军警和行政工资。由于税基狭窄与征收能力不足，政府长期依赖国际援助、债务减免和紧急预算支持。
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal policy aimed primarily at preserving minimal state functioning, prioritizing payment of military, police, and administrative wages. Because the tax base was narrow and collection capacity weak, the government relied heavily on international aid, debt relief, and emergency budget support.

description.zh: 国家主要武装力量，兵员众多但训练和装备水平较低，深度介入政治。
description.en: The main armed force of the state, numerous in manpower but poorly trained and equipped, and deeply involved in politics.

description.zh: 负责近海巡逻与港口控制，但舰艇和维护能力有限。
description.en: Responsible for coastal patrol and port control, but with limited vessels and maintenance capacity.

description.zh: 承担内部安全、首都警备和支援地方治安任务。
description.en: Handled internal security, capital protection, and support for local policing.

technology.zh: 军队以老旧轻武器、少量迫击炮、装甲车辆和旧式巡逻艇为主，通信、后勤和空中能力非常薄弱。
technology.en: The armed forces relied mainly on aging small arms, a few mortars, armored vehicles, and old patrol boats, while communications, logistics, and air capability were very weak.

threats.zh: 主要威胁来自政变风险、军队派系冲突、边境走私、国家机构脆弱和社会不稳定，而非大规模外部入侵。
threats.en: The main threats came from coup risk, military factional conflict, border smuggling, weak state institutions, and social instability rather than large-scale external invasion.

populationDescription.zh: 人口以农村居民为主，出生率较高，教育和卫生指标较弱。族群多样性显著，宗教上伊斯兰教、泛灵信仰和基督宗教并存。
populationDescription.en: The population was predominantly rural, with a high birth rate and weak education and health indicators. Ethnic diversity was pronounced, and Islam, animist beliefs, and Christianity coexisted.

socialClasses.zh: 农村农民与渔民、地方长老和宗教领袖、城市小商人、公务员、军人及少量政治精英
socialClasses.en: Rural farmers and fishers, local elders and religious leaders, urban petty traders, civil servants, soldiers, and a small political elite

allies.zh: 西非国家经济共同体、葡语国家共同体、塞内加尔和几内亚等周边国家、国际援助机构
allies.en: ECOWAS, the Community of Portuguese Language Countries, neighboring states such as Senegal and Guinea, and international aid agencies

enemies.zh: 无明确国家敌人，但与部分邻国存在边境与走私摩擦，内部派系敌对更为严重
enemies.en: No clear state enemy, though there were border and smuggling frictions with some neighbors; internal factional hostility was more serious

foreignPolicy.zh: 对外政策以争取援助、恢复战后国际信誉和维持地区安全合作为核心。国家外交能力有限，往往受国内政治危机与军方态度牵制。
foreignPolicy.en: Foreign policy centered on securing aid, restoring postwar international credibility, and maintaining regional security cooperation. Diplomatic capacity was limited and often constrained by domestic political crises and military attitudes.

keyInnovations.zh: 移动通信初步引入、基础港口贸易网络、低水平农产品出口体系和国际援助支持的公共卫生项目
keyInnovations.en: Initial introduction of mobile communications, basic port trade networks, low-level agricultural export systems, and aid-supported public health programs

strengths.zh: 拥有可出口的腰果经济、沿海渔业资源和区域组织支持。社会层面保留较强的地方共同体韧性。
strengths.en: It possessed an exportable cashew economy, coastal fishery resources, and support from regional organizations. At the social level, local communities retained notable resilience.

weaknesses.zh: 国家机构薄弱、军队干政严重、财政极端脆弱、基础设施落后且贫困普遍。经济过度依赖单一出口品，抗风险能力很差。
weaknesses.en: State institutions were weak, military intervention in politics was severe, public finance was extremely fragile, infrastructure lagged, and poverty was widespread. The economy was overly dependent on a single export commodity and had poor resilience.

outlook.zh: 短期前景不稳，容易再次陷入政治危机和军政冲突。若能维持地区调停、财政援助和基本制度修复，才可能实现缓慢恢复。
outlook.en: The short-term outlook was unstable, with a high risk of renewed political crisis and civil-military conflict. Only sustained regional mediation, fiscal aid, and basic institutional repair offered the possibility of gradual recovery.

description.zh: 几内亚比绍是一个在内战后艰难维持运作的西非弱势共和国，经济贫困且军队对政治具有深刻影响。
description.en: Guinea-Bissau was a weak West African republic struggling to function after civil war, marked by poverty and deep military influence over politics.

governmentForm.zh: 总统制，内战尾声。
governmentForm.en: Presidential; civil war ending.

householdWealth.en: Large wealth gap.

economicSystem.en: Mixed economy; oil and agriculture.
