socialStructure.en: Society was predominantly of African descent, with European communities, Haitian migrants, and mixed populations also present. The middle class was concentrated in tourism, financial services, government, and education, and the population was heavily concentrated on New Providence Island.

rulingClass.zh: 执政精英主要由民选政治人物、资深公务员、金融和旅游业上层经营者构成。拿骚的政治与商业联系在国家权力结构中尤为突出。
rulingClass.en: The governing elite consisted mainly of elected politicians, senior civil servants, and upper-level operators in finance and tourism. Nassau's political and commercial networks were especially prominent in the national power structure.

succession.zh: 国家领导权通过议会选举决定，总理由众议院多数党领袖出任。政权交替制度化程度较高，政治竞争总体和平。
succession.en: National leadership was determined through parliamentary elections, with the prime minister drawn from the leader of the House majority. Transfers of power were highly institutionalized and political competition was generally peaceful.

structure.zh: 巴哈马采取议会内阁制，中央政府主导财政、海关、旅游、警务与对外事务。群岛型国土使地方治理高度依赖岛屿行政官与首都协调机制。
structure.en: The Bahamas employed a parliamentary cabinet system, with the central government dominating finance, customs, tourism, policing, and external affairs. Its archipelagic territory made local governance highly dependent on island administrators and coordination from the capital.

function.zh: 负责预算、海关收入、税务政策及公共债务管理。
function.en: Oversaw the budget, customs revenue, tax policy, and public debt management.

function.zh: 推动国际旅游营销、酒店业协调与旅游投资。
function.en: Promoted international tourism marketing, coordinated the hotel sector, and encouraged tourism investment.

function.zh: 负责警察、海上巡逻、移民执法和国内安全。
function.en: Handled policing, maritime patrol, immigration enforcement, and domestic security.

function.zh: 管理学校体系、师资和基础教育政策。
function.en: Managed the school system, teachers, and basic education policy.

localAdmin.zh: 地方行政由各主要岛屿的行政区机构与中央委派官员共同承担，离岛事务对交通与通信依赖很高。拿骚在财政与行政上远强于外岛。
localAdmin.en: Local administration was carried out through district bodies on the main islands together with centrally appointed officials, and out-island governance depended heavily on transport and communications. Nassau was far stronger than the Family Islands in fiscal and administrative capacity.

legalSystem.zh: 法律体系建立在英国普通法传统之上，并配合独立后的宪法与本国立法。司法制度强调财产权保护和商业法稳定性。
legalSystem.en: The legal system rested on the British common law tradition, combined with the post-independence constitution and domestic legislation. The judiciary emphasized protection of property rights and commercial law stability.

taxationSystem.zh: 税收体系以进口关税、牌照费、印花税和旅游相关收费为主，直接所得税较弱。离岸金融和旅游业间接支撑政府收入。
taxationSystem.en: The tax system relied mainly on import duties, licensing fees, stamp taxes, and tourism-related charges, with relatively limited direct income taxation. Offshore finance and tourism indirectly supported government revenue.

culturalAchievements.zh: 巴哈马以琼卡努节庆、海岛音乐和旅游形象塑造著称。其邮轮港口文化、海洋休闲产业和国际离岸金融服务也具有鲜明时代特征。
culturalAchievements.en: The Bahamas was noted for Junkanoo festivals, island music, and the construction of a tourism-centered national image. Its cruise-port culture, marine leisure industries, and international offshore financial services were also distinctive features of the era.

languageFamily.zh: 英语属于印欧语系日耳曼语族；日常口语中常见巴哈马英语变体和克里奥尔化表达。
languageFamily.en: English belongs to the Indo-European Germanic family; Bahamian English varieties and creolized speech were common in daily life.

philosophy.zh: 公共文化强调基督教价值、海洋生活方式、英联邦法治传统与旅游开放性。
philosophy.en: Public culture emphasized Christian values, a maritime way of life, Commonwealth legal traditions, and openness shaped by tourism.

writingSystem.zh: 使用拉丁字母，官方语言为英语。
writingSystem.en: Uses the Latin alphabet, with English as the official language.

gdpDescription.zh: 经济高度依赖旅游、离岸金融和相关服务业，人均收入在加勒比地区居前。由于本土资源有限，国家严重依赖食品、燃料和工业品进口。
gdpDescription.en: The economy was highly dependent on tourism, offshore finance, and related services, giving it one of the higher per capita incomes in the Caribbean. Because domestic resources were limited, the country was heavily dependent on imports of food, fuel, and manufactured goods.

mainIndustries.zh: 旅游业、离岸金融、房地产、港口服务、渔业、建筑业
mainIndustries.en: Tourism, offshore finance, real estate, port services, fisheries, construction

tradeGoods.zh: 旅游服务、金融服务、海产品、转口商品、朗姆酒及少量制造品
tradeGoods.en: Tourism services, financial services, seafood, re-exported goods, rum, and limited manufactures

householdWealth.zh: 首都及旅游区家庭资产水平较高，住房和消费品拥有率良好，但外岛与移民社区收入差距明显。
householdWealth.en: Household asset levels were relatively high in Nassau and tourism zones, with good access to housing and consumer goods, but income disparities were marked between the out islands and migrant communities.

economicSystem.zh: 以服务业和对外开放为核心的市场经济，国家在金融监管和旅游推广中扮演重要角色。
economicSystem.en: A market economy centered on services and external openness, with the state playing an important role in financial regulation and tourism promotion.

source.zh: 牌照费与金融服务收入
source.en: Licensing fees and financial service revenue

treasuryDescription.zh: 财政状况总体可控，但受旅游周期、飓风损失和进口依赖影响，现金储备不算宽裕。
treasuryDescription.en: The fiscal position was manageable overall, but cash reserves were not especially deep due to dependence on tourism cycles, hurricane losses, and imports.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政政策强调维持旅游基础设施、控制债务并通过关税和牌照收费保障财政收入。
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal policy emphasized maintaining tourism infrastructure, controlling debt, and preserving revenue through customs duties and licensing charges.

name.zh: 皇家巴哈马国防军海上部队
name.en: Royal Bahamas Defence Force Maritime Arm

description.zh: 以海上巡逻艇为核心，承担领海巡防、缉毒和搜救任务。
description.en: Centered on patrol vessels and tasked with territorial patrol, counter-narcotics operations, and search and rescue.

description.zh: 负责小规模快速反应、港口安全和特种执法支援。
description.en: Handled small-scale rapid response, port security, and special enforcement support.

description.zh: 提供海上监视、运输和巡逻协助。
description.en: Provided maritime surveillance, transport, and patrol support.

commanderInChief.zh: 国家元首与内阁通过国防军司令行使统帅权
commanderInChief.en: The head of state and cabinet exercised authority through the Defence Force commander

technology.zh: 军备技术以近海巡逻舰艇、轻武器、雷达监视和小型航空平台为主，重点在海域管控而非重型作战能力。
technology.en: Military technology focused on coastal patrol craft, small arms, radar surveillance, and light air platforms, emphasizing maritime control rather than heavy combat power.

threats.zh: 主要挑战为海上走私、非法移民、毒品转运、海上搜救压力及飓风灾害。
threats.en: Main challenges included maritime smuggling, illegal migration, narcotics transshipment, search-and-rescue burdens, and hurricane disasters.

populationDescription.zh: 全国人口约30万，绝大多数集中于拿骚及其周边地区，其余分散在外岛。人口流动性高，旅游与移民对劳动力结构影响显著。
populationDescription.en: The national population was about 300,000, with the great majority concentrated in Nassau and nearby areas, while the remainder was spread across the out islands. Population mobility was high, and tourism and migration strongly influenced the labor structure.

socialClasses.zh: 社会分层大致包括政治与商业精英、旅游和金融中产、服务业工薪群体以及低收入移民劳动者。
socialClasses.en: Social stratification broadly included political and commercial elites, a tourism and finance middle class, service-sector wage earners, and low-income migrant laborers.

allies.zh: 美国、英国、加拿大、加勒比共同体成员及其他英联邦国家。
allies.en: The United States, the United Kingdom, Canada, CARICOM members, and other Commonwealth states.

enemies.zh: 无正式国家敌人，但长期面对跨国毒品网络与非法人口流动问题。
enemies.en: No formal state enemies, but the country faced long-term pressure from transnational narcotics networks and illegal population flows.

foreignPolicy.zh: 外交以维护旅游安全、金融声誉、与美国海上合作及加勒比区域协调为重点。
foreignPolicy.en: Foreign policy focused on tourism security, financial reputation, maritime cooperation with the United States, and Caribbean regional coordination.

keyInnovations.zh: 关键能力包括现代航空港与邮轮港管理、离岸金融信息系统、电信网络和海上监视设备。
keyInnovations.en: Key capabilities included modern airport and cruise-port management, offshore financial information systems, telecommunications networks, and maritime surveillance equipment.

strengths.zh: 旅游吸引力强、人均收入较高、政治稳定、靠近美国市场且金融服务发达。
strengths.en: Strong tourism appeal, relatively high income per capita, political stability, proximity to the U.S. market, and developed financial services.

weaknesses.zh: 经济过度依赖旅游和外部需求，工业基础薄弱，飓风和海平面风险较大。
weaknesses.en: The economy was overly dependent on tourism and external demand, had a weak industrial base, and faced significant hurricane and sea-level risks.

outlook.zh: 若能维持金融合规、升级旅游设施并强化气候韧性，巴哈马可继续保持高收入海岛经济地位。
outlook.en: If it maintained financial compliance, upgraded tourism infrastructure, and strengthened climate resilience, the Bahamas could continue as a high-income island economy.

description.zh: 一个以旅游、离岸金融和海洋交通为核心的高城市化加勒比群岛国。
description.en: A highly urbanized Caribbean archipelagic state centered on tourism, offshore finance, and maritime connectivity.

dynasty.zh: 波多黎各自由邦政府（美国主权下）
dynasty.en: Government of the Commonwealth of Puerto Rico (under U.S. sovereignty)

governmentForm.zh: 波多黎各在2000年前后为美国主权下的自治共和式领地，设有民选总督、两院立法机构与宪政法院体系。
governmentForm.en: Around 2000, Puerto Rico was a self-governing republican-style U.S. territory with an elected governor, bicameral legislature, and constitutional court system.

socialStructure.zh: 社会以城市中产阶级、公共部门雇员、服务业劳动者和制造业工人为主体。农村人口比例已明显下降，但仍保留甘蔗、咖啡与地方社区传统。家庭、教区、学校与侨汇网络在社会组织中仍具重要作用。
socialStructure.en: Society was centered on an urban middle class, public employees, service-sector workers, and manufacturing laborers. The rural share of the population had declined significantly, though sugar, coffee, and local community traditions still persisted. Family networks, parishes, schools, and remittance ties remained important to social organization.

rulingClass.zh: 统治阶层主要由民选政治人物、政党机器、企业精英以及与美国联邦机构密切往来的行政官僚组成。亲州派、自治派与独立派虽立场不同，但政治主导权主要集中在前两者之间。
rulingClass.en: The ruling class consisted mainly of elected politicians, party organizations, business elites, and administrative officials closely connected to U.S. federal institutions. Though statehood, commonwealth, and independence factions all existed, political dominance largely rested between the first two camps.

succession.zh: 领导权通过定期选举和平更替，总督由普选产生。若总督职位出缺，则依宪法与法定继承顺序由副总督及相关官员接替。
succession.en: Leadership changed through regular elections, with the governor chosen by popular vote. If the governorship became vacant, succession followed constitutional and statutory order through the secretary of state and other designated officials.

structure.zh: 波多黎各政府依据1952年宪法运作，实行行政、立法、司法三权分立。总督为行政首长，立法机关由参议院和众议院组成，同时受美国国会与联邦法律框架约束。地方层面设有市镇政府，负责基层行政与公共服务。
structure.en: Puerto Rico’s government operated under the 1952 constitution with executive, legislative, and judicial separation of powers. The governor served as chief executive, while the legislature consisted of a Senate and House of Representatives, all within the broader authority of U.S. Congress and federal law. At the local level, municipalities handled grassroots administration and public services.

function.zh: 统筹行政政策、预算协调、联邦事务沟通与全岛政府运作。
function.en: Coordinated executive policy, budget management, federal relations, and overall island-wide government operations.

function.zh: 负责税收征管、财政收支、公共债务管理与会计监督。
function.en: Handled tax collection, public finance, debt management, and accounting oversight.

function.zh: 管理公立学校体系、教师编制、课程实施与教育基础设施。
function.en: Managed the public school system, teacher staffing, curriculum implementation, and educational infrastructure.

function.zh: 负责公共卫生、医院监管、疾病防控与联邦医疗项目协作。
function.en: Oversaw public health, hospital regulation, disease control, and coordination with federal health programs.

localAdmin.zh: 全岛分为78个市镇，各市设市长与市议会，负责地方道路、垃圾处理、社区服务与部分治安协作。圣胡安都会区在行政与财政上居于核心地位。
localAdmin.en: The island was divided into 78 municipalities, each with a mayor and municipal assembly responsible for local roads, waste management, community services, and some policing coordination. The San Juan metropolitan area held the central administrative and fiscal role.

legalSystem.zh: 法律体系融合西班牙大陆法传统与美国普通法影响，民法、商法与行政法保留较强大陆法色彩。联邦法在适用范围内具有优先地位，终审可上诉至美国联邦法院体系。
legalSystem.en: The legal system blended Spanish civil-law tradition with U.S. common-law influence, with civil, commercial, and administrative law retaining strong continental features. Federal law had supremacy where applicable, and final appeals could enter the U.S. federal court system.

taxationSystem.zh: 财政收入主要来自个人所得税、公司税、销售与消费税前身项目、关税相关转移以及联邦拨款。居民一般不缴纳联邦所得税于本地所得部分，但需承担本地税负与部分联邦社会保险负担。
taxationSystem.en: Public revenue came mainly from personal income taxes, corporate taxes, precursor sales and excise levies, customs-related transfers, and federal grants. Residents generally did not pay federal income tax on locally sourced income, but they did bear local taxes and portions of federal social insurance obligations.

culturalAchievements.zh: 波多黎各在20世纪末在音乐、棒球、文学与大众传媒方面影响力显著，萨尔萨、流行乐与加勒比广播文化辐射整个拉美与美国拉丁裔社区。其双语教育与跨海移民经验塑造了独特的现代岛屿文化。
culturalAchievements.en: By the late twentieth century, Puerto Rico had notable influence in music, baseball, literature, and mass media, with salsa, pop music, and Caribbean broadcasting reaching across Latin America and U.S. Latino communities. Its bilingual education and transnational migration experience shaped a distinctive modern island culture.

languageFamily.zh: 印欧语系罗曼语族（西班牙语为主），并广泛使用英语。
languageFamily.en: Indo-European, Romance branch (primarily Spanish), with widespread use of English.

philosophy.zh: 以伊比利亚天主教传统、加勒比地方认同与美国公民政治文化并存为特征。
philosophy.en: Characterized by the coexistence of Iberian Catholic tradition, Caribbean identity, and American civic-political culture.

writingSystem.zh: 拉丁字母书写体系，官方与日常主要使用西班牙语，英语在政府、商业和联邦事务中亦重要。
writingSystem.en: Latin alphabet writing system; Spanish predominated in official and daily life, while English was also important in government, business, and federal affairs.

gdpDescription.zh: 2000年前后，波多黎各经济以制造业、制药、石化、金融服务、零售与旅游业为支柱。其经济高度依赖美国市场、联邦转移支付与外资企业税收安排。
gdpDescription.en: Around 2000, Puerto Rico’s economy was anchored by manufacturing, pharmaceuticals, petrochemicals, financial services, retail, and tourism. It depended heavily on the U.S. market, federal transfers, and tax arrangements attracting external firms.

mainIndustries.zh: 制药、医疗器械、电子制造、石油精炼、食品加工、金融服务、旅游业
mainIndustries.en: Pharmaceuticals, medical devices, electronics manufacturing, petroleum refining, food processing, financial services, tourism

tradeGoods.zh: 药品、化学品、电子零件、朗姆酒、医疗设备、加工食品、石化产品
tradeGoods.en: Pharmaceuticals, chemicals, electronic components, rum, medical equipment, processed foods, petrochemical products

householdWealth.zh: 家庭财富水平在加勒比地区相对较高，但贫富差距明显，住房自有率较高而金融资产集中于中上层与企业主。大量家庭依赖工资、政府就业与联邦福利共同维持消费能力。
householdWealth.en: Household wealth was relatively high by Caribbean standards, but inequality was pronounced, with high homeownership alongside financial assets concentrated among upper-middle groups and business owners. Many households relied on a mix of wages, public employment, and federal benefits to sustain consumption.

economicSystem.zh: 以市场经济为主，兼具高比例公共部门、联邦转移支付与税收优惠驱动的工业结构。
economicSystem.en: Primarily a market economy, combined with a large public sector, federal transfer payments, and a tax-incentive-driven industrial structure.

source.zh: 消费税、特许税与国内税

treasuryDescription.zh: 国库流动性依赖税收周期、公共债券发行与联邦资金拨付，现金储备并不宽裕。财政结构表面稳定，但已显露对举债和外部转移的依赖。
treasuryDescription.en: Treasury liquidity depended on tax cycles, public bond issuance, and federal disbursements, leaving cash reserves not especially ample. The fiscal structure appeared stable on the surface but already showed reliance on borrowing and external transfers.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政政策偏向以公共开支维持就业与社会稳定，同时通过税收优惠吸引制造业投资。长期看，此模式存在税基脆弱与债务积累风险。
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal policy leaned toward sustaining employment and social stability through public spending while using tax incentives to attract manufacturing investment. Over the long term, this model carried risks of a narrow tax base and debt accumulation.

name.zh: 波多黎各国民警卫队陆军部队

description.zh: 承担后备防务、灾害应对、工程支援与在联邦动员下的海外部署任务。
description.en: Handled reserve defense, disaster response, engineering support, and overseas deployment when federally mobilized.

name.zh: 波多黎各国民警卫队空军部队

description.zh: 负责空运、搜救、后勤和有限空中监视支援。
description.en: Responsible for airlift, search and rescue, logistics, and limited aerial surveillance support.

name.zh: 波多黎各州防卫队与相关本地安全力量
name.en: Puerto Rico State Guard and related local security forces

description.zh: 主要执行本地应急、治安协作与设施守备，并非独立正规国防军。
description.en: Primarily performed local emergency duties, security cooperation, and facility protection, rather than serving as an independent regular national military.

commanderInChief.zh: 总督佩德罗·罗塞略（州级国民警卫队名义统帅；联邦化时受美国总统指挥）
commanderInChief.en: Governor Pedro Rosselló (nominal commander of the territorial National Guard; under U.S. President when federalized)

technology.zh: 军事技术主要依附于美国国民警卫队体系，装备包括运输机、直升机、通信系统和轻型地面装备，整体技术水平在加勒比地区较高但缺乏独立重装与海空军体系。
technology.en: Military technology was largely embedded within the U.S. National Guard system, including transport aircraft, helicopters, communications systems, and light ground equipment. Its overall technical level was high by Caribbean standards but lacked independent heavy forces or full naval and air force structures.

threats.zh: 主要安全威胁并非传统对外战争，而是飓风灾害、毒品走私、港口与海岸安全、以及对美国联邦防务体系的高度依赖。岛内独立主义武装威胁在2000年前后已明显弱化。
threats.en: The main security threats were not conventional external war but hurricanes, drug trafficking, port and coastal security issues, and heavy dependence on the wider U.S. federal defense system. By around 2000, militant separatist threats on the island had substantially diminished.

populationDescription.zh: 波多黎各人口约380万，人口密度高，集中于北部沿海与圣胡安都会区。社会以西班牙语为主，族群构成为欧洲、非洲与混合血统加勒比居民，并与美国本土保持频繁迁移联系。
populationDescription.en: Puerto Rico had a population of about 3.8 million, with high density concentrated along the northern coast and in metropolitan San Juan. Society was predominantly Spanish-speaking, with European, African, and mixed Caribbean ancestry, and maintained frequent migration ties with the U.S. mainland.

socialClasses.zh: 社会阶层大致包括专业与管理阶层、公务员与教师等稳定中产、城市工薪劳动者、服务业与零售就业群体，以及低收入与失业人口。侨汇、公共住房和联邦福利在下层社会生活中占较大比重。
socialClasses.en: Social classes broadly included professional and managerial groups, stable middle sectors such as civil servants and teachers, urban wage laborers, service and retail workers, and lower-income or unemployed populations. Remittances, public housing, and federal welfare played major roles in lower-income livelihoods.

allies.zh: 作为美国领地，主要依附美国及其外交与防务体系，并与加勒比邻近地区保持经贸和文化往来。
allies.en: As a U.S. territory, Puerto Rico was aligned chiefly with the United States and its diplomatic and defense system, while also maintaining commercial and cultural ties with neighboring Caribbean regions.

enemies.zh: 无正式敌对国家；现实挑战主要来自跨国毒品网络、有组织犯罪及区域性经济竞争。
enemies.en: It had no formal enemy states; practical challenges came instead from transnational drug networks, organized crime, and regional economic competition.

foreignPolicy.zh: 波多黎各不具完全独立外交权，其对外政策基本由美国主导，但在加勒比合作、贸易推广、文化交流和侨务联系方面具有一定自治空间。
foreignPolicy.en: Puerto Rico did not possess full sovereign foreign-policy authority, and its external policy was largely directed by the United States, though it retained some room for action in Caribbean cooperation, trade promotion, cultural exchange, and diaspora relations.

keyInnovations.zh: 制药生产标准化、医疗器械装配、现代港口物流、蜂窝通信、电视广播网络、联邦高速公路与机场体系构成其关键技术基础。
keyInnovations.en: Standardized pharmaceutical production, medical-device assembly, modern port logistics, cellular communications, television broadcasting networks, and federally integrated highways and airports formed its key technological base.

strengths.zh: 拥有较高教育普及率、成熟基础设施、美国市场准入、较强制造业基础与加勒比区域中领先的技术条件。双语环境与侨民网络也增强了其商业和文化连接能力。
strengths.en: It possessed relatively broad educational access, mature infrastructure, access to the U.S. market, a strong manufacturing base, and technological conditions advanced for the Caribbean. Its bilingual environment and diaspora networks also strengthened commercial and cultural connectivity.

weaknesses.zh: 经济高度依赖外资、联邦政策与税收优惠，财政赤字和公共债务风险已开始累积。政治地位未定导致制度长期存在结构性不确定性，劳动力外流亦削弱内生增长。
weaknesses.en: The economy depended heavily on outside capital, federal policy, and tax incentives, while fiscal deficits and public debt risks were already accumulating. Its unresolved political status created long-term structural uncertainty, and labor outmigration weakened endogenous growth.

outlook.zh: 若能维持制造业竞争力并推动财政改革，短期内仍可保持稳定；但长期前景取决于联邦政策变化、债务控制和政治地位问题的处理。2000年前后表面繁荣之下，已埋下后续财政危机的种子。
outlook.en: If it could maintain manufacturing competitiveness and pursue fiscal reform, it could remain stable in the short term; however, its long-term future depended on federal policy changes, debt control, and resolution of its political status. Beneath the apparent prosperity around 2000, the seeds of later fiscal crisis were already present.

description.zh: 2000年前后的波多黎各是一个在美国主权下享有高度自治、经济中等发达但财政与政治结构隐含脆弱性的加勒比现代地区。
description.en: Around 2000, Puerto Rico was a highly self-governing Caribbean polity under U.S. sovereignty, moderately developed economically but marked by underlying fiscal and political fragility.

governmentForm.zh: 特立尼达和多巴哥在2000年前后实行议会共和制，由总统担任国家元首、总理领导政府。
governmentForm.en: Around 2000, Trinidad and Tobago functioned as a parliamentary republic, with a president as head of state and a prime minister leading the government.

socialStructure.zh: 社会由非洲裔、印度裔、混血及少数欧洲裔、华裔和叙黎巴嫩裔群体构成，城市化程度较高。中产阶层主要集中在政府部门、能源业、金融业和教育系统。宗教与族群多元并存，基督教与印度教共同塑造公共文化。
socialStructure.en: Society was composed of Afro-Trinidadians, Indo-Trinidadians, mixed communities, and smaller European, Chinese, and Syrian-Lebanese minorities, with a high degree of urbanization. The middle class was concentrated in government service, energy, finance, and education. Religious and ethnic pluralism shaped public life, with Christianity and Hinduism both influential.

rulingClass.zh: 统治阶层主要由民选政治领袖、高级公务员、司法精英以及能源和商业界上层人士组成。政党政治深受族群与地区支持基础影响。
rulingClass.en: The ruling class consisted mainly of elected political leaders, senior civil servants, judicial elites, and upper-level figures in the energy and business sectors. Party politics was strongly influenced by ethnic and regional support bases.

succession.zh: 总统由选举团间接选举产生，总理由在众议院占多数的政党或联盟领袖出任。政权更替主要通过定期选举和平完成。
succession.en: The president was indirectly elected by an electoral college, while the prime minister came from the leader of the majority party or coalition in the House of Representatives. Transfers of power occurred primarily through regular elections.

structure.zh: 国家采用威斯敏斯特式议会制度，设总统、总理、内阁以及两院制议会。中央政府掌握国防、财政、能源与外交事务，多巴哥另设地方议会处理部分地方行政。
structure.en: The state used a Westminster-style parliamentary system with a president, prime minister, cabinet, and bicameral parliament. The central government controlled defense, finance, energy, and foreign affairs, while Tobago had its own assembly for certain local matters.

function.zh: 负责国家预算、税收、债务管理与宏观经济政策。
function.en: Managed the national budget, taxation, debt, and macroeconomic policy.

name.en: Ministry of Energy and Energy Industries

function.zh: 监管石油、天然气、石化产业及资源开发许可。
function.en: Oversaw petroleum, natural gas, petrochemicals, and resource licensing.

function.zh: 负责警务、边境安全、移民与国防协调。
function.en: Handled policing, border security, immigration, and defense coordination.

function.zh: 管理中小学教育、课程标准与教师体系。
function.en: Administered primary and secondary education, curriculum standards, and the teaching system.

localAdmin.zh: 地方行政由市政公司、区议会及多巴哥议会负责，管理城市服务、道路、市场与地方规划。西班牙港与圣费尔南多等城市具较成熟市政体系。
localAdmin.en: Local administration was handled by municipal corporations, regional councils, and the Tobago House of Assembly, managing city services, roads, markets, and local planning. Port of Spain and San Fernando had comparatively developed municipal systems.

legalSystem.zh: 法律体系以英国普通法为基础，并保留成文法和上诉制度。终审司法在当时仍主要连结英国枢密院司法委员会。
legalSystem.en: The legal system was based on English common law, combined with statutory law and appellate procedures. Final judicial appeal at the time remained linked primarily to the Judicial Committee of the Privy Council.

taxationSystem.zh: 税制以所得税、公司税、进口关税、消费税及能源相关收入为主。石油与天然气部门提供了重要财政来源。
taxationSystem.en: The tax system relied on income tax, corporate tax, import duties, consumption taxes, and energy-related revenue. The oil and natural gas sectors provided a major fiscal base.

culturalAchievements.zh: 特立尼达和多巴哥以钢鼓音乐、加勒比狂欢节和卡利普索、索卡音乐闻名全球。该国在文学、板球和舞台表演方面也具有区域影响力。
culturalAchievements.en: Trinidad and Tobago was globally known for steelpan music, Carnival, and calypso and soca traditions. The country also had regional influence in literature, cricket, and performing arts.

languageFamily.zh: 英语属于印欧语系日耳曼语族；民间亦广泛使用特立尼达英语克里奥尔语。
languageFamily.en: English belongs to the Indo-European Germanic family; Trinidad English Creole was also widely spoken in everyday life.

philosophy.zh: 国家文化强调多元共存、后殖民民族认同与加勒比公共生活传统。
philosophy.en: National culture emphasized plural coexistence, postcolonial identity, and the traditions of Caribbean public life.

writingSystem.zh: 拉丁字母书写系统，官方语言为英语。
writingSystem.en: Latin alphabet writing system, with English as the official language.

gdpDescription.zh: 经济以石油、天然气和石化出口为核心，是加勒比地区工业化程度较高的国家之一。服务业、金融业和制造业在资源收入支持下保持相对活跃。
gdpDescription.en: The economy centered on petroleum, natural gas, and petrochemical exports, making it one of the more industrialized states in the Caribbean. Services, finance, and manufacturing remained relatively active with support from resource revenues.

mainIndustries.zh: 石油、天然气、石化、化肥、金融服务、制造业、旅游业
mainIndustries.en: Petroleum, natural gas, petrochemicals, fertilizers, financial services, manufacturing, tourism

tradeGoods.zh: 液化天然气、甲醇、氨、原油、精炼油、钢材、食品加工品
tradeGoods.en: Liquefied natural gas, methanol, ammonia, crude oil, refined fuels, steel products, processed foods

householdWealth.zh: 城市家庭财富水平在加勒比地区属中上，住房、自有车辆和耐用品拥有率较高，但族群与地区之间差距仍明显。
householdWealth.en: Household wealth was upper-middle by Caribbean standards, with relatively high ownership of homes, vehicles, and durable goods, though ethnic and regional inequalities remained visible.

economicSystem.zh: 以市场经济为主、国家对能源部门有强力监管的混合经济体制。
economicSystem.en: A mixed economy based on markets, with strong state oversight of the energy sector.

treasuryDescription.zh: 国库状况总体稳健，受能源出口价格波动影响较大，但外汇收入较充足。
treasuryDescription.en: The treasury was generally sound, though heavily affected by fluctuations in energy export prices; foreign exchange earnings were comparatively strong.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政政策倾向利用能源收入维持社会支出与基础设施建设，同时努力控制债务和周期性赤字。
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal policy tended to use energy revenues to sustain social spending and infrastructure while attempting to control debt and cyclical deficits.

description.zh: 负责本土安全、基础步兵部署与灾害支援。
description.en: Responsible for homeland security, basic infantry deployment, and disaster support.

description.zh: 负责海上巡逻、缉私、搜救与海域边界保护。
description.en: Handled maritime patrol, anti-smuggling operations, search and rescue, and protection of territorial waters.

description.zh: 执行空中监视、运输与有限巡逻任务。
description.en: Conducted air surveillance, transport, and limited patrol missions.

technology.zh: 装备以轻武器、近海巡逻艇、运输机和直升机为主，整体技术水平适中，主要服务国内安全与边境控制。
technology.en: Equipment centered on small arms, coastal patrol vessels, transport aircraft, and helicopters; the overall technological level was moderate and oriented toward domestic security and border control.

threats.zh: 主要威胁来自跨国毒品走私、海上非法活动、边境执法压力及自然灾害应对需求，而非传统国家间战争。
threats.en: Primary threats came from transnational drug trafficking, illegal maritime activity, border enforcement pressures, and natural disasters rather than conventional interstate war.

populationDescription.zh: 人口约130万，集中于特立尼达岛西部和中部城市带，多巴哥人口较少。人口结构较年轻，但受外移民和技术人才流动影响明显。
populationDescription.en: The population was about 1.3 million, concentrated in the western and central urban belt of Trinidad, while Tobago remained much less populated. The population was relatively young but noticeably affected by emigration and skilled labor mobility.

socialClasses.zh: 社会可概分为专业与商业上层、中产公务及技术阶层、工薪劳动者和低收入非正规就业群体。
socialClasses.en: Society could be broadly divided into upper professional and commercial elites, a middle class of public servants and technicians, wage earners, and lower-income informal workers.

allies.zh: 加勒比共同体成员国、美国、英国、加拿大及其他英联邦伙伴。
allies.en: CARICOM member states, the United States, the United Kingdom, Canada, and other Commonwealth partners.

enemies.zh: 无正式国家敌对对象，但与跨国犯罪网络存在持续对抗。
enemies.en: No formal state enemies, though it faced continuing confrontation with transnational criminal networks.

foreignPolicy.zh: 外交政策以加勒比区域合作、能源贸易、英联邦联系和与北美国家务实合作为核心。
foreignPolicy.en: Foreign policy centered on Caribbean regional cooperation, energy trade, Commonwealth ties, and pragmatic cooperation with North American states.

keyInnovations.zh: 近海油气开采、液化天然气设施、石化加工、移动通信和现代港口物流是其关键技术能力。
keyInnovations.en: Offshore hydrocarbon extraction, LNG facilities, petrochemical processing, mobile communications, and modern port logistics were key technological capabilities.

strengths.zh: 能源资源丰富、工业基础较强、教育水平较高、区域交通与金融地位较好。
strengths.en: Rich energy resources, a relatively strong industrial base, higher educational attainment, and a favorable regional transport and financial position.

weaknesses.zh: 经济过度依赖能源出口，社会治安与族群政治张力时有显现，规模市场有限。
weaknesses.en: The economy was overly dependent on energy exports, social security issues and ethnic political tensions persisted, and the domestic market was small.

outlook.zh: 若能成功推动经济多元化并加强公共安全，未来仍可保持加勒比地区较高发展水平。
outlook.en: If it could diversify the economy successfully and strengthen public security, it was likely to remain among the more developed states in the Caribbean.

description.zh: 一个以油气资源、多元族群文化和议会共和体制为特征的加勒比国家。
description.en: A Caribbean state characterized by hydrocarbons, multiethnic culture, and a parliamentary republican system.

dynasty.zh: 贾格迪奥总统时期的圭亚那合作共和国
dynasty.en: Co-operative Republic of Guyana under President Jagdeo

governmentForm.zh: 圭亚那在2000年前后是实行议会民主与总统制结合的合作共和国。
governmentForm.en: Around 2000, Guyana was a co-operative republic combining parliamentary democracy with a strong presidency.

socialStructure.zh: 社会由印度裔、非洲裔、混血群体、美洲原住民和少量欧洲裔、华裔人口构成。沿海城市和甘蔗稻米地带人口密集，内陆则人口稀少且以矿业与原住民聚居区为主。族群认同与政党政治联系紧密。
socialStructure.en: Society was composed of Indo-Guyanese, Afro-Guyanese, mixed communities, Indigenous peoples, and smaller European and Chinese minorities. Population was dense along the coast and in sugar and rice districts, while the interior remained sparsely settled and oriented toward mining and Indigenous settlements. Ethnic identity was closely tied to party politics.

rulingClass.zh: 统治阶层包括总统、人民进步党核心领导层、高级公务员、国有企业管理者以及商界精英。政治权力主要由沿海行政与党务网络掌控。
rulingClass.en: The ruling class included the president, the core leadership of the People's Progressive Party, senior civil servants, state-enterprise managers, and business elites. Political power was concentrated in coastal administrative and party networks.

succession.zh: 国家元首由选举产生，执政党通过议会多数和全国投票维持执政。权力交接总体依宪法进行，但常受族群政治竞争影响。
succession.en: The head of state was elected, and the ruling party maintained power through parliamentary strength and national voting. Succession generally followed constitutional rules but was heavily influenced by ethnic political competition.

structure.zh: 政府由总统、总理、内阁和一院制国民议会组成。行政权较强，议会政治与党派纪律对政策制定影响明显。地方政府存在，但资源和执行能力有限。
structure.en: The government consisted of the president, prime minister, cabinet, and a unicameral National Assembly. Executive authority was strong, while parliamentary politics and party discipline significantly shaped policymaking. Local government existed but had limited resources and implementation capacity.

function.zh: 负责预算、税收、国债管理和国际金融合作。
function.en: Managed the budget, taxation, public debt, and international financial cooperation.

function.zh: 负责糖业、稻米、渔业和农村灌溉体系。
function.en: Oversaw sugar, rice, fisheries, and rural irrigation systems.

function.zh: 负责警务、国内安全、移民和公共秩序。
function.en: Handled policing, internal security, immigration, and public order.

name.en: Ministry of Public Works and Communications

function.zh: 负责道路、海港、机场和通信基础设施建设。
function.en: Managed roads, ports, airports, and communications infrastructure.

localAdmin.zh: 地方行政包括地区民主委员会、村镇与城市议会，但财政来源较弱，对中央拨款依赖较高。
localAdmin.en: Local administration included regional democratic councils and municipal or village councils, but these depended heavily on central transfers due to weak local revenue bases.

legalSystem.zh: 法律体系承袭英国普通法传统，并由成文法和宪法裁判加以补充。法院体系在政治争议与产权案件中具有重要作用。
legalSystem.en: The legal system derived from the British common-law tradition, supplemented by statute and constitutional adjudication. The courts played an important role in political disputes and property matters.

taxationSystem.zh: 税制以进口税、消费税、企业税和所得税为主。国家也通过国有糖业和矿业相关收益间接获取财政资源。
taxationSystem.en: The tax system relied on import duties, consumption taxes, corporate taxes, and income taxes. The state also drew fiscal resources indirectly from state-linked sugar and mining activities.

culturalAchievements.zh: 圭亚那在文学、加勒比音乐、板球文化和多宗教节庆方面具有鲜明特色。其文化成就突出表现为不同移民传统在同一国家空间中的并存与融合。
culturalAchievements.en: Guyana was notable for its literature, Caribbean music, cricket culture, and multireligious festivals. Its chief cultural achievement lay in the coexistence and blending of different migrant traditions within one national space.

languageFamily.zh: 英语属印欧语系日耳曼语族；圭亚那克里奥尔语受英语影响；印地语和乌尔都语属印欧语系。
languageFamily.en: English belongs to the Indo-European Germanic branch; Guyanese Creole is English-based; Hindi and Urdu are also Indo-European languages.

philosophy.zh: 文化观念融合英属殖民法政传统、基督教伦理、印度教与加勒比多元社会价值。
philosophy.en: Its cultural outlook blended British colonial legal-political traditions, Christian ethics, Hindu influences, and broader Caribbean pluralist values.

writingSystem.zh: 主要使用拉丁字母书写英语，宗教与族群社群中也使用印地语、乌尔都语和克里奥尔表达。
writingSystem.en: It primarily used the Latin script for English, while Hindi, Urdu, and Creole forms were also present within religious and ethnic communities.

gdpDescription.zh: 经济以糖、稻米、铝土矿、黄金、木材和公共部门服务为基础。规模较小但对外贸易导向明显，受商品价格与基础设施瓶颈影响较大。
gdpDescription.en: The economy rested on sugar, rice, bauxite, gold, timber, and public-sector services. It was small but strongly trade-oriented, and heavily affected by commodity prices and infrastructure bottlenecks.

mainIndustries.zh: 糖业、稻米种植、铝土矿、黄金开采、林业、公共服务业
mainIndustries.en: Sugar production, rice cultivation, bauxite, gold mining, forestry, public services

tradeGoods.zh: 糖、稻米、黄金、铝土矿、木材、燃料和机械进口品
tradeGoods.en: Sugar, rice, gold, bauxite, timber, and imported fuel and machinery

householdWealth.zh: 家庭财富总体有限，房产、小型农业用地和侨汇是重要资产来源。中产阶层规模不大，许多家庭依靠工资、农业收入和海外联系维持生活。
householdWealth.en: Household wealth was generally modest, with homes, small agricultural plots, and remittances as important assets. The middle class was not large, and many families relied on wages, farming income, and overseas connections.

unit.en: US dollars per person per year (nominal, approx.)

economicSystem.zh: 以市场导向为主、保留合作共和国和国企遗产的混合经济。
economicSystem.en: A market-oriented mixed economy retaining elements of the republic's cooperative and state-enterprise legacy.

treasuryDescription.zh: 国库规模有限，受出口创汇能力和国际金融机构安排影响较大。
treasuryDescription.en: The treasury was limited in scale and strongly affected by export earnings and arrangements with international financial institutions.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政政策侧重稳定汇率、控制赤字、维持公共工资并支持农业和基础设施。
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal policy emphasized exchange-rate stability, deficit control, maintenance of public wages, and support for agriculture and infrastructure.

description.zh: 负责国土防卫、边境巡逻和对内支援任务。
description.en: Responsible for territorial defense, border patrol, and internal support missions.

description.zh: 负责河口、海岸线与海上资源区巡逻。
description.en: Patrolled estuaries, the coastline, and maritime resource zones.

description.zh: 拥有少量运输和巡逻飞机，用于后勤、搜救与侦察。
description.en: Maintained a small number of transport and patrol aircraft for logistics, search and rescue, and reconnaissance.

technology.zh: 军备规模小，以轻武器、巡逻艇、运输机和有限通信系统为主，适合边境与治安任务。
technology.en: The force was small, relying on light weapons, patrol boats, transport aircraft, and limited communications systems, suitable for border and security duties.

threats.zh: 主要安全压力来自与委内瑞拉的领土争议、边境走私、内陆治安和有限的跨境犯罪。
threats.en: Major security pressures came from the territorial dispute with Venezuela, border smuggling, interior security concerns, and limited cross-border crime.

populationDescription.zh: 全国人口约75万，主要集中在大西洋沿岸低地。人口外流明显，侨民网络对国内社会和经济具有持续影响。
populationDescription.en: The country had about 750,000 people, concentrated mainly in the Atlantic coastal lowlands. Emigration was significant, and diaspora networks had a continuing influence on domestic society and the economy.

socialClasses.zh: 社会分层包括政治和商业精英、小型专业中产、公务员与教师阶层、农业劳动者、矿工和城市低收入群体。
socialClasses.en: Social stratification included political and commercial elites, a small professional middle class, civil servants and teachers, agricultural workers, miners, and low-income urban groups.

allies.zh: 与加勒比共同体成员、英联邦国家、美国和部分国际金融机构保持合作。
allies.en: Maintained cooperative ties with CARICOM members, Commonwealth countries, the United States, and international financial institutions.

enemies.zh: 无正式敌国，但与委内瑞拉存在长期领土争议。
enemies.en: It had no formal enemy state, but maintained a long-standing territorial dispute with Venezuela.

foreignPolicy.zh: 外交以维护领土主张、依托加勒比共同体、吸引投资和争取发展援助为重点。
foreignPolicy.en: Foreign policy focused on defending territorial claims, working through CARICOM, attracting investment, and securing development assistance.

keyInnovations.zh: 关键进展体现在制糖机械化、采矿设备、排水灌溉系统和基础电信网络扩展。
keyInnovations.en: Key advances lay in sugar mechanization, mining equipment, drainage and irrigation systems, and the expansion of basic telecommunications.

strengths.zh: 拥有农业出口基础、矿产资源、英语环境和加勒比区域联系。
strengths.en: It had agricultural export capacity, mineral resources, an English-speaking environment, and Caribbean regional connections.

weaknesses.zh: 人口规模小、基础设施不足、族群政治分裂和人才外流显著。
weaknesses.en: Its weaknesses included a small population, inadequate infrastructure, ethnic political polarization, and substantial emigration of skilled people.

outlook.zh: 若能改善治理并扩大投资，具备稳步增长潜力，但政治分裂和外部市场波动仍是重要制约。
outlook.en: If governance improved and investment expanded, it had potential for steady growth, though political division and external market fluctuations remained major constraints.

description.zh: 2000年前后的圭亚那是一个多族群、贸易导向型的小型加勒比南美共和国，经济依赖农业与矿产出口。
description.en: Around 2000, Guyana was a small, multiethnic, trade-oriented Caribbean-South American republic dependent on agricultural and mineral exports.

dynasty.zh: 韦内蒂安总统时期的苏里南共和国
dynasty.en: Republic of Suriname under President Venetiaan

governmentForm.zh: 苏里南在2000年前后是实行议会民主制的总统共和国。
governmentForm.en: Around 2000, Suriname was a presidential republic operating under a parliamentary democratic framework.

socialStructure.zh: 社会由印度裔、克里奥尔人、爪哇裔、马龙人、原住民、华裔和少量欧洲裔共同构成。人口高度集中在沿海和帕拉马里博，内陆则以雨林社区、矿区和部族聚落为主。宗教和族群多元并存是国家社会结构的显著特点。
socialStructure.en: Society included Hindustani, Creole, Javanese, Maroon, Indigenous, Chinese, and smaller European communities. Population was heavily concentrated along the coast and in Paramaribo, while the interior was dominated by rainforest communities, mining zones, and tribal settlements. Religious and ethnic pluralism was a defining feature of the national social structure.

rulingClass.zh: 统治阶层主要由总统、议会主要党派领袖、高级公务员、军警高层以及与贸易和资源部门相关的商界精英组成。首都政治与行政网络在国家权力中占据核心。
rulingClass.en: The ruling class consisted mainly of the president, leaders of major parliamentary parties, senior civil servants, top military and police officers, and business elites connected to trade and resource sectors. Political and administrative networks in the capital occupied the core of state power.

succession.zh: 总统由国民议会选举产生，若议会无法形成足够多数，则通过更广泛的国民大会机制决定。权力交接基本遵循宪政程序。
succession.en: The president was elected by the National Assembly, and if parliament failed to produce a sufficient majority, a broader People's Assembly mechanism was used. Transfers of power generally followed constitutional procedures.

structure.zh: 政府由总统、副总统、内阁和一院制国民议会组成。国家行政相对集中，但地区专员在地方管理中承担重要角色。法律与制度深受荷兰殖民行政传统影响。
structure.en: The government consisted of the president, vice president, cabinet, and a unicameral National Assembly. Administration was relatively centralized, though district commissioners played an important role locally. Law and institutions remained strongly shaped by Dutch colonial administrative traditions.

function.zh: 负责预算、税收、海关、国债和货币财政协调。
function.en: Managed budgeting, taxation, customs, public debt, and fiscal-monetary coordination.

function.zh: 负责铝土矿、黄金、林业、水电和资源开发政策。
function.en: Oversaw bauxite, gold, forestry, hydropower, and natural-resource development policy.

function.zh: 负责户籍、选举、地方行政和部分国内治理事务。
function.en: Handled civil registration, elections, local administration, and selected domestic governance functions.

name.en: Ministry of Education and Community Development

function.zh: 负责学校体系、师资和多语社会中的公共教育。
function.en: Managed the school system, teacher administration, and public education in a multilingual society.

localAdmin.zh: 全国分为若干区，由区长官和地方机构管理。地方行政存在，但财政和政策能力仍明显依赖中央。
localAdmin.en: The country was divided into districts governed by commissioners and local institutions. Local administration existed, but fiscal and policy capacity remained strongly dependent on the central state.

legalSystem.zh: 法律体系以荷兰大陆法传统为基础，并由宪法、成文法和独立后的国家立法加以补充。
legalSystem.en: The legal system was based on the Dutch civil-law tradition, supplemented by the constitution, statutes, and post-independence national legislation.

taxationSystem.zh: 税制包括进口关税、营业税、所得税和资源部门相关收费。由于经济规模有限，财政对贸易和资源收益较为敏感。
taxationSystem.en: The tax system included import duties, turnover taxes, income taxes, and fees linked to resource sectors. Because the economy was small, public finances were sensitive to trade and resource earnings.

culturalAchievements.zh: 苏里南以多语社会、节庆文化、热带音乐和跨族群饮食传统著称。其最大文化成就在于将南亚、非洲、印尼与荷兰遗产长期并置于同一国家框架之中。
culturalAchievements.en: Suriname was known for its multilingual society, festival culture, tropical music, and cross-ethnic culinary traditions. Its major cultural achievement was the long-term coexistence of South Asian, African, Indonesian, and Dutch inheritances within a single national framework.

languageFamily.zh: 荷兰语属印欧语系日耳曼语族；斯拉南汤戈语为克里奥尔语；萨拉纳米印地语属印欧语系；爪哇语属南岛语系。
languageFamily.en: Dutch belongs to the Indo-European Germanic branch; Sranan Tongo is a creole language; Sarnami Hindustani belongs to Indo-European; Javanese belongs to the Austronesian family.

philosophy.zh: 文化观念融合荷兰法政遗产、加勒比多元主义、印度教与基督教伦理，以及马龙和原住民传统。
philosophy.en: Its cultural outlook blended Dutch legal-political heritage, Caribbean pluralism, Hindu and Christian ethics, and Maroon and Indigenous traditions.

writingSystem.zh: 主要以拉丁字母书写荷兰语，同时斯拉南汤戈语、印地斯坦语和爪哇语在社会生活中广泛使用。
writingSystem.en: It primarily used the Latin script for Dutch, while Sranan Tongo, Hindustani, and Javanese were widely used in social life.

gdpDescription.zh: 经济以铝土矿、氧化铝、黄金、林业和服务业为基础。人口规模小使人均产出高于部分邻国，但经济高度依赖资源价格和进口商品。
gdpDescription.en: The economy was based on bauxite, alumina, gold, forestry, and services. Its small population produced higher per-capita output than some neighbors, but the economy depended heavily on resource prices and imported goods.

mainIndustries.zh: 铝土矿与氧化铝、黄金、林业、水电、零售与政府服务
mainIndustries.en: Bauxite and alumina, gold, forestry, hydropower, retail, and government services

tradeGoods.zh: 氧化铝、铝土矿、黄金、木材、燃料与消费品进口
tradeGoods.en: Alumina, bauxite, gold, timber, and imported fuel and consumer goods

householdWealth.zh: 家庭财富主要表现为城市住房、小型商业、工资收入和海外汇款。部分资源部门雇员与商人收入较高，但贫富差距依然明显。
householdWealth.en: Household wealth was reflected mainly in urban housing, small businesses, wage income, and overseas remittances. Some workers and traders linked to resource sectors earned relatively high incomes, but inequality remained visible.

unit.en: US dollars per person per year (nominal, approx.)

economicSystem.zh: 以市场经济为主、国家在资源管理和公共部门中仍占较大比重的混合经济。
economicSystem.en: A mixed economy oriented toward markets, with the state still playing a significant role in resource management and the public sector.

treasuryDescription.zh: 国库与外汇储备有限但尚可维持基本进口需要，不过对资源出口波动敏感。
treasuryDescription.en: Treasury and foreign-exchange reserves were limited but sufficient for basic import needs, though they were sensitive to fluctuations in resource exports.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政政策强调稳定货币、维持公共部门运作并争取资源收益为预算提供支撑。
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal policy emphasized monetary stability, sustaining public-sector operations, and using resource earnings to support the budget.

description.zh: 负责国土防卫、内陆巡逻和对政府的安全支援。
description.en: Responsible for territorial defense, interior patrols, and security support to the government.

description.zh: 负责河流、近海和港口巡逻，保护渔业与边境水域。
description.en: Patrolled rivers, coastal waters, and ports, protecting fisheries and border waterways.

description.zh: 拥有少量直升机和轻型飞机，用于运输、搜救和侦察。
description.en: Maintained a small number of helicopters and light aircraft for transport, search and rescue, and reconnaissance.

technology.zh: 军备规模有限，以轻武器、河海巡逻艇、直升机和小型运输机为主，适合雨林与河流环境。
technology.en: Military equipment was limited, consisting mainly of light weapons, riverine and coastal patrol craft, helicopters, and small transport aircraft suited to rainforest and river environments.

threats.zh: 主要风险来自边境走私、非法采矿、内陆治安和周边地区的跨境犯罪活动。
threats.en: Main risks came from border smuggling, illegal mining, interior security problems, and cross-border criminal activity in neighboring regions.

populationDescription.zh: 全国人口约45万，规模小且高度集中于首都和沿海带。内陆人口稀少，但族群多样性很高。
populationDescription.en: The country had about 450,000 people, small in size and heavily concentrated in the capital and coastal belt. The interior was sparsely populated, but ethnic diversity was very high.

socialClasses.zh: 社会包括政治与商业精英、较小的受教育中产、公务员和教师、资源部门工人、农村居民以及内陆部族和马龙社区。
socialClasses.en: Society included political and commercial elites, a modest educated middle class, civil servants and teachers, resource-sector workers, rural residents, and interior tribal and Maroon communities.

allies.zh: 与荷兰、加勒比共同体成员、巴西及区域发展伙伴保持合作关系。
allies.en: Maintained cooperative relations with the Netherlands, CARICOM members, Brazil, and regional development partners.

enemies.zh: 无明确敌国，但与邻国在边界问题上存在历史性争议。
enemies.en: It had no clear enemy state, though historical boundary disputes existed with neighboring countries.

foreignPolicy.zh: 外交重视对荷关系、加勒比区域合作、吸引投资和在边界争议中维护国家利益。
foreignPolicy.en: Foreign policy emphasized relations with the Netherlands, Caribbean regional cooperation, investment attraction, and defense of national interests in boundary disputes.

keyInnovations.zh: 关键技术集中于氧化铝加工、水电设施、热带木材采运和基础通信网络。
keyInnovations.en: Key technologies centered on alumina processing, hydropower facilities, tropical timber extraction, and basic communications networks.

strengths.zh: 资源禀赋较好、人口压力较低、社会多元且拥有荷语和加勒比双重联结。
strengths.en: Its strengths were favorable resource endowments, relatively low population pressure, a diverse society, and dual Dutch-Caribbean linkages.

weaknesses.zh: 市场规模小、对资源出口依赖高、内陆整合不足且财政能力有限。
weaknesses.en: Its weaknesses included a small domestic market, high dependence on resource exports, weak integration of the interior, and limited fiscal capacity.

outlook.zh: 若能稳定财政、改进治理并提升资源收益管理，具有稳健发展前景，但仍易受外部价格波动冲击。
outlook.en: If it stabilized public finances, improved governance, and managed resource earnings better, it had a solid development outlook, though it remained vulnerable to external price shocks.

description.zh: 2000年前后的苏里南是一个人口稀少但族群与宗教高度多元、依赖矿业与贸易的小型共和国。
description.en: Around 2000, Suriname was a small republic with a sparse population, high ethnic and religious diversity, and an economy reliant on mining and trade.

dynasty.zh: 法兰西共和国海外省时期

governmentForm.zh: 法属圭亚那在2000年前后是法兰西共和国的海外省和海外大区，由法国中央政府派驻官员并结合地方民选机构共同治理。
governmentForm.en: Around 2000, French Guiana was an overseas department and overseas region of the French Republic, governed through a combination of French state-appointed officials and locally elected institutions.

socialStructure.zh: 社会由克里奥尔人、法国本土移民、马龙人、印第安原住民以及来自海地、巴西和苏里南的移民共同组成。沿海城市人口较集中，内陆则以森林社区、原住民聚落和少量矿业据点为主。公共服务高度依赖法国财政转移支付，社会分层与公务体系联系紧密。
socialStructure.en: Society was composed of Creoles, migrants from metropolitan France, Maroon communities, Indigenous peoples, and immigrants from Haiti, Brazil, and Suriname. Population was concentrated in coastal towns, while the interior consisted mainly of forest communities, Indigenous settlements, and a few mining outposts. Public services depended heavily on fiscal transfers from France, and social stratification was closely tied to the public sector.

rulingClass.zh: 统治阶层主要包括法国国家代表、地方议会政治人物、高级公务员以及与航天中心和公共部门有关的专业精英。法国本土行政体系对关键决策仍有主导权。
rulingClass.en: The ruling class mainly included representatives of the French state, local assembly politicians, senior civil servants, and professional elites linked to the space center and public sector. Metropolitan French administrative structures still dominated key decisions.

succession.zh: 行政首长由法国政府任命，地方议会领导则通过定期选举产生。其政治延续遵循法兰西第五共和国的宪政与选举程序。
succession.en: The chief state administrator was appointed by the French government, while leaders of local assemblies were chosen through regular elections. Political succession followed the constitutional and electoral procedures of the French Fifth Republic.

structure.zh: 法属圭亚那的政府结构结合了法国中央集权行政和地方代议机构。省长代表巴黎行使国家权力，地方设有总议会与大区议会处理教育、基础设施和社会事务。司法、治安、财政和边境事务则主要由法国国家机关掌握。
structure.en: French Guiana’s government combined centralized French state administration with local representative institutions. The prefect exercised state authority on behalf of Paris, while the General Council and Regional Council handled education, infrastructure, and social affairs. Justice, security, fiscal policy, and border matters remained largely under French national control.

function.zh: 代表法国政府统筹治安、行政协调、移民与国家政策执行。
function.en: Represented the French government and coordinated security, administration, immigration, and implementation of national policy.

name.zh: 大区与总议会行政机构

function.zh: 负责地方预算、道路、学校设施、社会发展和区域规划。
function.en: Managed local budgets, roads, school facilities, social development, and regional planning.

function.zh: 涵盖教育、卫生、财政、海关和司法等国家机关在当地的分支。
function.en: Included local branches of national agencies for education, health, treasury, customs, and justice.

localAdmin.zh: 地方行政以市镇为基础，卡宴、库鲁和圣洛朗-迪马罗尼等市镇拥有民选市长和市议会。内陆地区因交通困难而更依赖国家驻点、宪兵和专项服务机构。
localAdmin.en: Local administration was based on communes, with towns such as Cayenne, Kourou, and Saint-Laurent-du-Maroni governed by elected mayors and municipal councils. Interior areas, because of transport difficulties, relied more heavily on state outposts, gendarmerie presence, and specialized service agencies.

legalSystem.zh: 法律体系属于法国大陆法传统，适用法国共和国的宪法、刑法和民法。部分原住民与内陆社区在实际生活中保留习惯性调解，但不构成独立法域。
legalSystem.en: The legal system belonged to the French civil-law tradition, applying the constitution, criminal law, and civil law of the French Republic. Some Indigenous and interior communities retained customary mediation in practice, but these did not constitute separate legal jurisdictions.

taxationSystem.zh: 税制总体纳入法国财政体系，主要包括消费税、所得税、企业税和海关相关收入。由于经济基础较弱，地方财政高度依赖法国中央转移和补贴。
taxationSystem.en: Taxation was broadly integrated into the French fiscal system, including consumption taxes, income tax, business taxes, and customs-related revenue. Because the local economy was narrow, public finances depended heavily on transfers and subsidies from the French central government.

culturalAchievements.zh: 法属圭亚那在现代文化上体现为克里奥尔音乐、狂欢节传统和多语言社会生活的融合。库鲁航天中心也使其在现代科技与欧洲航天文化中占有独特位置。
culturalAchievements.en: French Guiana’s modern cultural achievements included the blending of Creole music, carnival traditions, and multilingual social life. The Kourou space center also gave it a distinctive place in modern technological and European space culture.

languageFamily.zh: 印欧语系罗曼语族（法语）为主，并存克里奥尔语、马龙语言及原住民语言
languageFamily.en: Primarily Indo-European Romance (French), alongside Creoles, Maroon languages, and Indigenous languages

philosophy.zh: 法国共和主义、天主教传统、多族群克里奥尔文化
philosophy.en: French republicanism, Catholic tradition, and multiethnic Creole culture

writingSystem.zh: 拉丁字母，行政与教育主要使用法语
writingSystem.en: Latin alphabet, with French as the main language of administration and education

gdpDescription.zh: 法属圭亚那经济规模较小，但人均产出因法国财政支持和库鲁航天中心而明显高于周边国家。经济结构以公共部门、航天服务、建筑业、渔业和少量采金业为主。
gdpDescription.en: French Guiana had a small overall economy, but output per capita was markedly higher than in neighboring states because of French fiscal support and the Kourou space center. The economy was centered on the public sector, space-related services, construction, fisheries, and limited gold mining.

mainIndustries.zh: 航天发射服务、公共部门、建筑业、渔业、林业、金矿开采
mainIndustries.en: Space launch services, public sector, construction, fisheries, forestry, and gold mining

tradeGoods.zh: 渔产品、木材、黄金、进口消费品、机械设备、燃料
tradeGoods.en: Fish products, timber, gold, imported consumer goods, machinery, and fuel

householdWealth.zh: 家庭财富分布高度不均，城市公务员和技术人员收入较高，内陆社区和移民群体资产有限。住房与消费水平整体高于区域邻国，但对公共补贴依赖明显。
householdWealth.en: Household wealth was unevenly distributed, with urban civil servants and technical professionals earning relatively high incomes, while interior communities and migrant groups held limited assets. Housing and consumption levels were generally above those of neighboring countries, but dependence on public subsidy was strong.

economicSystem.zh: 以法国公共财政支持为基础的混合经济
economicSystem.en: A mixed economy underpinned by French public financing

source.en: Transfers from the French central government

treasuryDescription.zh: 地方财政现金储备有限，但背后有法国国家信用和预算体系支撑。真正的财政安全取决于巴黎而非卡宴本地积累。
treasuryDescription.en: Local cash reserves were limited, but they were backed by French state credit and the national budget system. Real fiscal security depended more on Paris than on local accumulation in Cayenne.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政政策偏向高补贴、高公共支出与社会稳定优先，目标是弥补地理偏远和经济基础薄弱。预算平衡并非首要，而是通过中央拨款维持公共服务标准。
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal policy favored high subsidy, high public spending, and social stability, aiming to offset remoteness and a narrow economic base. Budget balance was not the primary goal; instead, public service standards were maintained through central transfers.

name.zh: 法国陆军驻圭亚那部队

description.zh: 承担领土防卫、边境巡逻、雨林行动和支援航天中心安全。
description.en: Handled territorial defense, border patrols, jungle operations, and support for security around the space center.

description.zh: 负责治安、反非法采金、交通控制和乡村警备。
description.en: Responsible for policing, anti-illegal mining operations, traffic control, and rural security.

description.zh: 提供沿海巡逻、运输、侦察和医疗后送能力。
description.en: Provided coastal patrol, transport, reconnaissance, and medical evacuation capabilities.

technology.zh: 装备水平明显高于周边地区，具备现代轻武器、直升机、巡逻艇、通信系统和部分卫星支援能力，但总体规模较小。
technology.en: Equipment levels were clearly above those of surrounding areas, with modern small arms, helicopters, patrol craft, communications systems, and some satellite support, though overall force size remained modest.

threats.zh: 主要威胁来自非法采金、跨境走私、偷渡、内陆治安困难以及航天设施安全需求，而非传统国家间战争。
threats.en: The main threats came from illegal gold mining, cross-border smuggling, irregular migration, difficult interior security conditions, and the need to protect space facilities, rather than conventional interstate war.

populationDescription.zh: 人口年轻且增长较快，移民比例高，族群和语言构成十分多样。沿海地带尤其是卡宴岛周边集中了大部分居民和公共服务。
populationDescription.en: The population was youthful and growing rapidly, with a high share of immigrants and very diverse ethnic and linguistic composition. Most residents and public services were concentrated along the coast, especially around the Cayenne area.

socialClasses.zh: 公务员与技术专业人员、中小商人、工薪劳动者、移民非正规就业者、原住民与内陆社区居民
socialClasses.en: Civil servants and technical professionals, small and medium traders, wage laborers, migrant informal workers, and Indigenous and interior community residents

allies.zh: 法国、欧盟机构，并与巴西和苏里南保持务实边境合作
allies.en: France, European institutions, and pragmatic border cooperation with Brazil and Suriname

enemies.zh: 无正式国家敌对对象，但长期受跨境非法采金与走私网络困扰
enemies.en: No formal state enemies, but persistent problems with cross-border illegal mining and smuggling networks

foreignPolicy.zh: 其对外政策实际上服从法国外交方针，重点在边境管控、区域合作和维持航天基地的国际功能。作为欧盟在南美洲的前哨，其战略意义大于其人口与经济规模。
foreignPolicy.en: Its foreign policy effectively followed that of France, emphasizing border control, regional cooperation, and maintaining the international role of the space center. As a European foothold in South America, its strategic significance exceeded its size in population and economy.

keyInnovations.zh: 阿丽亚娜航天发射设施、现代热带医疗体系、卫星通信、雨林监测与航空补给网络
keyInnovations.en: Ariane launch facilities, modern tropical medical systems, satellite communications, rainforest monitoring, and air supply networks

strengths.zh: 拥有法国国家支持、较高人均收入、现代公共服务和重要航天基础设施。战略位置突出，行政与治安能力强于多数邻近地区。
strengths.en: It benefited from French state support, relatively high income per capita, modern public services, and major space infrastructure. Its strategic location was important, and its administrative and security capacity exceeded that of most nearby territories.

weaknesses.zh: 经济结构单一，私营部门薄弱，对外部财政输血依赖很高。内陆治理困难、非法采金和社会不平等长期存在。
weaknesses.en: Its economy was narrow, the private sector weak, and dependence on external fiscal support very high. Interior governance difficulties, illegal mining, and persistent social inequality remained major issues.

outlook.zh: 短期内总体稳定，且将继续受益于法国和欧洲航天活动。长期发展取决于能否扩大本地产业基础并缓解快速人口增长带来的公共压力。
outlook.en: In the short term it was broadly stable and likely to continue benefiting from French and European space activity. Long-term development depended on broadening the local productive base and easing public pressures created by rapid population growth.

description.zh: 法属圭亚那是法国在南美洲的海外省，以航天基地和高度依赖法国财政支持的现代行政体系为特征。
description.en: French Guiana was France’s South American overseas department, marked by its space center and a modern administrative system heavily supported by French public finance.

governmentForm.zh: 总统制，藤森威权统治。
governmentForm.en: Presidential; Fujimori's authoritarian rule.

socialStructure.zh: Peru社会。
socialStructure.en: Peru society.

rulingClass.zh: 政治精英。
rulingClass.en: Political elites.

succession.zh: 选举或继承。
succession.en: Election or succession.

structure.zh: 政府结构。
structure.en: Government structure.

function.zh: 财政。
function.en: Finance.

function.zh: 安全。
function.en: Security.

taxationSystem.zh: 税收体系。
taxationSystem.en: Tax system.

culturalAchievements.zh: Peru的文化遗产。
culturalAchievements.en: Cultural heritage of Peru.

languageFamily.zh: 多语言

philosophy.zh: 社会价值观。
philosophy.en: Social values.

gdpDescription.zh: 经济概况。
gdpDescription.en: Economy overview.

mainIndustries.zh: 采矿、渔业、农业

householdWealth.zh: 家庭财富。
householdWealth.en: Household wealth.

economicSystem.zh: 经济体制。
economicSystem.en: Economic system.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政政策。
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal policy.

description.zh: 军事力量。
description.en: Military forces.

technology.zh: 军事装备。

description.zh: 2000年的秘鲁面临藤森政权危机。
description.en: Peru in 2000: Fujimori regime crisis.

dynasty.zh: 哥伦比亚共和国（国家阵线后时期）

governmentForm.zh: 哥伦比亚在2000年前后是总统制共和国，依据1991年宪法实行多党民主与权力分立。
governmentForm.en: Around 2000, Colombia was a presidential republic operating under the 1991 Constitution with multiparty democracy and separation of powers.

socialStructure.zh: 社会以城市中产阶级、农村小农、非正规劳动者与地方寡头并存为特征。贫富差距显著，沿海、安第斯山区与边疆地区发展不均。长期内战、毒品经济与国内流离失所人口深刻影响社会结构。
socialStructure.en: Society was characterized by a coexistence of urban middle classes, rural smallholders, informal workers, and regional elites. Inequality was pronounced, with uneven development between the coasts, Andean highlands, and frontier regions. Long civil conflict, the drug economy, and large numbers of internally displaced people deeply shaped the social structure.

rulingClass.zh: 执政阶层主要由传统政党精英、工商界领袖、高级官僚与军警高层构成。地方层面上，省市政治家族与大地主仍具有明显影响力。
rulingClass.en: The ruling class consisted mainly of traditional party elites, business leaders, senior bureaucrats, and top military and police officers. At the local level, political families and large landholders still exercised substantial influence.

succession.zh: 总统由全国直选产生，任期固定，依宪法和平交接。国家权力继承依靠选举、政党竞争与宪法程序，而非世袭。
succession.en: The president was chosen by nationwide popular election for a fixed term and transferred power according to constitutional rules. Succession depended on elections, party competition, and constitutional procedure rather than heredity.

structure.zh: 中央政府由总统、内阁、两院制国会与独立司法体系构成。1991年宪法强化了宪法法院、监察机构与地方分权，但在冲突地区国家控制力有限。行政体系在安全、反毒与财政领域尤为集中。
structure.en: The central government consisted of the president, cabinet, a bicameral congress, and an independent judiciary. The 1991 Constitution strengthened the Constitutional Court, oversight bodies, and decentralization, though state control remained limited in conflict zones. Administrative capacity was especially concentrated in security, counternarcotics, and fiscal affairs.

name.en: Ministry of the Interior and Justice

function.zh: 负责国内治理、地方关系、公共秩序协调与法律行政事务。
function.en: Handled internal governance, relations with local authorities, coordination of public order, and legal-administrative affairs.

name.en: Ministry of Finance and Public Credit

function.zh: 负责预算、税收政策、国债管理与宏观财政稳定。
function.en: Managed the budget, tax policy, public debt, and overall fiscal stability.

function.zh: 统筹军队、国家警察、安全行动与反叛乱政策。
function.en: Directed the armed forces, national police, security operations, and counterinsurgency policy.

function.zh: 负责外交关系、条约、国际组织事务与对美及地区合作。
function.en: Oversaw diplomatic relations, treaties, international organizations, and cooperation with the United States and regional partners.

localAdmin.zh: 全国划分为省、直辖区与市镇，地方首长多经选举产生。法律上地方自治扩大，但财政能力与治安能力高度不平衡，偏远地区常受武装组织影响。
localAdmin.en: The country was divided into departments, districts, and municipalities, with many local leaders elected. Local autonomy expanded in law, but fiscal and security capacity remained highly uneven, and remote areas were often influenced by armed groups.

legalSystem.zh: 法律体系以大陆法系为基础，并受1991年宪法的人权与司法审查原则深刻影响。正式法院体系完备，但在冲突地带司法执行薄弱。
legalSystem.en: The legal system was based on the civil law tradition and strongly shaped by the rights-oriented and judicial review principles of the 1991 Constitution. The formal court system was extensive, but enforcement was weak in conflict areas.

taxationSystem.zh: 税制以增值税、企业税、所得税与关税为主。中央政府依赖间接税与石油等资源收入，同时面临逃税、非正规经济与地方征收能力不足的问题。
taxationSystem.en: The tax system relied on VAT, corporate taxation, income taxes, and customs duties. The central government depended on indirect taxes and resource revenues such as oil, while facing tax evasion, a large informal economy, and weak local collection capacity.

culturalAchievements.zh: 哥伦比亚在文学、新闻、音乐与视觉艺术方面影响广泛，以加西亚·马尔克斯、瓦伦纳托与加勒比音乐传统尤为著名。到2000年前后，电视传媒、流行音乐与足球文化已形成强烈的全国认同。
culturalAchievements.en: Colombia had broad influence in literature, journalism, music, and visual arts, with Gabriel García Márquez, vallenato, and Caribbean musical traditions especially renowned. By around 2000, television media, popular music, and football culture had become strong elements of national identity.

languageFamily.zh: 印欧语系－罗曼语族（西班牙语）

philosophy.zh: 以天主教社会思想、拉丁美洲共和主义、自由主义与保守主义传统并存。
philosophy.en: A blend of Catholic social thought, Latin American republicanism, and both liberal and conservative traditions.

writingSystem.zh: 拉丁字母书写的西班牙语为主。
writingSystem.en: Primarily Spanish written in the Latin alphabet.

gdpDescription.zh: 哥伦比亚经济在安第斯国家中规模较大，基础较多元，涵盖能源、农业、制造业与服务业。尽管宏观经济相对稳定，内战与毒品相关暴力抑制了投资与基础设施发展。
gdpDescription.en: Colombia had one of the larger economies in the Andean region, with a relatively diversified base including energy, agriculture, manufacturing, and services. Although macroeconomic stability was comparatively solid, civil conflict and drug-related violence constrained investment and infrastructure development.

mainIndustries.zh: 石油、咖啡、煤炭、纺织、食品加工、化工、金融服务
mainIndustries.en: Oil, coffee, coal, textiles, food processing, chemicals, financial services

tradeGoods.zh: 原油、咖啡、煤炭、鲜花、香蕉、纺织品
tradeGoods.en: Crude oil, coffee, coal, flowers, bananas, textiles

householdWealth.zh: 家庭财富分布极不均衡，城市中产拥有住房和耐用品，但农村家庭与非正规部门收入脆弱。暴力冲突导致部分地区资产流失和人口迁移。
householdWealth.en: Household wealth was highly unequal, with urban middle-class families owning housing and consumer durables while rural households and informal workers remained financially fragile. Violent conflict caused asset loss and displacement in parts of the country.

economicSystem.zh: 以市场经济为主，国家在能源、安全与基础设施领域保持重要作用。
economicSystem.en: Primarily a market economy, with the state retaining an important role in energy, security, and infrastructure.

source.en: State resource income and other revenue

category.zh: 基础设施与地方转移支付

unit.zh: 十亿美元流动财政储备估计
unit.en: billion USD in estimated liquid fiscal reserves

treasuryDescription.zh: 国库状况受财政赤字、债务融资需求与安全支出压力制约。政府仍可通过国内外融资与多边机构支持维持偿付能力。
treasuryDescription.en: The treasury position was constrained by fiscal deficits, debt financing needs, and pressure from security spending. The government nevertheless maintained solvency through domestic and external borrowing and support from multilateral institutions.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政政策以维持宏观稳定、控制赤字并为安全行动筹资为核心，同时推进税制改革与国际金融合作。
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal policy focused on preserving macroeconomic stability, containing deficits, and funding security operations, while pursuing tax reform and cooperation with international financial institutions.

description.zh: 负责主要反叛乱作战、边境控制与国内安全支援。
description.en: Responsible for main counterinsurgency operations, border control, and support to internal security.

description.zh: 负责加勒比海与太平洋沿岸巡逻、河运通道与缉毒任务。
description.en: Handled patrols on the Caribbean and Pacific coasts, riverine routes, and counternarcotics missions.

description.zh: 提供机动作战、侦察、运输与对游击队目标的空中支援。
description.en: Provided mobility, reconnaissance, transport, and air support against guerrilla targets.

commanderInChief.zh: 总统安德烈斯·帕斯特拉纳

technology.zh: 装备水平属中等，拥有美制直升机、轻型攻击机、通信与侦察系统，但整体现代化受预算与地形限制。
technology.en: Technology was moderate, including U.S.-supplied helicopters, light attack aircraft, and communications and reconnaissance systems, though broader modernization was constrained by budget and terrain.

threats.zh: 主要威胁来自哥伦比亚革命武装力量、民族解放军、右翼准军事组织、毒品武装网络以及边境渗透问题。
threats.en: Main threats came from the FARC, ELN, right-wing paramilitary groups, narcotics-linked armed networks, and border infiltration issues.

populationDescription.zh: 人口约四千万，以混血、欧洲裔、非洲裔和原住民群体构成的多元社会为特征。人口高度向城市集中，但农村边缘地区仍因贫困与暴力而不稳定。
populationDescription.en: With about forty million people, the country was a diverse society composed of mestizo, European-descended, Afro-Colombian, and Indigenous populations. The population was highly urbanizing, though rural frontier areas remained unstable due to poverty and violence.

socialClasses.zh: 上层企业与地主精英、城市中产、公私部门劳动者、农村贫民与大规模非正规就业人口并存。
socialClasses.en: Upper business and landed elites, urban middle classes, public and private sector workers, rural poor, and a large informal labor population coexisted.

allies.zh: 美国、安第斯共同体成员国及若干拉美邻国是主要合作对象。
allies.en: The United States, members of the Andean Community, and several Latin American neighbors were key partners.

enemies.zh: 无正式国家敌国，但与境内武装组织及跨国毒品网络处于敌对状态。
enemies.en: It had no formal state enemy, but was in hostile confrontation with domestic armed groups and transnational narcotics networks.

foreignPolicy.zh: 外交重点在争取美国援助、推动“哥伦比亚计划”、控制毒品贸易并维持与邻国的安全协调。
foreignPolicy.en: Foreign policy prioritized securing U.S. assistance, advancing Plan Colombia, curbing narcotics trafficking, and maintaining security coordination with neighboring states.

keyInnovations.zh: 重点技术包括石油开采、农业出口链、移动通信、城市金融系统与反叛乱空中机动作战能力。
keyInnovations.en: Key capabilities included oil extraction, agricultural export chains, mobile telecommunications, urban financial systems, and air-mobile counterinsurgency operations.

strengths.zh: 经济结构相对多元，国家制度仍具韧性，主要城市与出口产业具有活力，并获得美国支持。
strengths.en: The economy was relatively diversified, state institutions remained resilient, major cities and export sectors were dynamic, and the country enjoyed U.S. support.

weaknesses.zh: 内部武装冲突、毒品经济、地区治理薄弱与高度不平等严重削弱国家能力。
weaknesses.en: Internal armed conflict, the drug economy, weak regional governance, and deep inequality seriously undermined state capacity.

outlook.zh: 若安全局势改善并持续推进国家整合，哥伦比亚具备恢复增长与加强治理的潜力，但短期仍处高风险冲突状态。
outlook.en: If security improved and state integration continued, Colombia had strong potential for renewed growth and stronger governance, but in the short term it remained in a high-risk conflict situation.

description.zh: 2000年前后的哥伦比亚是一个制度仍在运转、但深受内战与毒品暴力困扰的拉美总统制共和国。
description.en: Around 2000, Colombia was a Latin American presidential republic whose institutions still functioned but were heavily strained by civil war and drug violence.

governmentForm.zh: 总统制共和国，经济危机后实行美元化。
governmentForm.en: Presidential republic; dollarized after economic crisis.

socialStructure.zh: 梅斯蒂索人为主，原住民和非裔为少数。
socialStructure.en: Predominantly mestizo; indigenous and Afro-Ecuadorian minorities.

rulingClass.zh: 政治精英和商业集团。
rulingClass.en: Political elites and business groups.

succession.zh: 总统直选。
succession.en: President directly elected.

structure.zh: 总统制，一院制国民议会。
structure.en: Presidential system with unicameral National Congress.

function.zh: 财政。
function.en: Finance.

function.zh: 国防。
function.en: Defense.

taxationSystem.zh: 以增值税和石油收入为主。
taxationSystem.en: VAT and oil revenue based.

culturalAchievements.zh: 加拉帕戈斯群岛、安第斯音乐、多元文化遗产。
culturalAchievements.en: Galápagos Islands; Andean music; multicultural heritage.

languageFamily.zh: 印欧语系（西班牙语）、克丘亚语

philosophy.zh: 天主教与原住民传统。
philosophy.en: Catholicism and indigenous traditions.

gdpDescription.zh: 1999年金融危机后美元化，石油出口国。
gdpDescription.en: Dollarized after 1999 crisis; oil exporter.

mainIndustries.zh: 石油、香蕉、虾、可可、花卉

householdWealth.zh: 金融危机重创家庭财富。
householdWealth.en: Financial crisis devastated household wealth.

economicSystem.zh: 美元化后的市场经济。
economicSystem.en: Market economy after dollarization.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 美元化后的紧缩财政。
fiscalPolicy.en: Austerity after dollarization.

description.zh: 安第斯陆军。
description.en: Andean army.

description.zh: 太平洋防御。
description.en: Pacific defense.

description.zh: 小型空军。
description.en: Small air force.

technology.zh: 以色列和美国装备。

socialClasses.zh: 贫富差距悬殊。
socialClasses.en: Wide wealth gap.

keyInnovations.zh: 石油开采和农业出口。
keyInnovations.en: Oil extraction and agricultural exports.

infrastructure.zh: 基础设施中等。
infrastructure.en: Moderate infrastructure.

allies.zh: 美国、拉美邻国

enemies.zh: 与秘鲁边界争端已解决

foreignPolicy.zh: 美元化巩固与美国经济联系。
foreignPolicy.en: Dollarization solidified economic ties with USA.

strengths.zh: 石油资源、农业出口多样性、加拉帕戈斯旅游。
strengths.en: Oil, diverse agricultural exports, Galápagos tourism.

weaknesses.zh: 金融危机后遗症、不平等、政治不稳定。
weaknesses.en: Financial crisis aftermath, inequality, political instability.

outlook.zh: 美元化提供稳定性，但结构问题待解。
outlook.en: Dollarization provided stability; structural issues remained.

description.zh: 2000年的厄瓜多尔正从严重金融危机中恢复，实行美元化。
description.en: Ecuador in 2000: recovering from severe financial crisis with dollarization.

governmentForm.zh: 总统制共和国。
governmentForm.en: Presidential republic.

socialStructure.zh: 多民族社会，原住民占多数（克丘亚族、艾马拉族等）。
socialStructure.en: Multi-ethnic; indigenous majority (Quechua, Aymara, etc.).

rulingClass.zh: 传统政治精英、军方与新兴原住民政治力量。
rulingClass.en: Traditional political elites, military, and emerging indigenous political forces.

succession.zh: 总统直选，任期五年。
succession.en: President directly elected for five-year term.

structure.zh: 总统制，两院制议会。
structure.en: Presidential system with bicameral congress.

function.zh: 内部安全。
function.en: Internal security.

function.zh: 财政管理。
function.en: Fiscal management.

taxationSystem.zh: 以增值税、关税和矿业税为主。
taxationSystem.en: Based on VAT, customs, and mining taxes.

culturalAchievements.zh: 蒂瓦纳库遗址、安第斯音乐传统、多元文化遗产。
culturalAchievements.en: Tiwanaku ruins, Andean music tradition, multicultural heritage.

languageFamily.zh: 印欧语系（西班牙语）、克丘亚语、艾马拉语

philosophy.zh: 天主教与安第斯原住民信仰融合。
philosophy.en: Catholicism blended with Andean indigenous beliefs.

gdpDescription.zh: 拉美较贫穷国家，矿业和天然气为支柱。
gdpDescription.en: One of Latin America's poorer countries; mining and natural gas as pillars.

mainIndustries.zh: 采矿、天然气、农业、纺织

tradeGoods.en: Natural gas, tin, zinc, soybeans, timber

householdWealth.zh: 贫富差距悬殊，原住民贫困率高。
householdWealth.en: Extreme inequality; high indigenous poverty.

economicSystem.zh: 混合经济，国有矿业与私营部门并存。
economicSystem.en: Mixed economy; state mining coexisted with private sector.

treasuryDescription.zh: 外汇储备有限，依赖国际贷款。
treasuryDescription.en: Limited reserves; dependent on international loans.

fiscalPolicy.zh: IMF方案框架下的紧缩财政。
fiscalPolicy.en: Austerity within IMF program framework.

description.zh: 安第斯高原部署的陆军。
description.en: Army deployed in Andean highlands.

description.zh: 小型空军和象征性海军。
description.en: Small air force and symbolic navy.

technology.zh: 基本装备，以反毒和内部安全为主。
technology.en: Basic equipment; focused on counter-narcotics and internal security.

socialClasses.zh: 白人-梅斯蒂索精英为上层，原住民农民为底层。
socialClasses.en: White-Mestizo elites at top; indigenous farmers at bottom.

ethnicGroups.zh: 克丘亚族、艾马拉族、梅斯蒂索人等。

keyInnovations.zh: 天然气开采技术引进。
keyInnovations.en: Natural gas extraction technology introduction.

infrastructure.zh: 交通不便，安第斯地形限制基建。
infrastructure.en: Poor transport; Andean terrain limited infrastructure.

allies.zh: 美国（反毒合作）、拉美邻国

enemies.zh: 与智利因出海口问题关系紧张
enemies.en: Tense relations with Chile over sea access

foreignPolicy.zh: 反毒合作为外交重点，寻求出海口。
foreignPolicy.en: Counter-narcotics cooperation as diplomatic focus; sought sea access.

strengths.zh: 丰富矿产和天然气资源。
strengths.en: Rich mineral and natural gas resources.

weaknesses.zh: 贫困、不平等、政治不稳定、古柯问题。
weaknesses.en: Poverty, inequality, political instability, coca issue.

outlook.zh: 社会矛盾尖锐，原住民运动兴起。
outlook.en: Sharp social contradictions; indigenous movement rising.

description.zh: 2000年的玻利维亚面临深刻社会不平等和原住民权利运动兴起。
description.en: Bolivia in 2000 faced deep social inequality and rising indigenous rights movements.

dynasty.zh: 委内瑞拉玻利瓦尔共和国

governmentForm.zh: 总统制（玻利瓦尔革命）。
governmentForm.en: Presidential (Bolivarian Revolution).

socialStructure.zh: Venezuela社会。
socialStructure.en: Venezuela society.

rulingClass.zh: 政治精英。
rulingClass.en: Political elites.

succession.zh: 选举或继承。
succession.en: Election or succession.

structure.zh: 政府结构。
structure.en: Government structure.

function.zh: 财政。
function.en: Finance.

function.zh: 安全。
function.en: Security.

taxationSystem.zh: 税收体系。
taxationSystem.en: Tax system.

culturalAchievements.zh: Venezuela的文化遗产。
culturalAchievements.en: Cultural heritage of Venezuela.

languageFamily.zh: 多语言

philosophy.zh: 社会价值观。
philosophy.en: Social values.

gdpDescription.zh: 经济概况。
gdpDescription.en: Economy overview.

mainIndustries.zh: 石油、铝、钢铁

householdWealth.zh: 家庭财富。
householdWealth.en: Household wealth.

economicSystem.zh: 经济体制。
economicSystem.en: Economic system.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政政策。
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal policy.

description.zh: 军事力量。
description.en: Military forces.

technology.zh: 军事装备。

description.zh: 2000年的委内瑞拉走向玻利瓦尔革命。
description.en: Venezuela in 2000: Bolivarian Revolution.

dynasty.zh: 阿根廷共和国（民主宪政时期）

governmentForm.zh: 阿根廷在2000年前后是联邦总统制共和国，由民选总统、国会和独立司法体系构成。
governmentForm.en: Around 2000, Argentina was a federal presidential republic composed of an elected president, congress, and an independent judiciary.

socialStructure.zh: 阿根廷社会具有较高城市化与较强中产传统，但在1990年代末经济停滞后，失业、贫困与社会抗议上升。首都区与潘帕斯核心地带较富裕，北部与部分工业带承受更大压力。
socialStructure.en: Argentine society was highly urbanized and had a strong middle-class tradition, but unemployment, poverty, and social protest rose after economic stagnation in the late 1990s. The Buenos Aires region and Pampas core were wealthier, while the north and parts of the industrial belt faced greater strain.

rulingClass.zh: 执政阶层主要由政党联盟领袖、省长集团、金融与农业出口精英、高级法官和官僚组成。工会在国家政治与社会谈判中仍具有重要影响。
rulingClass.en: The ruling class consisted mainly of party coalition leaders, provincial governors, financial and agro-export elites, senior judges, and bureaucrats. Labor unions still held significant influence in national politics and social bargaining.

succession.zh: 总统通过全国直选产生，联邦与省级权力交替依宪法和选举规则进行。制度上强调民选合法性，但经济危机可能削弱执政稳定性。
succession.en: The president was chosen by national popular election, and federal and provincial power changed hands through constitutional and electoral rules. The system emphasized democratic legitimacy, though economic crisis could undermine political stability.

structure.zh: 联邦政府由总统领导行政部门，两院制国会负责立法，最高法院与联邦司法机构承担宪法与法律裁判。各省拥有相当自治权，财政分成和省级政治在全国治理中至关重要。2000年前后中央政府受债务、紧缩政策与社会不满掣肘。
structure.en: The federal government was led by the president in the executive branch, with a bicameral congress handling legislation and the Supreme Court and federal judiciary exercising constitutional and legal review. The provinces enjoyed substantial autonomy, and revenue-sharing and provincial politics were crucial to national governance. Around 2000, the central government was constrained by debt, austerity, and social discontent.

function.zh: 负责货币联系政策协调、预算、债务谈判和经济改革。
function.en: Managed coordination of the currency peg framework, budget policy, debt negotiations, and economic reform.

function.zh: 负责联邦—省关系、选举事务、国内行政协调与政治协商。
function.en: Handled federal-provincial relations, electoral affairs, domestic administrative coordination, and political negotiation.

function.zh: 负责武装力量文官监督、国防规划与后勤管理。
function.en: Oversaw civilian control of the armed forces, defense planning, and logistics management.

name.zh: 外交、国际贸易与宗教事务部
name.en: Ministry of Foreign Affairs, International Trade and Worship

function.zh: 负责外交、南方共同市场事务、对外贸易谈判与教会关系。
function.en: Managed diplomacy, Mercosur affairs, foreign trade negotiations, and relations with religious institutions.

localAdmin.zh: 阿根廷由23个省和布宜诺斯艾利斯自治市组成，各省拥有自己的宪法、议会和行政机构。地方政府影响财政平衡与政治联盟，中央常需通过财政转移维持支持。
localAdmin.en: Argentina consisted of 23 provinces and the Autonomous City of Buenos Aires, with each province possessing its own constitution, legislature, and executive institutions. Local governments strongly influenced fiscal balance and political coalitions, and the center often relied on fiscal transfers to maintain support.

legalSystem.zh: 法律体系属于大陆法系，强调成文宪法、联邦结构与司法审查。民主化后军政时期的人权案件继续影响司法与公共记忆。
legalSystem.en: The legal system belonged to the civil law tradition, emphasizing a written constitution, federalism, and judicial review. After democratization, human rights cases from the military era continued to shape the judiciary and public memory.

taxationSystem.zh: 税收包括增值税、所得税、关税和工资税，并通过联邦共分税制度在中央与省之间分配。受经济低迷和避税问题影响，财政基础在2000年前后趋于脆弱。
taxationSystem.en: Taxation included VAT, income taxes, customs duties, and payroll taxes, distributed between the center and provinces through federal revenue-sharing. Fiscal capacity became increasingly fragile around 2000 due to recession and tax evasion.

culturalAchievements.zh: 阿根廷在文学、电影、探戈、戏剧与足球文化上具有世界影响力。到2000年前后，布宜诺斯艾利斯仍是西语世界重要的出版、教育与艺术中心之一。
culturalAchievements.en: Argentina had global influence in literature, film, tango, theater, and football culture. By around 2000, Buenos Aires remained one of the major publishing, educational, and artistic centers of the Spanish-speaking world.

languageFamily.zh: 印欧语系－罗曼语族（西班牙语）

philosophy.zh: 以天主教传统、世俗共和主义、自由宪政思想与庇隆主义社会观念交织为特征。
philosophy.en: Characterized by an interplay of Catholic tradition, secular republicanism, liberal constitutionalism, and Peronist social ideas.

writingSystem.zh: 使用拉丁字母书写西班牙语。
writingSystem.en: Spanish written in the Latin alphabet.

gdpDescription.zh: 阿根廷经济在拉美属中上水平，农业出口、食品加工、汽车制造、能源和服务业基础较强。2000年前后受固定汇率、债务压力与衰退影响，经济显露明显脆弱性并走向危机。
gdpDescription.en: Argentina’s economy ranked in the upper middle tier of Latin America, with strong foundations in agricultural exports, food processing, automobile production, energy, and services.
