title.zh: ChatGPT两月破亿用户创历史纪录
title.en: ChatGPT Reaches 100 Million Users in Record Time

description.zh: 2023年1月，OpenAI的ChatGPT上线仅两个月即突破1亿月活用户，成为史上增长最快的消费级应用。这一里程碑标志着大语言模型正式进入大众视野，全球科技界、教育界和各行各业开始重新审视AI的变革潜力。
description.en: In January 2023, OpenAI's ChatGPT surpassed 100 million monthly active users just two months after launch, becoming the fastest-growing consumer application in history. This milestone brought large language models into mainstream awareness, prompting tech, education, and industries worldwide to reassess AI's transformative potential.

title.zh: 微软宣布向OpenAI追加百亿美元投资
title.en: Microsoft Announces Multi-Billion Dollar OpenAI Investment

description.zh: 2023年1月23日，微软宣布向OpenAI追加投资约100亿美元，将GPT模型深度整合到Azure云平台、必应搜索引擎和Office办公套件中，掀起科技巨头AI军备竞赛。
description.en: On January 23, 2023, Microsoft announced a ~$10 billion additional investment in OpenAI, deeply integrating GPT models into Azure cloud, Bing search engine, and Office suite, igniting the AI arms race among tech giants.

title.en: Google Urgently Launches Bard to Counter ChatGPT

description.zh: 2023年2月6日，Google宣布推出AI聊天机器人Bard（基于LaMDA模型），以应对ChatGPT带来的竞争压力。发布会上Bard回答出现事实错误，导致Google母公司Alphabet股价单日暴跌超1000亿美元市值。
description.en: On February 6, 2023, Google announced Bard AI chatbot (based on LaMDA) to counter ChatGPT's competitive threat. A factual error during the demo caused Alphabet's stock to plunge over $100 billion in market cap in a single day.

description.zh: 2023年2月，俄乌战争进入第二年。乌克兰获得西方大规模军事援助，2023年夏发动反攻但进展有限。战争持续消耗俄罗斯经济与军事资源，同时加速欧洲国防重建。
description.en: In February 2023, the Russia-Ukraine war entered its second year. Ukraine received massive Western military aid and launched a summer counter-offensive with limited progress. The war continues to drain Russian economic and military resources while accelerating European defense rebuilding.

title.zh: GPT-4发布引发全球AI竞赛加速
title.en: GPT-4 Release Accelerates Global AI Race

description.zh: 2023年3月14日，OpenAI发布GPT-4，在推理、创造性和专业知识方面大幅超越前代模型，通过律师资格考试等专业测试，引发全球AI军备竞赛全面升级。
description.en: On March 14, 2023, OpenAI released GPT-4, dramatically surpassing previous models in reasoning, creativity, and professional knowledge, passing professional tests like the bar exam, triggering a full-scale escalation of the global AI arms race.

title.zh: 百度发布文心一言对标ChatGPT
title.en: Baidu Launches ERNIE Bot as China's ChatGPT Response

description.zh: 2023年3月16日，百度正式发布大语言模型产品"文心一言"，成为中国首个对标ChatGPT的主要产品，拉开中国"百模大战"序幕，各大科技公司纷纷跟进发布自研大模型。
description.en: On March 16, 2023, Baidu officially launched its LLM product 'ERNIE Bot' as China's first major ChatGPT competitor, kickstarting China's 'Hundred Model War' as major tech companies rushed to release their own foundation models.

title.en: Geoffrey Hinton Leaves Google, Warns of AI Risks

description.zh: 2023年5月1日，"AI教父"Geoffrey Hinton从Google辞职，公开警告AI可能对人类构成生存性威胁，引发全球关于AI安全的广泛讨论。
description.en: On May 1, 2023, 'AI Godfather' Geoffrey Hinton resigned from Google and publicly warned that AI could pose existential threats to humanity, sparking worldwide discussion on AI safety.

title.zh: G7广岛峰会启动"广岛AI进程"
title.en: G7 Hiroshima Summit Launches 'Hiroshima AI Process'

description.zh: 2023年5月19-21日，G7广岛峰会上各国领导人启动"广岛AI进程"，旨在建立生成式AI的国际治理框架与行业指导原则。
description.en: At the G7 Hiroshima Summit on May 19-21, 2023, leaders launched the 'Hiroshima AI Process' to establish an international governance framework and industry guidelines for generative AI.

title.zh: TSMC宣布日本与美国建厂计划推进
title.en: TSMC Advances Japan and US Fab Plans

description.zh: 2023年，台积电在日本熊本的第一座工厂加速建设，同时推进美国亚利桑那州工厂计划，半导体供应链多元化成为地缘政治优先事项。
description.en: In 2023, TSMC accelerated construction of its first fab in Kumamoto, Japan, while advancing its Arizona fab plans, with semiconductor supply chain diversification becoming a geopolitical priority.

description.zh: 2023年7月18日，Meta发布Llama 2开源大语言模型系列，免费用于研究与商业用途，极大推动了开源AI生态发展，打破闭源模型垄断。
description.en: On July 18, 2023, Meta released the Llama 2 open-source LLM family, free for research and commercial use, greatly advancing the open-source AI ecosystem and breaking the closed-model monopoly.

title.zh: 中国多家大模型获批上线
title.en: Multiple Chinese LLMs Approved for Public Launch

description.zh: 2023年8月底，百度文心一言、商汤日日新等多家中国大模型通过国家网信办备案审批，正式向公众开放，标志中国大模型产业进入商用阶段。
description.en: In late August 2023, Baidu's ERNIE Bot, SenseTime's SenseNova, and other Chinese LLMs passed CAC registration approval and officially opened to the public, marking China's LLM industry entering the commercial phase.

title.zh: 华为发布Mate 60 Pro搭载自研芯片
title.en: Huawei Launches Mate 60 Pro with Domestic Chip

description.zh: 2023年8月29日，华为发布Mate 60 Pro手机，搭载麒麟9000S芯片（采用中芯国际7nm工艺），证明中国在美国制裁下仍能制造先进芯片，引发全球关注。
description.en: On August 29, 2023, Huawei launched the Mate 60 Pro phone with the Kirin 9000S chip (SMIC 7nm process), proving China can still produce advanced chips under US sanctions, drawing global attention.

description.zh: 2023年8月，金砖国家约翰内斯堡峰会宣布邀请沙特阿拉伯、阿联酋、伊朗、埃及、埃塞俄比亚与阿根廷加入，标志"全球南方"联合力量的壮大。
description.en: In August 2023, the BRICS Johannesburg Summit announced invitations for Saudi Arabia, UAE, Iran, Egypt, Ethiopia, and Argentina to join, marking the growing collective strength of the 'Global South.'

title.zh: 印度成功着陆月球南极
title.en: India Lands on Moon's South Pole

description.zh: 2023年8月23日，印度月船三号成功在月球南极附近软着陆，成为第四个实现月球软着陆的国家，也是首个到达月球南极的国家，提振国家科技信心。
description.en: On August 23, 2023, India's Chandrayaan-3 successfully soft-landed near the Moon's south pole, making India the fourth country to achieve a lunar soft landing and the first to reach the south pole, boosting national tech confidence.

title.en: Mistral AI Releases Mistral 7B Open-Source Model

description.zh: 2023年9月，法国初创公司Mistral AI发布70亿参数的开源模型Mistral 7B，性能超越同级别所有模型，被视为欧洲AI自主的里程碑。
description.en: In September 2023, French startup Mistral AI released the 7-billion parameter open-source Mistral 7B model, outperforming all models in its class, seen as a milestone for European AI sovereignty.

title.zh: 以色列-哈马斯战争爆发

description.zh: 2023年10月7日，哈马斯对以色列南部发动突然袭击，造成约1200人死亡。以色列随后对加沙发动大规模军事行动，引发严重人道主义危机，中东局势急剧升级。
description.en: On October 7, 2023, Hamas launched a surprise attack on southern Israel, killing approximately 1,200 people. Israel responded with a massive military operation in Gaza, triggering a severe humanitarian crisis and sharp escalation in Middle East tensions.

title.zh: 美国加强对华AI芯片出口管制
title.en: US Tightens AI Chip Export Controls on China

description.zh: 2023年10月17日，美国商务部更新对华半导体出口管制规则，进一步收紧对NVIDIA等公司向中国出口高端AI芯片的限制，封堵此前的"降规格"出口漏洞。
description.en: On October 17, 2023, the US Commerce Department updated semiconductor export control rules for China, further tightening restrictions on companies like NVIDIA exporting high-end AI chips to China, closing previous 'downgraded spec' export loopholes.

title.en: Biden Signs Executive Order on AI Safety

description.zh: 2023年10月30日，美国总统拜登签署关于人工智能安全的行政令，要求开发强大AI系统的公司在发布前与政府共享安全测试结果，这是美国迄今最全面的AI监管措施。
description.en: On October 30, 2023, President Biden signed an Executive Order on AI Safety, requiring companies developing powerful AI systems to share safety test results with the government before release — the most comprehensive US AI regulatory action to date.

title.zh: 英国布莱切利AI安全峰会
title.en: UK Bletchley Park AI Safety Summit

description.zh: 2023年11月1-2日，英国在布莱切利公园举办全球首届AI安全峰会，28个国家（包括中国）签署《布莱切利宣言》，承诺合作应对前沿AI风险。
description.en: On November 1-2, 2023, the UK hosted the first global AI Safety Summit at Bletchley Park. 28 countries including China signed the Bletchley Declaration, committing to cooperate on frontier AI risks.

description.zh: 2023年11月15日，美国总统拜登与中国国家主席习近平在旧金山APEC峰会期间举行会谈，同意恢复军事对话渠道并讨论AI安全合作，标志中美关系阶段性缓和。
description.en: On November 15, 2023, President Biden and President Xi held talks during the APEC summit in San Francisco, agreeing to restore military communication channels and discuss AI safety cooperation, marking a phase of US-China relations stabilization.

title.zh: OpenAI领导层危机：奥特曼被解雇后回归
title.en: OpenAI Leadership Crisis: Altman Fired Then Returned

description.zh: 2023年11月17日，OpenAI董事会突然解雇CEO萨姆·奥特曼，引发全球科技界震动。经过五天的戏剧性事件，包括大部分员工威胁辞职，奥特曼于11月22日回归，董事会改组。此事件暴露了AI安全与商业化之间的深层张力。
description.en: On November 17, 2023, the OpenAI board abruptly fired CEO Sam Altman, shocking the global tech world. After five dramatic days, including most employees threatening to resign, Altman returned on November 22 with a restructured board. The crisis exposed deep tensions between AI safety and commercialization.

title.en: UAE's G42 Releases Falcon 180B Open-Source Model

description.zh: 阿联酋技术创新研究院(TII)发布1800亿参数的Falcon 180B开源大模型，是当时最大的公开可用模型之一，标志海湾国家在AI领域的雄心。
description.en: The UAE's Technology Innovation Institute (TII) released the 180-billion parameter Falcon 180B open-source model, one of the largest publicly available models at the time, signaling Gulf states' AI ambitions.

title.en: Google Launches Gemini Multimodal AI Model

description.zh: 2023年12月6日，Google DeepMind发布Gemini模型，这是Google应对GPT-4的多模态大语言模型，原生支持文本、图像、音频和视频理解，标志Google在AI竞赛中的重大反击。
description.en: On December 6, 2023, Google DeepMind launched the Gemini model — Google's multimodal LLM response to GPT-4, with native text, image, audio, and video understanding, marking a major counter-offensive in the AI race.

title.zh: 欧盟AI法案达成政治协议
title.en: EU AI Act Political Agreement Reached

description.zh: 2023年12月8日，欧洲议会与欧盟理事会就《欧盟AI法案》达成政治协议，确立全球首部综合性AI监管法律框架，按风险等级对AI系统进行分类监管。
description.en: On December 8, 2023, the European Parliament and EU Council reached political agreement on the EU AI Act, establishing the world's first comprehensive AI regulatory legal framework with risk-based classification of AI systems.

title.zh: 台湾大选赖清德当选总统
title.en: Taiwan Election: Lai Ching-te Elected President

description.zh: 2024年1月13日，民进党候选人赖清德赢得台湾总统选举，延续蔡英文路线，北京表示"严重关切"，台海局势持续紧张。台积电在全球AI芯片供应链中的核心地位使台湾地缘政治重要性进一步提升。
description.en: On January 13, 2024, DPP candidate Lai Ching-te won Taiwan's presidential election, continuing the Tsai Ing-wen line. Beijing expressed 'grave concern,' with cross-strait tensions persisting. TSMC's core role in the global AI chip supply chain further elevates Taiwan's geopolitical importance.

title.zh: 三星SK海力士HBM芯片供不应求
title.en: Samsung and SK Hynix HBM Chips in Severe Shortage

description.zh: 2024年初，用于AI加速器的高带宽存储器(HBM)芯片需求激增，韩国三星与SK海力士作为全球主要供应商产能满载，HBM成为AI算力竞赛的关键瓶颈。
description.en: In early 2024, demand for High Bandwidth Memory (HBM) chips used in AI accelerators surged, with Samsung and SK Hynix as the world's primary suppliers running at full capacity — HBM becoming a critical bottleneck in the AI compute race.

description.zh: 2024年2月8日，Google将其AI聊天机器人Bard正式更名为Gemini，并推出付费版Gemini Advanced（基于Ultra 1.0模型），标志Google全面以Gemini品牌整合AI产品线。
description.en: On February 8, 2024, Google officially rebranded its AI chatbot Bard as Gemini and launched the paid Gemini Advanced (based on Ultra 1.0), signaling Google's full consolidation of its AI product line under the Gemini brand.

description.zh: 2024年2月15日，OpenAI展示文生视频模型Sora，能生成长达一分钟的高保真视频，在视觉质量和叙事连贯性上远超此前模型，引发影视与创意行业震动。
description.en: On February 15, 2024, OpenAI unveiled Sora, a text-to-video model capable of generating up to one minute of high-fidelity video, far exceeding previous models in visual quality and narrative coherence, shaking the film and creative industries.

description.zh: 2024年3月4日，Anthropic发布Claude 3系列（Haiku/Sonnet/Opus），其中Opus在多项基准测试中超越GPT-4，标志AI安全导向的企业首次在性能上挑战OpenAI的领先地位。
description.en: On March 4, 2024, Anthropic released the Claude 3 family (Haiku/Sonnet/Opus), with Opus surpassing GPT-4 on multiple benchmarks — the first time a safety-oriented company challenged OpenAI's performance leadership.

description.zh: 2024年4月18日，Meta发布Llama 3系列开源大语言模型（8B和70B参数版本），在同等规模模型中性能最优，进一步巩固Meta在开源AI领域的领导地位。
description.en: On April 18, 2024, Meta released the Llama 3 open-source LLM family (8B and 70B parameter versions), achieving best-in-class performance at their respective scales, further consolidating Meta's leadership in open-source AI.

title.zh: 美国众议院通过TikTok剥离法案
title.en: US House Passes TikTok Divestiture Bill

description.zh: 2024年4月20日，美国国会通过法案要求字节跳动在约一年内出售TikTok的美国业务，否则将面临全国禁令，标志中美科技博弈升级到社交媒体领域。
description.en: On April 20, 2024, the US Congress passed legislation requiring ByteDance to divest TikTok's US operations within approximately one year or face a nationwide ban, escalating US-China tech rivalry into social media.

description.zh: 2024年5月13日，OpenAI发布GPT-4o（"o"代表omni），实现文本、音频与视觉的实时多模态交互，响应速度接近人类对话水平，免费向所有用户开放。
description.en: On May 13, 2024, OpenAI released GPT-4o ('o' for omni), enabling real-time multimodal interaction across text, audio, and vision with near-human-conversation response speed, free for all users.

title.zh: 苹果发布Apple Intelligence AI战略
title.en: Apple Launches Apple Intelligence AI Strategy

description.zh: 2024年6月10日，苹果在WWDC上发布"Apple Intelligence"个人智能系统，将AI深度集成到iPhone、iPad和Mac中，并与OpenAI达成合作在Siri中集成ChatGPT。
description.en: On June 10, 2024, Apple unveiled 'Apple Intelligence' at WWDC, deeply integrating AI into iPhone, iPad, and Mac, and partnering with OpenAI to integrate ChatGPT into Siri.

title.zh: NVIDIA成为全球市值最高公司
title.en: NVIDIA Becomes World's Most Valuable Company

description.zh: 2024年6月18日，NVIDIA市值短暂超越微软与苹果，成为全球市值最高的上市公司（约3.34万亿美元），反映AI算力需求的爆发性增长。
description.en: On June 18, 2024, NVIDIA's market cap briefly surpassed Microsoft and Apple to become the world's most valuable public company (~$3.34 trillion), reflecting the explosive growth in AI compute demand.
